original: Player: Emily
It was the grave of Emily Grant—[p/]such a shame that she died so young.
translation: 这是艾梅莉·格兰特的坟墓——[p/]她那么年轻就不幸逝世，实在是遗憾。

original: I briefly paid my respects.
translation: 我简短地示以敬意。

original: It was the grave that Eris was attending to earlier.
translation: 厄莉斯早些时候就在这座坟墓前。

original: The name on the stone said “Emily Grant”,[p/] and her lifetime appears to be awfully short.
translation: 石碑上刻着的名字是“艾梅莉·格兰特”，[p/]她的一生看起来极其短暂。

original: She must have only been twelve years old when she died.
translation: 她去世时仅仅十二岁。

original: Player: Grave
It was a grave for an individual that I didn't know.
translation: 并不清楚这里埋葬了谁。

original: Out of respect,[p/] it'd be best to leave it undisturbed.
translation: 最好不要打扰已逝之人的安息。

original: Player: Back
Player: The Trial
ERIS: That was my first time watching a court trial.
translation: ERIS: 这还是我第一次旁听庭审。

original: ERIS: You were truly remarkable.
translation: ERIS: 你可真厉害。

original: TYRION: ...Thank you.[p/] Were you in the gallery?
translation: TYRION: ……谢谢，[p/]你当时在旁听席上吗？

original: ERIS: I’ve always enjoyed watching physical battles [p/]in the theatre.
translation: ERIS: 我从小就喜欢看剧院里的打斗戏码。

original: ERIS: But I see now that battles of wits can be just as entertaining to watch.
translation: ERIS: 但我现在觉得看文斗剧应该也很有趣。

original: TYRION: “Entertaining”?
translation: TYRION: “有趣”？

original: CELESTE: Yeah,[p/] I know what you mean.
translation: CELESTE: 嗯，[p/]我懂你意思。

original: CELESTE: You see the odds are stacked against him,[p/] but then he suddenly pulls out this crazy deduction that takes the whole trial back.
translation: CELESTE: 但他总能提出一些剑走偏锋的推理扭转局势。

original: TYRION: I’ve...[p/] never really thought of it like that...
translation: TYRION: 我……[p/]从没那么想过……

original: ERIS: But I’m sure it’s far more entertaining to be the one [i]making[/i] the deductions.
translation: ERIS: [i]想出[/i]这些推理的过程一定非常有趣。

original: TYRION: I’m...[p/] not really sure what you mean.
translation: TYRION: 我……[p/]不太懂你什么意思。

original: TYRION: I practice law so that I can help those persecuted by the justice system.
translation: TYRION: 我从事法律工作，只是为了能帮到那些被司法体系起诉的人。

original: TYRION: I don’t really do it to "entertain" myself.
translation: TYRION: 我并不以此为乐。

original: ERIS: But is that really true?
translation: ERIS: 但真的是这样吗？

original: ERIS: Don’t you find the experience even the least bit entertaining, Tyrion?
translation: ERIS: 提利昂，在这过程中你难道就没有一丁点的乐趣吗？

original: TYRION: Um...[p/] I wouldn’t really put it that way.
translation: TYRION: 唔嗯……[p/]我不会这么形容。

original: ERIS: You’re far too modest.[p/] You save people from the clutches of death.
translation: ERIS: 你真是太谦虚了。[p/]你从死亡的魔爪中拯救他人。

original: ERIS: To your clients,[p/] you might as well be a knight in shining armor.
translation: ERIS: 对于你的委托人来说，[p/]你可能如同身着闪耀铠甲的骑士。

original: Eris: ...
translation: Eris: ……

original: Eris: I know you're looking for it,[p/] but apparently those new operating systems don't like it when I peek at your real name.
translation: Eris: 我知道你在找它，[p/] 但显然那些新的操作系统不太喜欢我窥探你的真名。

original: Eris: I'm all for a bit of fun,[p/] but that's not worth blue-screening people.
translation: Eris: 我是不反对找点乐子，但为这个把人弄蓝屏可就不值当了。

original: Tyrion: ...What?
translation: Tyrion: ……什么？

original: Eris: Don't worry about it.
translation: Eris: 别在意。

original: Player: Illusion Magic
TYRION: Earlier,[p/] you said that you were studying [b]illusion[/b] magic.
translation: TYRION: 先前你有提到过自己在学习[b]幻象术[/b]魔法。

original: ERIS: I am.[p/] Did you want to ask me about the prosecution’s theory?
translation: ERIS: 是的，[p/]你是想问我检方的假设有无成立的可能对吧？

original: TYRION: ...Yes, actually.[p/] How did you know?
translation: TYRION: ……对的，[p/]你怎么知道我要问什么？

original: ERIS: Disguising an undead with an illusion is definitely possible.
translation: ERIS: 用幻象来伪装已死之人是绝对可行的。

original: ERIS: As Lady Steelwind said,[p/] [b]Illusory Disguise[/b] would be the best spell to use for that.
translation: ERIS: 正如斯蒂尔文德小姐所说，[p/][b]幻象伪装[/b]确实是达成这种效果的最佳法术。

original: TYRION: What if someone created a freestanding illusion?
translation: TYRION: 那要是有人创造了一个独立的幻觉呢？

original: TYRION: We know that Wallace didn’t animate and disguise the professor’s corpse.
translation: TYRION: 华莱士没有复活并伪装教授的尸体。

original: TYRION: So,[p/] what if the illusion wasn’t disguising [i]anything[/i]?
translation: TYRION: 就是说，[p/]如果幻觉下没有实体可不可行呢？

original: TYRION: Maybe someone created a freestanding illusion of Bellwether walking around?
translation: TYRION: 有没有可能创造一个没有实体的贝尔维瑟教授，营造她在学院游荡的假象？

original: ERIS: For something like that,[p/] one would probably use [b]Major Illusion[/b].
translation: ERIS: 要达到那种效果的话，[p/]大概率会用[b]高等幻象术[/b]。

original: Player: Major Illusion
TYRION: Hm...
translation: Tyrion: 嗯……

original: CELESTE: What is it?
translation: CELESTE: 怎么了？

original: TYRION: I don't think [b]Major Illusion[/b] is what we’re looking for.
translation: TYRION: 总觉得不太可能是[b]高等幻象术[/b]。

original: TYRION: Do you remember what Jan said?
translation: TYRION: 还记得简的话吧？

original: JAN: I was cleaning a mess in the hallways.
translation: JAN: 我当时正在走廊里打扫卫生。

original: JAN: Bellwether knocked over a vase...[p/] And there were shards and dirt everywhere.
translation: JAN: 贝尔维瑟撞倒了一个花瓶……[p/]搞得满地都是碎片和泥土。

original: TYRION: If the “Bellwether” that Jan saw was a Major Illusion,[p/] then she couldn’t have knocked over that vase.
translation: TYRION: 如果当时简看到的“贝尔维瑟”是由高等幻象术创造的话，[p/]那她就不存在实体，更别提撞倒花瓶了。

original: TYRION: Illusions created by that spell don’t have any mass.
translation: TYRION: 那个法术创造的只是幻象，没有实体。

original: ERIS: I see.[p/] How perceptive of you.
translation: ERIS: 我明白了，[p/]你可真是明察秋毫。

original: CELESTE: Aren’t there any other [b]illusion[/b] spells that have mass?
translation: CELESTE: 还有其他能拥有实体的[b]幻象术[/b]类法术吗？

original: ERIS: No.[p/] All known [b]illusion[/b] spells in Wyverngarde can only recreate visual and auditory sensations.
translation: ERIS: 没有，[p/]在维文加德所有已知的法术只能重塑视觉和听觉。

original: ERIS: None of those spells can create something that someone can touch.
translation: ERIS: 但没有幻觉法术能够拥有实体。

original: CELESTE: So that means that someone disguised[p/] [i]something[/i] to make it look like Bellwether.
translation: CELESTE: 那也就是说有人把什么东西……[p/]伪装成了贝尔维瑟。

original: Celeste: ...
translation: Celeste: ……

original: ERIS: Why the look of suspicion, Celeste?
translation: ERIS: 你怎么像是在怀疑我，塞莱斯特？

original: CELESTE: S-[p/][s/]Sorry,[p/][s/] I wasn’t-!
translation: CELESTE: 抱、[p/][s/]抱歉，[p/][s/]我没那个意——！

original: ERIS: Calm yourself.[p/] I was only joking.
translation: ERIS: 不用那么紧张。[p/] 我只是开个玩笑。

original: ERIS: I don’t blame you for considering every possibility.
translation: ERIS: 考虑所有的可能性并不是什么坏事。

original: ERIS: In fact,[p/] I’m flattered you think I’m capable of pulling off such an elaborate ruse.
translation: ERIS: 说实话，[p/]你怀疑我能弄出这么复杂的伪装手段，我反而觉得很荣幸。

original: CELESTE: ...
translation: Celeste: ……

original: TYRION: ...Anyways,[p/] this [i]does[/i] tell us one important thing.
translation: TYRION: ……不管怎样，[p/]我们[i]确实[/i]明白了一件事。

original: ERIS: What’s that?
translation: ERIS: 是什么呢？

original: TYRION: The “Bellwether” that Jan saw had a physical mass to it.
translation: TYRION: 简当时看到的“贝尔维瑟”拥有实体。

original: TYRION: It wasn’t a freestanding illusion.[p/] It was someone disguised as her.
translation: TYRION: 那并非是一个独立的幻觉。[p/]一定是某人假扮成了贝尔维瑟。

original: Player: Gravestone
ERIS: Hm...[p/] It’s quite a shame, isn’t it?
translation: ERIS: 嗯……[p/]真是遗憾，不是吗？

original: Eris looked pensively towards the gravestone.
translation: 厄莉斯略带忧虑的望向那块墓碑。

original: The name on the stone said “Emily Grant”,[p/] and her lifetime appeared to have been awfully short.
translation: 石碑上刻着的名字是“艾梅莉·格兰特”，[p/]她的一生看起来极其短暂。

original: TYRION: S-[p/]Sorry for interrupting you...[p/] Was she someone you knew?
translation: TYRION: 抱、[p/][s/]抱歉打扰……[p/]你认识她吗？

original: ERIS: I’m actually here on Wallace’s behalf.
translation: ERIS: 我是代替华莱士来的。

original: CELESTE: Wallace knew her?
translation: CELESTE: 华莱士认识她？

original: ERIS: Wallace joined the academy as part of a program run by Headmaster Redmond.
translation: ERIS: 华莱士是因为雷德蒙校长的某个项目才被录取的。

original: ERIS: At the time,[p/] the headmaster was reaching out to mages among the commonfolk.
translation: ERIS: 那时候，[p/]校长正向平民中的法师伸出援手。

original: ERIS: He had started a program to admit them to the academy through a scholarship program.
translation: ERIS: 他成立了一个补助项目，允许这些法师免学费就读。

original: ERIS: Both Emily and Wallace were among those mages.
translation: ERIS: 艾梅莉和华莱士就是那时入学的。

original: CELESTE: Wow...[p/] That must have been an amazing opportunity for them.
translation: CELESTE: 哇哦……[p/]对他们来说一定是个难得的机会。

original: ERIS: The truth is,[p/] neither of them actually cared about learning magic.
translation: ERIS: 其实，[p/]他们两个谁都没有太在乎学习魔法这一点。

original: ERIS: The real problem was that Emily had a deadly illness.
translation: ERIS: 真正的问题是艾梅莉身患绝症。

original: ERIS: She and Wallace were poor orphans,[p/] and they obviously didn’t have the resources to treat it.
translation: ERIS: 她和华莱士都是孤儿，[p/]没有治疗的钱和渠道。

original: ERIS: But if they enrolled in the academy...
translation: ERIS: 不过进了学院就另当别论了……

original: TYRION: The academy would be obligated to give her medical treatment.
translation: TYRION: 学院有义务给予她医疗救助。

original: ERIS: The Imperial Academy teaches the best mages in the kingdom.
translation: ERIS: 帝国学院为王国培养最优秀的法师。

original: ERIS: They thought that curing her illness would be an easy task for the academy’s healers.
translation: ERIS: 他们以为只要来到学院，治好她的病就是小菜一碟。

original: ERIS: ...But they were mistaken, I’m afraid.
translation: ERIS: ……但世事无常，事与愿违。

original: ERIS: I’m sure you know this by now,[p/] but healing spells can only treat wounds.[p/] They can’t cure illnesses.
translation: ERIS: 我想你应该也已经知道了，[p/]治愈法术只能治疗伤口，[p/]不能治愈疾病。

original: ERIS: Emily’s condition only got worse over the years,[p/] and eventually,[p/] she succumbed to her illness.
translation: ERIS: 艾梅莉的身体每况愈下，[p/]最后……[p/]她没能挺过去。

original: ERIS: Wallace was furious.[p/] He didn’t understand why the kingdom was outlawing magic that could save lives.
translation: ERIS: 华莱士当时很愤怒。[p/]他不明白王国为什么禁止使用能够救命的魔法。

original: TYRION: ...And that’s why he decided to learn it himself.
translation: TYRION: ……所以他决定走上学习死灵术的道路。

original: ERIS: Yes.[p/] The headmaster was inspired by Wallace’s resolve.
translation: ERIS: 没错。[p/]校长被他的决心所鼓舞。

original: ERIS: He gave him access to the academy's forbidden tomes of [b]necromancy[/b].
translation: ERIS: 于是给予了他查阅[b]死灵术[/b]相关禁书的权限。

original: ERIS: And with the headmaster's guidance,[p/] Wallace learned the spells that he knows today.
translation: ERIS: 在校长的指导下，[p/] 华莱士才有了今天的学识和能力。

original: CELESTE: So, that’s why...
translation: CELESTE: 原来……是这样……

original: ERIS: It was supposed to stay a secret between him and the headmaster.
translation: ERIS: 这本该是他和校长之间的秘密。

original: ERIS: ...But I’m sure you know how that turned out.
translation: ERIS: ……但结果如何也不用多说了。

original: Player: BACK
Player: Runestone
Eris: Seriously?[p/] You're showing me the badge now?
translation: Eris: 真的假的？[p/] 你要我看这个徽章？

original: Tyrion: "Badge"?[p/] It's an Attorney's Runestone.
translation: Tyrion: “徽章”？[p/] 这是律师符石。

original: Eris: We're really threading the line, aren't we?
translation: Eris: 还真是剑走偏锋啊。

original: Eris: Are you going to make a habit of showing this thing to everyone you meet?
translation: Eris: 你不会已经养成了见到谁都给他看看这东西的习惯了吧？

original: Tyrion: I-[p/][s/]I just think it's neat.
translation: Tyrion: 我-[p/][s/]我只是觉得这个挺好的。

original: Player: Tyrion
Eris: I wasn't quite sure what to make of you at first,[p/] but you are truly remarkable.
translation: Eris: 起初我还不太清楚你的能力，[p/]但现在看来你真的很了不起。

original: Tyrion: Thanks...[p/] I think?
translation: Tyrion: 多谢夸奖……[p/]这算夸奖吗？

original: Eris: I quite enjoyed watching you battle Lady Steelwind.
translation: Eris: 我还蛮爱看你与斯蒂尔文德小姐对峙的。

original: Eris: I only hope the climax lives up to my expectations.
translation: Eris: 希望故事的高潮能让我满意。

original: Player: Celeste
Eris: That's a fancy-looking sword, Celeste.
translation: Eris: 真是把好剑，塞莱斯特。

original: Eris: Is it from the Eastern Kingdoms?
translation: Eris: 是出自于东方古国吧？

original: Celeste: Y-[p/]Yes, actually.
translation: Celeste: 嗯、[p/]嗯，没错。

original: Celeste: How did you know?
translation: Celeste: 你怎么看出来的？

original: Eris: I've encountered a few weapons from there before.
translation: Eris: 我之前见过一些来自那边的武器。

original: Eris: They have a unique style that's easy to recognize.
translation: Eris: 独特的武器风格很容易辨认。

original: Player: Aria
Eris: Lady Steelwind is really something.
translation: Eris: 斯蒂尔文德小姐真的很厉害。

original: Tyrion: Yeah.[p/] I feel like she's always one step ahead of me.
translation: Tyrion: 对啊，[p/]总觉得她什么都快我一步。

original: Eris: But she [i]does[/i] have a habit of relenting when she realizes she's wrong.
translation: Eris: 不过她在不占理的时候不会和平时一样咄咄逼人。

original: Eris: I think you deserve a worthier adversary.
translation: Eris: 我觉得你应该找个更厉害的对手。

original: Tyrion: I mean...[p/] She can be a pain sometimes,[p/] but I'm glad that she pursues justice even if it means she loses.
translation: Tyrion: 我觉得……[p/] 她有时候挺棘手的，但我觉得她即使败北也在追求正义的品质难能可贵。

original: It was strange...[p/] I would've never seen myself holding such high respect for a noble.
translation: 真是件怪事……[p/]我没想到自己会对一个贵族有如此高的评价。

original: Eris: Anyways,[p/] I wonder what would drive a noble like her into becoming a lowly prosecutor.
translation: Eris: 不过，[p/]我很好奇她这样的贵族经历过什么，才会选择成为地位低下的检察官。

original: Eris: I'd love to know the story behind that.
translation: Eris: 我很想知道背后的故事。

original: Player: Eris
Tyrion: We know that Wallace was accepted through Redmond's program...
translation: Tyrion: 我们已经知道华莱士是通过雷德蒙的项目入学……

original: Tyrion: But what about you, Eris?
translation: Tyrion: 那厄莉斯你是怎么入学的呢？

original: Eris: Are you trying to ask me if I'm a noble bastard?
translation: Eris: 怀疑我是贵族的私生子吗？

original: Tyrion: S-[p/]Sorry, I didn't mean-
translation: Tyrion: 抱、[p/]抱歉，我没那个意——

original: Eris: No need to apologize.
translation: Eris: 不用道歉啦。

original: Eris: Although,[p/] the answer to that question is a bit...[p/] complicated.
translation: Eris: 虽然解释起来……[p/]嗯……[p/]有些复杂。

original: Eris: My family is quite wealthy, but I wouldn't consider them a part of the nobility.
translation: Eris: 单论财富，我的家族还是能和贵族们掰掰手腕的，[p/]但我不认为算贵族。

original: Hm...[p/] Her family must've been part of a guild or something.
translation: 哼嗯……[p/]她家里肯定掌管着商业公会一类的组织。

original: Eris: I would say it's more like several circles.
translation: Eris: 我觉得更像是绕了好几圈。

original: Player: Catherine
Eris: Catherine Bellwether wasn't the best person.
translation: Eris: 凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟实在谈不上是什么好人。

original: Eris: She constantly used her authority to belittle and torment people.
translation: Eris: 她经常凭借自己的职权贬低和惩罚别人。

original: Eris: I'm sure the world is better off without her in it.
translation: Eris: 说实话，这个世界没有她会变得更好。

original: Tyrion: T-[p/]That's extremely blunt,[p/] Eris...
translation: Tyrion: 这、[p/]再怎么说也有点太过分了……[p/]厄莉斯……

original: But I couldn't exactly disagree with her.
translation: 但我也不算完全反对她的说法。

original: Eris: I have no interest in indulging those in power who are unworthy of it.
translation: 但你也不算完全反对她的说法。

original: Player: Wallace
Eris: It's strange, really.
translation: Eris: 说起来真的挺怪的。

original: Eris: If it weren't for his disposition,[p/] Wallace would be quite the person to fear.
translation: Eris: 抛开华莱士的性格不谈，[p/]他其实应该挺令人害怕的。

original: Tyrion: What do you mean?
translation: TYRION: 这又从何说起？

original: Eris: It's clear to the three of [i]us[/i] that he didn't commit the murder.
translation: Eris: 虽然[i]我们[/i]三人都知道他不可能是真凶。

original: Eris: But think about how easily he [i]could[/i] have done what he was accused of.
translation: Eris: 但好好想想他被捕的原因。

original: Eris: He could instantly kill anyone using [b]Necrotic Blight[/b],[p/] and he could even raise them as undead using [b]Animate Corpse[/b].
translation: Eris: 他随时可以用[b]索命咒[/b]立刻杀掉任何人，而且还能用[b]活化死尸[/b]把他们变成僵尸一样的存在。

original: Tyrion: But Wallace would never do something like that.
translation: Tyrion: 但华莱士是绝对不会做这种事的。

original: Eris: [i]*sigh*[/i][p/] I agree.
translation: Eris: [i]*叹气*[/i][p/] 我同意。

original: Eris: But one can often be surprised by what someone can do if they are pushed far enough.
translation: Eris: 不过这可说不准，毕竟人急烧香，狗急蓦墙。

original: Eris: It really makes me wonder how idiotic the people who bully him are.
translation: Eris: 不过这真让我觉得霸凌他的那些人很蠢。

original: I'd rather not think about that.
translation: 还是不要想这些了。

original: Player: Theodore
Tyrion: You were with the headmaster in his office earlier.
translation: Tyrion: 早些时候我看到你在校长办公室来着。

original: Tyrion: Are you two acquaintances?
translation: Tyrion: 你们两个认识？

original: Eris: In a way, yes.[p/] You could say that I’m a patron of his.
translation: Eris: 某种程度上来说确实认识，[p/]可以说我是他的赞助人。

original: Eris: I’m interested in why he would go so far as to include the commonfolk in the academy.
translation: Eris: 我个人比较好奇他为什么愿意向普通人开放学院。

original: Eris: His generosity can clearly be a vice sometimes.
translation: Eris: 他的慷慨有时候会变成缺点。

original: Eris: Enrolling commonfolk mages into the academy was already a controversial move.
translation: Eris: 吸纳平民出身的法师本就是个很有争议的决策。

original: Eris: But teaching one of them [b]necromancy[/b] illegally...
translation: Eris: 但教授平民[b]死灵术[/b]是违法的……

original: Eris: Even [i]if[/i] Wallace is acquitted,[p/] I don't see things getting easier for him.
translation: Eris: [i]就算[/i]华莱士能逃过这次，[p/]我想他以后也不会好过。

original: Default
Tyrion: What do you think about this, Eris?
translation: Tyrion: 厄莉斯，你对这个有什么想法吗？

original: Eris: Really, now?
translation: Eris: 真的？现在？

original: Eris: I can't tell you [i]everything[/i] you need to get through this case.
translation: Eris: 我不能[i]什么[/i]都告诉你，你得自己去解明真相。

original: Eris: What would be the fun in that?
translation: Eris: 要是什么都告诉你就没意思了嘛。

original: Tyrion: Um...[p/] Okay?
translation: Tyrion: 呃……[p/]好吧？

original: CELESTE: Tyrion...?[p/] What are we doing here?
translation: CELESTE: 提利昂……？[p/]我们来这儿干嘛？

original: TYRION: I’m...[p/] not sure.
translation: TYRION: 我也……[p/]不太清楚……

original: For some reason,[p/] I felt drawn to this place.
translation: 不知怎的，[p/]这里好像有种神奇的魔力吸引着我。

original: I was supposed to make my way back to the Academy,[p/] but I suddenly found myself here.
translation: 我本该返回学院的，却突然发现自己来到了这里。

original: It was strange,[p/] but I couldn't even remember how we'd arrived here.
translation: 真怪，[p/] 我甚至都不记得我们是怎么到这的。

original: CELESTE: Wait...[p/][s/] Is that Eris?!
translation: CELESTE: 等下……[p/][s/]那是厄莉斯吧？！

original: Celeste pointed further into the cemetery.[p/] Eris was standing there in front of a gravestone.
translation: 塞莱斯特指向墓地深处。[p/] 厄莉斯正站在一个墓碑前。

original: She was placing flowers on it and appeared to be chanting a short prayer.
translation: 她轻轻地放了几束花，同时嘴里说着什么，像是在轻声祷告。

original: CELESTE: Well...[p/] We found her.
translation: CELESTE: 总之……[p/]我们找到她了。

original: TYRION: We...[p/] should probably talk to her later.
translation: TYRION: 我们还是……[p/]待会儿再打扰她比较好。

original: TYRION: It would be rude to disturb her now.
translation: TYRION: 现在上前问话有些不合时宜。

original: As we were about to leave,[p/] Eris suddenly turned to face us.
translation: 正当我们打算离开这里时，[p/]厄莉斯突然看向我们。

original: She was far away,[p/] but she'd clearly noticed us and was beckoning us over.
translation: 虽然她站在很远的地方，[p/]但能看清她在招呼我们过去。

original: ERIS: Oh, hello there.[p/] Were you two looking for me?
translation: ERIS: 嗨，你们好啊。[p/]你们两个是在找我吗？

original: TYRION: S-[p/]Sorry.[p/] We [i]were[/i] looking for you,[p/] but we understand if you’d rather talk later...
translation: TYRION: 抱、[p/]抱歉。[p/]我们确实在找你……[p/] 但如果你需要时间我们可以等等再聊……

original: ERIS: No.[p/] I was just finishing up here.
translation: ERIS: 没关系的，[p/]我已经完事了。

original: ERIS: Did you have something you wanted to talk to me about?
translation: ERIS: 找我一定是有话要说吧？

original: TYRION: Well...[p/] We wanted to ask you some questions about the case.
translation: TYRION: 是的……[p/]我们想问你一些关于此案的细节。

original: CELESTE: Oh, Tyrion![p/] I almost forgot!
translation: CELESTE: 哦对！提利昂，[p/]我差点都忘了！

original: Celeste: Let me show you one of the new spells I learned.
translation: Celeste: 给你展示下我新学的魔法。

original: CELESTE: ...[b]REPERIO ARCANUM[/b]!
ARIA: ...!
translation: ARIA: ……!

original: TYRION: W-[p/][s/]What was that?
translation: TYRION: 什、[p/][s/]什么东西？！

original: CELESTE: [i]That[/i] is the incantation for the [b]Detect Magic[/b] spell.
translation: CELESTE: 那是[b]法术探测[/b]的咒语。

original: TYRION: [b]Detect Magic[/b]...?[p/] Wait...[p/][s/] Does that mean—?
translation: TYRION: [b]法术探测[/b]……？[p/]等下……[p/][s/]你该不会……？！

original: CELESTE: Yep![p/][s/] I can see magical traces while we're EXAMINING crime scenes!
translation: CELESTE: 没错！[p/][s/]现在你调查犯罪现场时，我能探测是否存在魔法痕迹了！

original: Player: Painting
Tyrion: It's a painting of some sort of musician.
translation: Tyrion: 某个音乐家的画像。

original: Tyrion: There's some text written below it.
translation: Tyrion: 下面写着什么。

original: Tyrion: "Doctor Nicolas Goussu:[p/] Inventor of the Arcane Engine."
translation: Tyrion: “Nicolas Goussu 博士，[p/]奥术引擎之父。”

original: Tyrion: "His work revolutionized trade and travel across the seas."
translation: Tyrion: “他的辛勤付出彻底改善了全世界海上贸易与旅行的方式。”

original: Tyrion: "He was well known for not discriminating between the commonfolk and the nobility,[p/] judging his assistants based purely on their merit."
translation: Tyrion: “他因对贵族平民一视同仁而为世人所传颂，[p/]对助手的评价也完全依照功绩。”

original: Tyrion: "When he wasn't conducting research within the Imperial Academy,[p/] he was known to compose symphonies in his free time."
translation: Tyrion: “不在帝国学院进行研究时，[p/]他会为国王创作交响曲。”

original: It sounded like he was a man of many talents.
translation: 看起来是位才华横溢的男人。

original: Player: Body
Tyrion: There's a chalk outline where the professor's body was.
translation: Tyrion: 地上有粉笔画出的尸体轮廓。

original: Tyrion: It appears that most of this blood came from her abdomen.
translation: Tyrion: 看起来她腹部大量出血。

original: Tyrion: Is that where the fatal wound was?
translation: Tyrion: 致命伤是在腹部吗？

original: ARIA: ...
translation: ARIA: ……

original: TYRION: There’s a lot of blood in this puddle...[p/] but there’s no trail leading to it.
translation: TYRION: 这里有很多血……[p/]但没有延申至这里的痕迹。

original: TYRION: And there aren't any magical traces anywhere else in the room.
translation: TYRION: 房间里除了这也没有别的魔法痕迹。

original: Tyrion: I doubt the murderer used magic to clean it.
translation: Tyrion: 我怀疑凶手用魔法清理过。

original: CELESTE: Does that mean that the murderer attacked her in this room?
translation: CELESTE: 那这里会是第一案发现场吗？

original: TYRION: Maybe...[p/] But it’s hard to say for certain.
translation: TYRION: 可能是……[p/]但很难确定。

original: Player: Window
Tyrion: The lecture hall has a window.
translation: Tyrion: 讲堂有扇窗。

original: Celeste: I feel like I'd just stare outside all day if I had to sit in this place.
translation: Celeste: 我要是在这儿坐着可能会一直看向窗外走神。

original: Celeste: How long do they have to sit here, anyway?
translation: Celeste: 话说这些学生到底要在这坐多久？

original: Aria: Lectures here last for an hour at a minimum.
translation: Aria: 这里的课最短要上一个小时。

original: Celeste: An [i]hour[/i]?![p/] No wonder all the nobles are such psychopaths!
translation: Celeste: 一个小时？！[p/] 难怪那些贵族一个个都是神经病！

original: Aria: Present company excluded, I hope.
translation: Aria: 不过现场的各位除外。

original: Celeste: Yeah.[p/] You're not that bad, Aria.
translation: Celeste: 嗯。[p/] 阿莉亚你也没那么坏嘛。

original: Aria: ...How have you learned so many spells if you're so distractible?
translation: Aria: ……既然这么容易分心，那你是怎么学会这么多法术的？

original: Celeste: I don't know.[p/] I just look at the spell formula and...[p/] do it.
translation: Celeste: 我自己也不太清楚。[p/]我就看了看范式，然后就……[p/]照着做。

original: Aria: I...[p/] see.
translation: Aria: 我……[p/]明白了。

original: Celeste: ...Is that not normal?
translation: Celeste: ……难道其他人不是这样的吗？

original: Player: Books
Celeste: Oh![p/] They have books here too.
translation: Celeste: 哇哦！[p/]这里也有书。

original: Tyrion: These appear to be textbooks about alchemy.
translation: Tyrion: 看起来是炼金术的教科书。

original: Celeste: Aw...[p/] Lame.
translation: Celeste: 喔……[p/]无聊。

original: Player: Students
Tyrion: This must be where the students sit during lectures.
translation: Tyrion: 这里是学生坐的座位。

original: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] I can't imagine sitting in one place all day.
translation: Celeste: 唔呃……[p/]我可受不了在同一个地方坐一整天。

original: Tyrion: Have you never attended a school before?
translation: Tyrion: 你以前上过学吗？

original: Celeste: Do you seriously think a dump like Kornhaven has standardized education?
translation: Celeste: 你不会认为科尔哈文这样的破乡下会有正常的学校吧？

original: Celeste: I learned from books that I...
translation: Celeste: 我是从我……

original: She glanced at Steelwind before finishing that thought.
translation: 她说完这句话前瞥了斯蒂尔文德一眼。

original: Celeste: ...I learned from books that I [i]appropriated[/i] from some traveling merchants.
translation: Celeste: ……我是从我见到的一些旅行商人那“借”来的书里学到的。

original: Celeste: What about you?
translation: Celeste: 你呢？

original: Tyrion: ...I attended a public school when I was younger,[p/] but Ms. Tymora handled most of my education herself.
translation: Tyrion: ……我小时候上过公立学校，[p/] 但后来泰摩拉女士接管了我的教育。

original: Celeste: Hm...
translation: Celeste: 唔……

original: Player: Detect Body
There was a trace of [b]necromancy[/b] on the body.
translation: 尸体上有[b]死灵术[/b]魔法的痕迹。

original: According to Steelwind,[p/] that was the primary piece of evidence implicating Wallace.
translation: 根据斯蒂尔文德所说，那是指向华莱士行凶的主要证据。

original: CELESTE: ...What?
translation: CELESTE: ……什么？

original: TYRION: What’s wrong?
translation: TYRION: 怎么了？

original: CELESTE: There’s a trace of [b]necromancy[/b] in Bellwether's blood.
translation: CELESTE: 贝尔维瑟的血里有死灵术的魔法痕迹。

original: TYRION: [b]Necromancy[/b]?
translation: TYRION: [b]死灵术[/b]？！

original: CELESTE: Isn’t [b]necromancy[/b] the type of magic that creates zombies?
translation: CELESTE: [b]死灵术[/b]不是那种能创造僵尸的法术嘛？！

original: CELESTE: She’s not just going to get up and walk away, right?
translation: CELESTE: 她、[p/][s/]她应该不会突然站起来离开吧？！

original: ARIA: ...We’re honestly not sure.[p/] The Inquisition is on edge about that as well.
translation: ARIA: ……我们实际上没法确定。[p/]裁判所对此也感到非常不安。

original: TYRION: But how does that implicate Wallace?
translation: TYRION: 但是这与华莱士又有什么关联？

original: Aria: Oh,[p/] he didn't tell you?
translation: Aria: 噢，[p/]他没告诉你吗？

original: ARIA: Wallace Nightgrave is a necromancer.
translation: ARIA: 华莱士·奈特格雷夫是个死灵法师。

original: ARIA: We believe that he drained her life force using a spell called [b]Necrotic Blight[/b].
translation: ARIA: 我们怀疑他用[b]索命咒[/b]吸干了受害者的生命力。

original: Aria: Spells like that tend to interfere with the [b]divination[/b] spell we use to identify the cause of death.
translation: Aria: 那种法术往往会干扰我们确认死因的[b]占卜术[/b]。

original: ARIA: However,[p/] there were no visible wounds.[p/] Only a [b]necromancy[/b] spell could have killed her.
translation: ARIA: 然而，[p/]尸体上没有可见的创口。[p/]只有可能是[b]死灵术[/b]杀死了她。

original: Tyrion: ...Do you have a copy of the Autopsy Report?
translation: Tyrion: 你有尸检报告的副本吗？

original: Aria: Of course,[p/] but it's incomplete because of the aforementioned reasons.
translation: Aria: 当然。[p/]但因为之前我提到的原因，内容并不完整。

original: ARIA: This whole ordeal has put everyone on edge.
translation: ARIA: 这件事让所有人都焦虑不安。

original: Aria: This is the first case of necrotic homicide we've had in nearly a century.
translation: Aria: 这几乎是近百年以来第一起使用死灵术杀人的案件。

original: I couldn't believe it...[p/] I'd only read about [b]necromancy[/b] in fantasy novels.
translation: 难以置信……[p/]我只在幻想小说里读到过[b]死灵术[/b]。

original: I never imagined that I'd end up defending a necromancer.
translation: 我从来没想象过自己会为一个死灵术士辩护。

original: TYRION: But if what you're saying is true,[p/] weren’t there plenty of other mages who could use [b]necromancy[/b]?
translation: TYRION: 但如果你说的是真的，[p/]难道这里没有其他可以使用[b]死灵术[/b]的法师吗？

original: Tyrion: This [i]is[/i] an academy for mages, after all.
translation: Tyrion: 毕竟[i]这里是[/i]法师学院。

original: ARIA: No.[p/] The knowledge required to learn [b]necromancy[/b] is heavily controlled.
translation: ARIA: 没有。[p/]有关[b]死灵术[/b]的知识是受到严格管制的。

original: Aria: Mr. Nightgrave already violated several laws simply by learning these spells.
translation: Aria: 仅仅是学习这些咒语，奈特格雷夫先生就已经违反了好几条法令了。

original: ARIA: I'm baffled as to how he even got access to that knowledge in the first place.
translation: ARIA: 我甚至不明白他最初是怎么接触到那些知识的。

original: Right...[p/] [b]Necromancy[/b] sounded like some dark magic—[p/]even by the nobility's standards.
translation: 也是……[p/][b]死灵术[/b]听着就像某类黑魔法——[p/]即使按照贵族的标准也是这样。

original: I'd be terrified to know why [i]anyone[/i] would want to learn that type of magic.
translation: 我实在难以想象，为什么[i]有人[/i]会想学那种魔法。

original: ARIA: The fact that he was the only known student who knew these spells makes him our only suspect. [h="But it’s still too convenient...|Something else is happening..." /]
translation: ARIA: 而他是唯一会使用这些法术的学生这一事实也使得我们认定他就是仅可能的嫌疑人。[h="但还是太巧了……|还有其他的事情正在发生……" /]

original: TYRION: ...!
translation: TYRION: ……！

original: I seldom caught thoughts from Steelwind,[p/] and they usually only appeared when someone brought up her father.
translation: 我很少能捕捉到斯蒂尔文德的想法，[p/]通常只有别人提到她父亲时才有可能。

original: She was usually very composed,[p/] and I still didn't see a hint of that uneasiness in her posture.
translation: 她总是十分镇定，[p/]我从她的仪态中也仍没看到紧张的讯号。

original: Normally,[p/] I could only see thoughts when the target was stressed or excited...
translation: 通常来说，[p/]我只在对象压力大或者兴奋的情况下看见他们的想法……

original: [i]Something[/i] about this case must've been rattling her.
translation: 这个案子里一定[i]有个地方[/i]在困扰着她。

original: TYRION: ...Is there something you’re not telling us, Steelwind?
translation: TYRION: 斯蒂尔文德……你有什么瞒着我们？

original: TYRION: ...
translation: TYRION: ……

original: The Eye couldn't catch any more thoughts from her.
translation: 荷鲁斯之眼看不出她的想法了。

original: Player: Questions for us
translation: Player: 问我们的问题

original: ARIA: Ms. McCoy.[p/] It’s my understanding that you were adopted.
translation: ARIA: 麦考伊女士，[p/]据我所知，你是被收养的。

original: ARIA: Would you happen to know who your biological parents are?
translation: ARIA: 你对自己的亲生父母有什么印象吗？

original: Celeste tensed and shifted uncomfortably.
translation: 塞莱斯特紧张起来，有些不安地挪动身体。

original: TYRION: ...That's kind of personal, isn't it?
translation: TYRION: ……这问题有点太私人了吧？

original: ARIA: You agreed to answer my questions.
translation: ARIA: 你明明答应过我要回答我的问题的。

original: TYRION: I [i]did[/i],[p/] but I didn’t think you meant—
translation: TYRION: 我[i]答应过[/i]，[p/]但我没想到你是要——

original: CELESTE: I-[p/][s/]It’s fine, Tyrion.[p/] It's for Wallace.
translation: CELESTE: 没、[p/][s/]没关系的，提利昂。[p/]都是为了华莱士嘛。

original: She took a breath.[p/] This had always been a sore subject for her.
translation: 她深呼吸了一下，[p/]对她来说这个话题有些心酸。

original: CELESTE: I don’t know who my birth parents are.[p/] I’ve never tried looking for them.
translation: CELESTE: 说实话，我不知道亲生父母是谁，[p/]也从没想过要去找他们。

original: ARIA: ...I see.
translation: ARIA: ……这样啊。

original: ARIA: If I recall correctly,[p/] your [b]Spell Compendium[/b] only contained one spell.
translation: ARIA: 如果我没记错，[p/]你的[b]法术汇编[/b]显示你只会一种法术。

original: ARIA: How did you learn [b]Mage Blade[/b] in the first place?
translation: ARIA: 你当初是怎么学会[b]法术剑刃[/b]的？

original: CELESTE: I bought a scroll from a merchant a few years ago.
translation: CELESTE: 几年前我从一个商人那里买到了一个卷轴。

original: Celeste: It had [b]Mage Blade's[/b] spell formula on it.
translation: Celeste: 面有写[b]法术剑刃[/b]的施展方法。

original: Aria: But surely someone taught you how to cast it.
translation: Aria: 但肯定有什么人教过你怎么施放它。

original: Celeste: No, I'm self-taught.
translation: Celeste: 没有啊，我是自学的。

original: Steelwind's eyes narrowed.[p/] She was being unusually interrogative about this.
translation: 斯蒂尔文德眯起了眼。[p/]她对这件事意外地关注。

original: Aria: ...You can't teach yourself magic, Ms. McCoy.[p/] That's not possible.
translation: Aria: ……麦考伊女士，[p/] 自学魔法是不可能的。

original: Celeste: Well,[p/] [i]I[/i] did.
translation: Celeste: 但是，[p/][i]我[/i]确实就是自学的。

original: Aria: ...Are you sure you're not mistaken?
translation: Aria: ……你真的没记错吗？

original: CELESTE: Hey![p/] I've got a system, okay?
translation: CELESTE: 嘿！[p/]我有自己的一套方法，好吧？

original: Celeste: I even learned a few new spells today.
translation: Celeste: 我今天还学会了几种新的法术呢。

original: Aria: I’m sorry...[p/] “spells”?[p/] As in plural?
translation: Aria: 不好意思……[p/]“几种”？[p/]复数个？

original: Celeste: Yeah![p/] [i]I'd[/i] like to think I'm pretty good at this.
translation: Celeste: 是啊！[p/][i]我想[/i]我应该是挺擅长这个的。

original: Aria: ...How long did it take you to learn these spells?
translation: Aria: ……你学这些新法术用了多久？

original: CELESTE: A few hours, I think.
translation: CELESTE: 几个小时吧，大概。

original: ARIA: ... [h="She taught herself multiple spell formulas|within a few hours?!" /]
translation: ARIA: ... [h="她几小时就学会了好几种新法术？！" /]

original: ARIA: I...[p/] see.
translation: ARIA: 我……[p/]明白了。

original: Aria: I think that’s all I need to ask for now.[p/] Thank you, Ms. McCoy.
translation: Aria: 好吧……[p/]我想问的已经问完了。[p/]谢谢，麦考伊女士。

original: CELESTE: Um...[p/] Okay?
translation: CELESTE: 唔……[p/]好的？

original: Steelwind looked like she was deep in thought.[p/] Why was she so interested in Celeste's magic?
translation: 看上去斯蒂尔文德陷入了沉思。[p/]她为何对塞莱斯特的法术如此感兴趣？

original: Player: The Murder
translation: Player: 谋杀案

original: TYRION: Do you know what happened here, Steelwind?
translation: TYRION: 斯蒂尔文德，这里发生了什么？

original: ARIA: Well,[p/] the City Watch received a call from the academy.
translation: ARIA: 这个嘛……[p/]事情要从城市安保接到来自学院的传讯开始。

original: ARIA: They reported an attack on campus grounds and put the entire building on lockdown.
translation: ARIA: 据报校园内发生了一起袭击，整栋楼都启用了封锁系统。

original: ARIA: The city watch set up a perimeter around the building while they waited for the system to deactivate.
translation: ARIA: 城市安保派人赶到现场并在周围设立警戒线，同时等待封锁解除。

original: TYRION: They had to wait?[p/] Why didn't the academy just deactivate the system manually?
translation: TYRION: 他们为什么要等？[p/]学院方面不能手动解除那个系统吗？

original: ARIA: I’m not sure about the specifics,[p/] but supposedly,[p/] the lockdown can’t be shut down once triggered.[p/] It's a safety mechanism.
translation: ARIA: 我不清楚具体的细节，[p/]但根据推测，[p/]封锁启动后就不能人为解除。[p/]这也是安保措施之一。

original: ARIA: You’ll have to ask one of the academy’s admins if you want to know more.
translation: ARIA: 如果你想知道更多，可能要询问学院方的管理人员。

original: ARIA: From what I've heard,[p/] you two were also present during the lockdown.
translation: ARIA: 就我所听到的，[p/]你们两个封锁期间也在场。

original: ARIA: Did either of you see anything suspicious?
translation: ARIA: 你们有发现什么可疑情况吗？

original: CELESTE: No,[p/] but we actually met the professor that morning.
translation: CELESTE: 好像没有……[p/]但其实我们那天早上见过教授。

original: CELESTE: She was obviously still alive then.
translation: CELESTE: 那时候她还活着。

original: ARIA: I see...[p/] That [i]does[/i] match with the accounts from our other witnesses.
translation: ARIA: 好吧……[p/]这[i]确实[/i]与其他证人的证词吻合。

original: Aria: She must have gone to her meeting with the headmaster afterward.
translation: Aria: 她之后肯定是去与校长会面。

original: Tyrion: She had a meeting with the headmaster?[p/] How long did this go on for?
translation: Tyrion: 她与校长有会面？[p/]这次会面持续了多久？

original: Aria: From 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM—[p/]about an hour before her death.
translation: Aria: 从 12:00 到下午 1:00 ——[p/]也就是她死前的一个月。

original: If the headmaster met with Bellwether,[p/] he might've known where she went after the meeting.
translation: 如果校长确实与贝尔维瑟见了面，[p/]他可能知道教授在之后去了哪里。

original: TYRION: Would you happen to have a map of the academy?
translation: TYRION: 你有学院的地图吗？

original: ARIA: I do.[p/] I'll transfer it to your Runestone.
translation: ARIA: 我有。[p/]我会传到你的符石上。

original: TYRION: There’s only one direct path from the headmaster’s office to this lecture hall.
translation: TYRION: 从校长室到这间讲堂只有一条直达的路线。

original: Why would she even enter the lecture hall in the first place?
translation: 她当时为什么会走进这间讲堂呢？

original: Did she die here,[p/] or was she murdered somewhere else?
translation: 她是死在了这里，[p/]还是先在其他地方被杀害？

original: Rancid Smell
translation: 恶臭

original: CELESTE: Ugh...[p/] That smell is driving me crazy.
translation: CELESTE: 呃啊……[p/]这臭味快把我逼疯了。

original: CELESTE: What [i]is[/i] that?
translation: CELESTE: 为什么教室里这么臭？！

original: ARIA: There was a bit of an accident during an alchemy lecture a few days ago.
translation: ARIA: 几天前这里的炼金术课程出了个小意外。

original: ARIA: The instructor misread the directions for an experiment.
translation: ARIA: 主讲人在实验中读错了步骤。

original: ARIA: As a result,[p/] he accidentally produced this rancid-smelling vapor.
translation: ARIA: 结果就是，[p/]他意外生成了这种恶臭的蒸汽。

original: TYRION: Vapor...?[p/] It’s not toxic, is it?
translation: TYRION: 蒸汽……？[p/]这不会有毒吧？

original: ARIA: I wouldn’t be standing here if it were.
translation: ARIA: 有毒的话我就不会站在这里头了。

original: ARIA: ...It’s just extremely unpleasant to the senses.
translation: ARIA: ……但是确实很摧残嗅觉。

original: Aria: They temporarily closed this lecture hall until they could get rid of the smell.
translation: Aria: 学院在这间讲堂的味道散尽之前都会停用它。

original: Aria: House Steelwind actually...[p/] [i]used[/i] a similar concoction during the Great Luminite War.
translation: Aria: 斯蒂尔文德家实际上……[p/]在大圣战期间[i]使用过[/i]类似的调合物。

original: Celeste: See?[p/] This is why I stick to [b]transmutation[/b] magic.
translation: Celeste: 看到了吧？[p/]这就是我坚持学习[b]形变术[/b]的原因。

original: Aria: Ms. McCoy.[p/] Alchemy is a [i]branch[/i] of [b]transmutation[/b].
translation: Aria: 麦考伊女士。[p/]炼金术就是[b]t形变术[/b]的[i]一个分支[/i]。

original: Celeste: What?!
translation: Celeste: 啊？！

original: Celeste: I could've been making potions this entire time...
translation: Celeste: 我可能一直在制作魔药……

original: How was the body discovered?
translation: 尸体是怎么被发现的？

original: TYRION: How was the body discovered?
translation: TYRION: 尸体是怎么被发现的？

original: ARIA: Two members of the kitchen staff spotted her body inside this classroom.
translation: ARIA: 两个厨房员工发现她倒在这间教室里。

original: ARIA: They reported the situation to the campus admin while they attempted to save her life.
translation: ARIA: 他们把情况报告给了校园的管理方，同时尝试挽救她的性命。

original: ARIA: But it was too late.[p/] The professor had already passed away long before any healers arrived.
translation: ARIA: 但已经来不及了。[p/]在治愈师到场之前教授就已经去世了。

original: TYRION: Those two staff members...[p/] Who were they?
translation: TYRION: 那两个工作人员……[p/]他们是谁？

original: ARIA: Valentina and Valerie Ianus.[p/] They’re sisters.
translation: ARIA: 是瓦伦蒂娜·伊努斯和瓦莱丽·伊努斯。[p/]他们是姐妹。

original: TYRION: How are they holding up?[p/] I imagine they'd be rattled after discovering the body of their coworker.
translation: TYRION: 她们情况如何？[p/]发现自己同事地尸体应该很受惊吓。

original: ARIA: From what Orym said,[p/] they were extremely tense during questioning,[p/] but I suppose that's to be expected.
translation: ARIA: 根据奥蒙的说法，[p/]她们在讯问中非常紧张，[p/]我觉得是合理的。

original: ARIA: He told me that they couldn't sit still.
translation: ARIA: 他告诉我她们根本坐不住。

original: Aria: He found it difficult to take their statements because of that.
translation: Aria: 因此他很难取得她们的有效证词。

original: Tyrion: They "couldn't sit still"?
translation: Tyrion: 她们“坐不住”？

original: ARIA: Well,[p/] he's always making excuses for his incompetence.
translation: ARIA: 这个嘛，[p/]他总是为自己的失职找借口。

original: Why is Wallace a Suspect?
translation: 为什么华莱士有嫌疑？

original: TYRION: We’ve already told the Inquisition this,[p/] but Wallace was with us the entire time.[p/] He has a perfect alibi.
translation: TYRION: 我们已经告诉裁判所的人了，[p/]华莱士一直和我们在一起。[p/]他有完美的不在场证明。

original: ARIA: Strong, maybe,[p/] but his alibi is far from perfect.
translation: ARIA: 或许是“很有力”的，[p/]但他的不在场证明远称不上“完美”。

original: ARIA: Ms. McCoy herself told us that.[p/] There was a small time period when she wasn't with him.
translation: ARIA: 麦考伊女士自己就证明了这一点。[p/]有一小段时间她并未和他在一起。

original: TYRION: ...What?
translation: TYRION: ……什么？

original: CELESTE: Right...[p/] It was after we came to check on you when you knocked over that shelf.
translation: CELESTE: 好吧……[p/]就是在你撞倒那个书架，我过来看你的时候。

original: CELESTE: We got separated,[p/] and I kind of got...[p/] lost in the fiction section.
translation: CELESTE: 我们就分开了，[p/]而我又有点……[p/]在小说区迷了路。

original: Aria: She found an early release copy of [i]Deaths at Daggerfall[/i].[p/] She binge-read it for over an hour.
translation: Aria: 她发现了[i]《血溅匕首雨》[/i]的早期印刷本。[p/]然后一口气读了一个多小时。

original: Celeste: Don't just rat me out to him![p/][s/] He's my boss!
translation: Celeste: 别在他面前揭我的短！[p/][s/]他是我的雇主哎！

original: Aria: Nonsense.[p/] They're well-written books.[p/] No one would fault you for that.
translation: Aria: 胡说。[p/]那书写得挺不错的。[p/]没人会因此怪罪你。

original: I mean—[p/]I [i]might[/i] fault her for that.
translation: 我想——[p/]我[i]可能[/i]要因此怪罪她一下。

original: Celeste: Wait...[p/] You read them too?
translation: Celeste: 等等……[p/]你也读了？

original: Aria: Y-[p/][s/]Yes...[p/] But—
translation: Aria: 是、[p/][s/]是的…….[p/]不过——

original: Celeste: What did you think about the ending of "The Uncrowned"?!
translation: Celeste: 你觉得“无冕之王”的那个结局怎么样？！

original: Tyrion: ...Celeste?
translation: Tyrion: ……塞莱斯特？

original: Aria: I found the cliffhanger to be needlessly unsatisfying.
translation: Aria: 我觉得那个悬念毫无必要，令我不满。

original: Aria: They're stringing the readers along to sell more copies of the sequel.
translation: Aria: 他们只是挑起读者的兴趣，为了卖出更多续作。

original: Celeste: Oh, come on![p/][s/] Anticipation just makes each new book that much more fulfilling.
translation: Celeste: 唉，得了吧！[p/][s/]期待感才让每部新书读起来更令人满足啊。

original: Tyrion: Celeste.
translation: Tyrion: 塞莱斯特。

original: Aria: I eat brunch with the author occasionally.[p/] The fame has clearly gotten to her head.
translation: Aria: 我有次偶然和作者一起吃早午餐。[p/]她显然已经被名气冲昏了头脑。

original: Aria: She's clearly just dragging her feet to raise profits.
translation: Aria: 她显然只是在拖长剧本以提高利润。

original: Celeste: You eat brunch with Altheris Duskweaver?!
translation: Celeste: 你有和阿尔忒莉丝·夕织共进早午餐？！

original: I cleared my throat.
translation: 我清了清喉咙。

original: Tyrion: Everyone![p/] We are [i]all[/i] supposed to be working right now.
translation: Tyrion: 各位！[p/]现在我们[i]所有人[/i]都该好好干活了。

original: Celeste: You're such a killjoy sometimes.
translation: Celeste: 你有时候真的很煞风景。

original: Aria: N-[p/][s/]No...[p/] He's right.[p/] I don't know what got into me.
translation: Aria: 没、[p/][s/]没有……[p/]他说得对。[p/]真不知道自己着了什么魔。

original: Celeste: Well,[p/] after this case is over,[p/] I'm tagging along for brunch with you.
translation: Celeste: 好吧，[p/]这个案子结束后，[p/]我要和你一起吃早午餐。

original: Aria: What...?
translation: Aria: 什么……？

original: Celeste: Hey,[p/] you tried to convict me for murdering my dad.
translation: Celeste: 嘿，[p/]你之前可是想指控我杀了自己的爸爸。

original: Celeste: You owe me, Steelwind.
translation: Celeste: 你欠我的，斯蒂尔文德。

original: Aria: [i]*sigh*[/i][p/] I suppose you have a point.
translation: Aria: [i]*叹气*[/i][p/]也有道理。

original: Aria: Ah,[p/] an Attorney's Runestone.[p/] I have one of these myself.
translation: Aria: 啊，[p/]律师符石。[p/]我也有一个类似的。

original: Tyrion: They're useful, aren't they?[p/] The note-taking and picture functions save so much time during these investigations.
translation: Tyrion: 这个真的很有用啊。[p/]笔记和照相功能在调查中真的给我省了不少时间。

original: Aria: They're really a marvel of artificery.[p/] You'll see a lot of these among the nobility.
translation: Aria: 它们确实是工艺上的奇迹。[p/]你可以在很多贵族身上看到。

original: Tyrion: ...Why would nobles need to store evidence?
translation: Tyrion: ……为什么贵族们要储存证据？

original: Aria: I-[p/][s/]I—
translation: Aria: 这、[p/][s/]这个——

original: Aria: They have other uses, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: Aria: 他们有其他的用途，卡斯伯特先生。

original: Aria: I wasn't expecting to meet you here, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: Aria: 我可没想到会在这里见到你，卡斯伯特先生。

original: Aria: The Imperial Academy isn't exactly open to outsiders.
translation: Aria: 帝国学院不怎么对外人开放。

original: Tyrion: We originally came here to do some research,[p/] but I never expected to get wrapped up in another homicide...
translation: Tyrion: 我们本来是来这里做一些研究的，[p/]没想到又被卷入另一场杀人案……

original: Aria: ...What kind of research were you doing?
translation: Aria: ……你们具体是来做什么研究？

original: Celeste: Don't bother asking.[p/] He won't tell you.
translation: Celeste: 别问了。[p/]他不会告诉你的。

original: Aria: I'm glad to see you under less...[p/] dire circumstances, Ms. McCoy.
translation: Aria: 我很高兴看到你比……[p/]那个时候好一些了，麦考伊女士。

original: Aria: Are you accompanying Mr. Cuthbert on his investigation?
translation: Aria: 你是在协助卡斯伯特先生调查吗？

original: Celeste: Yeah.[p/] I'm working as Tyrion's bodyguard now.
translation: Celeste: 没错。[p/]我现在担任提利昂的护卫。

original: Aria: I see.[p/] Well, you certainly have the credentials for it.
translation: Aria: 明白了。[p/]毕竟，你确实有资格做这个。

original: Aria: Although,[p/] I'm surprised he's able to afford your services.
translation: Aria: 不过，[p/]我挺意外他请得起你。

original: Tyrion: ...What's [i]that[/i] supposed to mean?
translation: Tyrion: ……你这个[i]意外[/i]是什么意思？

original: Aria: I meant no offense,[p/] but work like this [i]does[/i] appear to be below Ms. McCoy's pay grade.
translation: Aria: 我无意冒犯，[p/]但这种工作[i]确实[/i]看起来低于麦考伊女士通常的价位。

original: Celeste: Yeah.[p/] I was surprised, too.[p/] Ruby pays me a lot to protect this guy.
translation: Celeste: 是啊。[p/]我其实也有点惊讶。[p/]但鲁比付了我一大笔钱来保护这家伙。

original: Aria: Ah,[p/] Ruby Tymora is paying you.
translation: Aria: 啊，[p/]所以是鲁比·泰摩拉在支付你的薪酬。

original: Aria: ...I suppose that makes more sense.
translation: Aria: ……那就说得通了。

original: Player: Aria|Orym
Tyrion: I was surprised to see [i]you[/i] conducting the investigation, Steelwind.
translation: Tyrion: 我很意外是[i]你[/i]在主导现场调查，斯蒂尔文德。

original: Tyrion: Why don't you leave things to Commander White?
translation: Tyrion: 为什么不直接交给怀特指挥官呢？

original: Aria: Please.[p/] I can barely trust that oaf to make me coffee.
translation: Aria: 拜托。[p/]我连让那傻大个煮个咖啡都不太放心。

original: Aria: After last time,[p/] I feel much more confident overseeing the investigation myself.
translation: Aria: 上次那件事之后，[p/]我觉得还是自己监督调查更有信心。

original: The Inquisition didn't seem to be helping her at all.
translation: 但裁判所那边看起来完全没有想帮助她。

original: They were just standing guard while [i]she[/i] did all of the work.
translation: 在[i]她[/i]忙前忙后的时候，他们只是站在一边放哨。

original: Player: Foul
Tyrion: Ugh...[p/] This rancid smell is really horrible.
translation: Tyrion: 呃……[p/]这股恶臭也太糟了。

original: Aria: Yes.[p/] I don't blame you for finding it distracting.
translation: Aria: 没错。[p/]我不怪你被这恶臭影响。

original: Celeste: All because of a mistake during an alchemy experiment.
translation: Celeste: 而这都是因为一次炼金实验出了个错。

original: Aria: I was surprised too.[p/] It's not like the headmaster to make a mistake like that.
translation: Aria: 我也很意外。[p/]这不像是那个校长会犯的错误。

original: Celeste: Oh, the headmaster teaches alchemy here?
translation: Celeste: 咦，当时是校长在这里教炼金术？

original: Player: Catherine|Blood|Blood2
Tyrion: As a mage from a noble house,[p/] you must have gone to school here.
translation: Tyrion: 作为一个贵族出身的法师，[p/]你肯定也在这里上过学。

original: Tyrion: Did you know Catherine Bellwether while you were here?
translation: Tyrion: 你还在这里的时候认识凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟吗？

original: Aria: I unfortunately did.[p/] I constantly clashed with her over her treatment of the commoners here.
translation: Aria: 不幸的是我认识。[p/]我经常因为她对待平民的方式和她起冲突。

original: Aria: One of my biggest regrets is failing to remove her from her position before I graduated.
translation: Aria: 我最后悔的事情之一，就是没能在我毕业前解除她的职务。

original: Aria: But she was a friend of House Frega.[p/] There wasn't much I could do against that.
translation: Aria: 但她是弗雷加家的座上宾。[p/]对此我也无能为力。

original: It sounded like [i]many[/i] people didn't get along with the professor...
translation: 听起来[i]许多[/i]人都跟这个教授处得不好……

original: Aria: I would say more,[p/] but it's all in the past,[p/] and I'm not one to speak ill of the dead.
translation: Aria: 我本来还能接着说，[p/]但都是过去的事情了。[p/]说死者的坏话感觉不太好。

original: Player: SteelOrd
Tyrion: Why are you giving us access to the crime scene,[p/] but not the Inquisition?
translation: Tyrion: 你为何同意我们进入案发现场，[p/]而不是裁判所呢？

original: Tyrion: They work under you, don't they?
translation: Tyrion: 他们不是你的手下吗？

original: Aria: ...I simply trust you two.[p/] Are you trying to imply that I shouldn't?
translation: Aria: ……只是因为我相信你们两个。[p/]你是暗示我不该吗？

original: Tyrion: ...
translation: Tyrion: ……

original: Player: Four
Tyrion: Steelwind...[p/] Is it possible that this case involves a Pillar Family other than yours?
translation: Tyrion: 斯蒂尔文德…….[p/]有没有可能除你们家之外的支柱家族参与了这个案件？

original: Aria: ...
translation: Aria: ……

original: Her eyes twitched ever so slightly.
translation: 她的眼角微微抽动了一下。

original: Aria: ...As I said before,[p/] you'll do better than that if you want to bluff me.
translation: Aria: 正如我之前说过的，[p/]如果想跟我虚张声势，那最好趁早打消念头。

original: Player: Default
Tyrion: What do you think about this, Steelwind?
translation: Tyrion: 斯蒂尔文德，你对这个有什么看法吗？

original: Aria: I'm sorry.[p/] But I'm afraid I can't say much about that.
translation: Aria: 抱歉。[p/]但我恐怕没什么能说的。

original: KNIGHT: Hey![p/][s/] Stop right there!
translation: KNIGHT: 嘿！[p/][s/]停在那里别动！

original: As we tried to enter the classroom,[p/] one of the Inquisition knights stepped between us and the door.
translation: 在我们试图进入讲堂时，[p/]一名裁判所的骑士挡在门前。

original: He tried to make himself look bigger,[p/] but I could see him falter when he recognized Celeste.
translation: 他想让自己看起来更威武一些，[p/]但他认出塞莱斯特的时候显然变得犹豫了。

original: TYRION: I’m a defense attorney.[p/] We have a right to investigate the crime scene.
translation: TYRION: 我是辩护律师。[p/]我们有权调查案发现场。

original: KNIGHT: ...Yeah?[p/] From what I’ve heard,[p/] the kid doesn’t [i]have[/i] an attorney yet.
translation: KNIGHT: ……是吗？[p/]按我听到的情况，[p/]那小子还没有[i]找到[/i]律师吧。

original: Right...[p/] I still needed to talk to Wallace about that...
translation: 是的……[p/]我还需要和华莱士谈谈这个问题……

original: I doubted Wallace had another attorney in mind,[p/] but I would have less jurisdiction until he made it official.
translation: 我虽然知道华莱士没有另请辩护律师，[p/]但在他正式委托前，我的调查范围会很受限。

original: ARIA: It’s quite all right.[p/] Let them in.
translation: ARIA: 这没有问题。[p/]让他们进来吧。

original: KNIGHT: L-[p/][s/]Lady Steelwind?!
translation: KNIGHT: 斯、[p/][s/]斯蒂尔文德小姐？！

original: ARIA: What have I told you about calling me that?
translation: ARIA: 我已经多少次强调过称呼问题了？

original: ARIA: While you work under me,[p/] you will address me as "[i]Prosecutor[/i] Steelwind".
translation: ARIA: 在我手下做事的时候，[p/]你要称我为“斯蒂尔文德[i]检察官[/i]”。

original: KNIGHT: Y-[p/][s/]yes, L—[p/][s/] [i]Prosecutor[/i][p/][s/] Steelwind!
translation: KNIGHT: 是、[p/][s/]是！斯、[p/][s/]斯蒂尔文德[p/][s/][i]检察官[/i]！

original: CELESTE: Ugh...[p/] What’s that smell?
translation: CELESTE: 呃…….[p/]这什么味道？

original: As we entered the classroom,[p/] a sour and rancid odor blew over us.
translation: 我们一走进讲堂，[p/]一股酸臭的气味扑鼻而来。

original: My eyes began to tear up.[p/] I had to take a handkerchief from my pocket to cover my nose.
translation: 我禁不住流泪，[p/]只好从口袋里掏出手帕掩住鼻子。

original: ARIA: Don’t worry.[p/] You eventually get used to it.
translation: ARIA: 别担心，[p/]你们会习惯的。

original: TYRION: What are you even doing here, Steelwind?
translation: TYRION: 你在这里干什么，斯蒂尔文德？

original: ARIA: I’m here to coordinate the investigation.
translation: ARIA: 我在这里调度现场调查工作。

original: I looked around the room.[p/] There wasn't a single Inquisition knight to be found.[p/] It was only her.
translation: 我环视房间四周。[p/]根本就没有裁判所的骑士在里面。[p/]只有她一个人。

original: Was she investigating the crime scene by herself?
translation: 她是在独自调查案发现场吗？

original: ARIA: ...Due to the circumstances,[p/] I’ve decided to handle this case personally.
translation: ARIA: ……考虑到当前的状况，[p/]我决定自己来处理这个案件。

original: TYRION: Since we’ve got you here,[p/] could we ask you some questions about what happened?
translation: TYRION:既然我们在这里碰到你了，[p/]能向你问问发生了什么吗？

original: ARIA: ...Can I assume that you're planning to defend this case?
translation: ARIA: ……我能假定你计划为这个案件辩护吗？

original: Aria: That would make you my opponent.[p/] What do I have to gain from helping you?
translation: Aria: 那你就是我的对手了。[p/]帮助你我又能得到什么？

original: TYRION: R-[p/]Right...
translation: Tyrion: 是、[p/]是的……

original: ARIA: However,[p/] I [i]would[/i] be willing to answer your questions...
translation: ARIA: 不管怎样，[p/]我[i]是可以[/i]回答你几个问题……

original: Aria: But only if you answer some of mine as well.
translation: Aria: 但你也必须回答我的问题。

original: Tyrion: Oh...[p/] Okay?
translation: Tyrion: 噢……[p/]那好吧？

original: Did she want to ask us about Wallace's alibi?
translation: 她是想询问华莱士的不在场证明吗？

original: It was time for the trial,[p/] and my heart was thundering against my chest like a drum.
translation: 马上就要开始庭审了，[p/]我的心脏仿佛像打鼓一样砰砰直跳。

original: Luckily,[p/] I'd been reading about some meditative techniques after what happened last time.
translation: 幸运的是，[p/]在上次庭审后我一直在阅读一些关于冥想技巧的书籍。

original: I just needed to take deep breaths and relax.
translation: 我只需要深呼吸几次，放松就行。

original: I breathed in.[p/] I breathed out.[p/] I breathed in—
translation: 我深吸气。[p/]深呼气。[p/]吸气——

original: CELESTE: Hi, Tyrion.
translation: CELESTE: 嗨，提利昂。

original: TYRION: Gah![p/][s/] Celeste?!
translation: TYRION: 嘎！[p/][s/]塞莱斯特？！

original: TYRION: D-[p/][s/]Don’t sneak up on me like that!
translation: TYRION: 不、[p/][s/]不要这样偷袭我啊！

original: CELESTE: ...Are your nerves acting up again?
translation: CELESTE: ……你又神经紧张啦？

original: CELESTE: Come on.[p/] It’s not as if this is your first time defending someone.
translation: CELESTE: 拜托。[p/]这又不是你第一次为别人辩护了。

original: TYRION: No,[p/] it's just my [i]second[/i] time!
translation: TYRION: 不，[p/]这还只是[i]第二次[/i]啊！

original: CELESTE: Ugh...[p/] It’s too bad Ruby couldn’t make it.
translation: CELESTE: 呃……[p/]鲁比没能来真是太糟了。

original: CELESTE: I’d [i]say[/i] that you should calm down for Wallace’s sake,[p/] but...
translation: CELESTE: 我[i]本来想说[/i]为了华莱士你也应该冷静下来，[p/]但是……

original: WALLACE: There are so many people here!
translation: WALLACE: 这里人好多！

original: WALLACE: A-[p/][s/]And they're all looking at me!
translation: WALLACE: 而、[p/][s/]而且他们都盯着我看！

original: WALLACE: Their eyes are prying into me like a pack of flesh-eating maggots!
translation: WALLACE: 他们的眼神像一群食肉蛆虫一样黏在我身上！

original: CELESTE: ...Ew.
translation: CELESTE: ……呕。

original: I needed to calm down...[p/] I was just making Wallace more nervous.
translation: 我得冷静下来……[p/]要不然只是让华莱士更紧张。

original: Tyrion: Um...[p/] Uh...
translation: Tyrion: 呃……[p/]那个……

original: TYRION: ...D-[p/][s/]Don’t worry, Wallace![p/] Our investigation revealed a lot of weaknesses in the prosecution’s case.
translation: TYRION: ……别、[p/][s/]别担心，华莱士！[p/]我们的调查揭露了检方立证中的很多问题。

original: TYRION: We have a strong case for your acquittal.
translation: TYRION: 我们有强力的理由证明你无罪。

original: WALLACE: O-[p/]Okay.
translation: WALLACE: 好、[p/]好吧。

original: Actually,[p/] that [i]was[/i] true.[p/] I really had nothing to worry about.
translation: 实际上，[p/][i]确实[/i]如此。[p/]我其实没什么好担心的。

original: CELESTE: See?[p/] You can be confident when you want to be.
translation: CELESTE: 看吧？[p/]只要你想的话还是能表现得自信嘛。

original: JUDGE: Court is now in session for the trial of Wallace Nightgrave.
translation: JUDGE: 法庭现在开庭，审理华莱士·奈特格雷夫案。

original: AriaC: The prosecution is ready, Your Honor.
translation: AriaC: 检方已准备就绪，法官阁下。

original: TYRION: The defense is also ready.
translation: Tyrion: 辩方也准备完毕。

original: JUDGE: Very well.[p/] Prosecutor Steelwind,[p/] could you please list the charges?
translation: JUDGE: 很好。[p/]检察官斯蒂尔文德，[p/]能请你列出指控吗？

original: AriaC: Mr. Nightgrave is a second-year student at the Wyverngarde Imperial Academy.
translation: ARIA: 奈特格雷夫先生是维文加德帝国学院的二年级学生。

original: AriaC: He is charged with first-degree murder,[p/] negligent misuse of the Arcane Arts,[p/] and illegal practice of advanced [b]necromancy[/b].
translation: AriaC: 他被指控为一等谋杀罪，[p/]过失使用奥术魔术，[p/]以及非法练习高阶[b]死灵术[/b]。

original: JUDGE: [b]"N-[p/][s/]Necromancy"[/b]?!
translation: JUDGE: [b]“死、[p/][s/]死灵术”[/b]？！

original: JUDGE: Do you mean to tell me that the defendant is a necromancer?!
translation: JUDGE: 你是想说被告是一个死灵法师？！

original: Gallery: I can’t believe it!
translation: Gallery: 难以置信！

original: Gallery: A [i]necromancer[/i]?[p/] In [i]this[/i] day and age?
translation: Gallery: 一个[i]死灵法师[/i]？在[i]今时今日[/i]？

original: Gallery: How could the kingdom allow this to happen?!
translation: Gallery: 王国怎么允许这种事情发生？！

original: TYRION: Your Honor![p/][s/] I would like to remind the court that they are obligated to judge my client objectively.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下！[p/][s/]我要提醒法庭各位，他们应该客观地评判我的委托人！

original: JUDGE: O-[p/][s/]Of course...![p/] But one can easily see it from the list of charges.
translation: JUDGE: 确、[p/][s/]确实……！但任何人都能从指控清单发现这一点。

original: JUDGE: [b]Necromancy[/b] plays a large role in the charges.
translation: JUDGE: [b]死灵术[/b]在这些指控中占有很重要的地位。

original: AriaC: Indeed.[p/] The crime occurred within the academy this morning.
translation: AriaC: 确实如此。[p/]本次犯罪在今天早晨发生于学院内。

original: AriaC: The victim is Catherine Bellwether:[p/] a professor at the school.
translation: AriaC: 被害人是凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟：[p/]学院的一位教授。

original: AriaC: Although there were no witnesses to the crime,[p/] traces of [b]necromancy[/b] were detected on the body.
translation: AriaC: 尽管当时没有人目击到行凶的经过，[p/]但尸体上探测出了[b]死灵术[/b]魔法的痕迹。

original: AriaC: Furthermore,[p/] the autopsy report shows that the body has no physical wounds.
translation: AriaC: 此外，[p/]尸检报告也显示尸体上没有任何皮外伤。

original: AriaC: [b]Necromancy[/b] is the only type of magic that can harm an individual without physically wounding them.
translation: AriaC: [b]死灵术[/b]是唯一一种可以不造成外伤的前提下，对个体产生伤害的魔法类别。

original: AriaC: Additionally,[p/] an alchemist report shows no signs of poison or disease.
translation: AriaC: 另外，[p/]炼金术师的报告也显示没有中毒或疾病的迹象。

original: AriaC: One could only conclude that a necromancer had committed the crime.
translation: AriaC: 这只能得出一个结论，即一名死灵法师实施了本次犯罪。

original: Judge: I see.
translation: Judge: 我明白了。

original: AriaC: As many of you know,[p/] the practice of advanced [b]necromancy[/b] is outlawed in the Kingdom of Wyverngarde.
translation: AriaC: 正如你们大多数人所知，[p/]学习高阶[b]死灵术[/b]在维文加德王国违反法律。

original: AriaC: Aside from the defendant,[p/] no other students had learned advanced necrotic magic.
translation: AriaC: 除被告之外，[p/]没有其他学生学习过高阶死灵魔法。

original: AriaC: As such,[p/] the defendant was the only mage in that building capable of committing the murder.
translation: AriaC: 这样的话，[p/]被告就是当时那栋建筑里唯一可以犯案法师。

original: JUDGE: I see.[p/] That is certainly compelling evidence.
translation: JUDGE: 明白了。[p/]这无疑是令人信服的证据。

original: AriaC: To properly present our case,[p/] the prosecution would like to call Commander Orym White to the stand.
translation: AriaC: 为准确陈述案情，[p/]检方希望传唤指挥官奥蒙·怀特出庭作证。

original: AriaC: Commander White,[p/] please testify to the court about the Inquisition’s findings.
translation: AriaC: 怀特指挥官，[p/]请向法庭就裁判所的发现作证。

original: ORYM: Yeah, yeah...
translation: Orym: 是，是……

original: Orym: It started when the city watch got a call from the Imperial Academy.[p/] Someone was attacked,[p/] and the whole building was put on lockdown.
translation: Orym: 事情从城市安保接到帝国学院的传讯开始说起。[p/]有人受到了攻击，[p/]然后整栋楼都被封锁了。

original: Orym: We set up a perimeter around the area and waited for the lockdown system to deactivate.
translation: Orym: 我们在区域周围设立了警戒线，等待封锁系统解除。

original: Orym: When we finally got into the building,[p/] the prosecutor personally inspected the body and detected traces of [b]necromancy[/b] on it.
translation: Orym: 当我们终于能进入大楼时，[p/]检察官本人检查了尸体，并探测到上面有[b]死灵术[/b]魔法的痕迹。

original: Orym: There were no cuts or bruises on the body either.[p/] The entire body was clean.
translation: Orym: 尸体上也没有创口或者瘀伤。[p/]尸体全身都非常干净。

original: Orym: With those two pieces of evidence,[p/] we concluded that it could only be the necromancer kid that did it.
translation: Orym: 依据这两个证据，[p/]我们只能认为是那个死灵法师小子干的。

original: The Inquisition’s testimony was just as I'd expected.
translation: 裁判所的证词与我预料的一致。

original: I'd already found and identified the holes in Steelwind’s case.
translation: 但我已经发现并确定了斯蒂尔文德立证中的漏洞。

original: All I had to do was find that hole in the commander’s testimony.
translation: 我只需要找到指挥官证词里的漏洞就行。

original: JUDGE: Mr. Cuthbert.[p/] You may begin your cross-examination.
translation: JUDGE: 卡斯伯特先生，[p/]你可以开始交叉询问了。

original: Orym: It started when the city watch got a call from the Imperial Academy.[p/] Someone was attacked,[p/] and the whole building was put in lockdown.
translation: Orym: 事情从城市安保接到帝国学院的传讯开始说起。[p/]有人受到了攻击，[p/]然后整栋楼都被封锁了。

original: TYRION: What time did this call come in?
translation: TYRION: 报案传讯具体是什么时间发来的？

original: Orym: A little after 3:00 PM.
translation: Orym: 下午 3:00 过一点点。

original: Orym: It was a few minutes after the murder was discovered.
translation: Orym: 那是谋杀事件被发现后几分钟。

original: Right...[p/] I remember that was around the time the lockdown occurred.
translation: 没错……[p/]我记得就是那个时候发生了封锁。

original: The lockdown couldn't be ended manually,[p/] so they must have been forced to wait for an hour until it was lifted.
translation: 封锁系统无法人为中止，[p/]因此他们只能被迫等待它一小时后自行结束。

original: TYRION: How secure was this perimeter?
translation: TYRION: 当时警戒程度如何？

original: TYRION: Is it possible that someone slipped past you?
translation: TYRION: 有可能被人偷偷溜出去吗？

original: AriaC: The Inquisition was working in conjunction with the City Watch [i]and[/i] the Kingsguard.
translation: AriaC: 此案被高度重视，当时由裁判所、城市安保[i]以及[/i]国王卫队协作封锁相关地区。

original: AriaC: With that many soldiers at the scene,[p/] it’s very unlikely that [i]anyone[/i] escaped unnoticed.
translation: AriaC: 有这么多士兵参与，[p/][i]什么人[/i]都不太可能溜出去。

original: That made sense.
translation: 有道理。

original: For better or for worse,[p/] the kingdom must have acted quickly to protect a building filled with the children of every noble family.
translation: 不管怎样，[p/]王国对保护这么多贵族子弟所在的建筑肯定是动作迅速。

original: TYRION: Why did the prosecutor inspect the body instead of the Inquisition?
translation: TYRION: 为什么是检察官检查尸体而不是裁判所？

original: ORYM: ...Well—
translation: ORYM: ……这个嘛——

original: AriaC: How I chose to lead the investigation is irrelevant to the proceedings.
translation: AriaC: 我对现场调查方针的选择与庭审程序无关。

original: AriaC: ...Or would you like to insinuate that [i]I’m[/i] not as competent as Commander White?
translation: AriaC: ……还是说你打算暗示[i]我[/i]的能力不如怀特指挥官？

original: Tyrion: It's not a question of your competency, Steelwind.
translation: Tyrion: 这不是对你称职度的疑问，斯蒂尔文德。

original: Tyrion: I just find your actions to be bizarre,[p/] given how you usually work.
translation: Tyrion: 我只是觉得你的行为很奇怪，[p/]特别是与你通常的做法相比。

original: JUDGE: While the court admits that the prosecutor’s actions are unorthodox,[p/] we find the presence of a necromancer to be an unorthodox situation.
translation: JUDGE: 尽管本庭承认检察官的行为不合常规，[p/]但我们认为一个死灵术士参与其中同样很不寻常。

original: Judge: I see no reason to question the prosecutor's actions.
translation: Judge: 本庭认为没有质疑检察官行为的理由。

original: AriaC: Thank you, Your Honor.
translation: AriaC: 感谢您，法官阁下。

original: TYRION: How carefully was the body checked?
translation: TYRION: 尸体检查的有多彻底？

original: TYRION: Perhaps the prosecution missed something like a small puncture wound.
translation: TYRION: 检察官有可能遗漏了什么。

original: AriaC: The coroner couldn’t find even the smallest cut,[p/] bruise,[p/] or fracture on the body.
translation: AriaC: 验尸官没在尸体上找到任何伤口、[p/]淤青或骨裂。

original: AriaC: Furthermore,[p/] the alchemist’s report showed no signs of poison or disease.
translation: AriaC: 另外，[p/]炼金术师的报告也显示没有中毒或疾病的迹象。

original: AriaC: The [b]necromancy[/b] spell had obfuscated the postmortem divination.
translation: AriaC: [b]死灵术[/b]扰乱了占卜术在尸检中的结果。

original: AriaC: I spared no expense to verify the cause of death through other means.
translation: AriaC: 我用了一切可能的其他途径验证死因。

original: That made sense.[p/] If someone had used [b]Mend Wounds[/b] on the body,[p/] it would have healed even the most minor of injuries.
translation: 嗯……[p/]如果某人对尸体用过[b]疗愈术[/b]的话，[p/]那无论多么细小的伤口都会痊愈。

original: So,[p/] how do I prove that someone healed the body?
translation: 所以，[p/]我该怎么证明是有人对尸体施放过治愈法术呢？

original: TYRION: And the prosecution believes that my client used [b]Necrotic Blight[/b]?
translation: TYRION: 检方认为我的委托人使用了[b]索命咒[/b]？

original: ORYM: Yep.[p/] It’s the only way that the crime scene makes any sense.
translation: ORYM: 对，[p/]只有这样才说得通。

original: JUDGE: “[b]Necrotic Blight[/b]”?
translation: JUDGE: “[b]索命咒[/b]”？

original: JUDGE: I’m afraid I’ve never heard of this spell before.
translation: JUDGE: 我之前从未听说过这种法术。

original: AriaC: [b]Necrotic Blight[/b] is a spell that drains the life force from its target.
translation: AriaC: [b]索命咒[/b]是种能够抽干目标生命力的法术。

original: AriaC: When used on a living human,[p/] it makes their bodily functions cease.
translation: AriaC: 用于活人的时候，[p/]目标会身体机能停止。

original: AriaC: Their body dies soon after.
translation: AriaC: 然后马上死去。

original: JUDGE: I-[p/]I see...
translation: JUDGE: 我、[p/]我明白了……

original: Gallery: What a horrible spell!
translation: Gallery: 这种法术真令人毛骨悚然！

original: Gallery: That commoner should have never been allowed to learn something like that!
translation: Gallery: 是谁允许那种平民学习这种禁术的？！

original: Gallery: I'd thought there would be more protection against [i]children[/i] learning this!
translation: Gallery: 我还以为至少有法律保护[i]小孩子[/i]远离这种禁术的！

original: Wallace's Spell Compendium really wasn't doing him any favours.
translation: 华莱士的法术汇编真的没帮上他的忙。

original: ...There really is a large stigma against necromancers, isn't there?
translation: ……人们对死灵法师的偏见还真是很大。

original: Player: Overflow
CELESTE: We already collected a lot of evidence after investigating the crime scene.
translation: CELESTE: 我们在调查案发现场后已经搜集了大量证据。

original: CELESTE: We already know that the Inquisition’s theory contradicts one of the clues that we found.
translation: CELESTE: 我们也知道裁判所的推论与我们所知的某条证据矛盾。

original: TYRION: Right.[p/] All I have to do is present that contradiction to the court.
translation: TYRION: 嗯，[p/]我只需要向法庭指出这个矛盾就可以了。

original: Player: Objection
Tyrion: Your Honor![p/][s/] It's clear that the witness's testimony is contradictory!
translation: Tyrion: 法官阁下！[p/][s/]证人的证言明显存在矛盾！

original: Tyrion: And this piece of evidence proves it!
translation: Tyrion: 而这件证据证明了这点！

original: Judge: I fail to see how that proves anything, Mr. Cuthbert...
translation: Judge: 卡斯伯特先生……我没看出来这两者有什么关系。

original: Tyrion: O-[p/][s/]Oh...[p/] I guess you're right.
translation: Tyrion: 噢、[p/][s/]哦……[p/]我想您说得对。

original: TYRION: Commander White.[p/] It appears that you’ve neglected to mention one key detail of the crime scene.
translation: TYRION: 怀特指挥官，[p/]你似乎忽略了一个至关重要的细节。

original: ORYM: Yeah?[p/] And what’s that?
translation: ORYM: 哈？[p/]是什么？

original: TYRION: During your testimony,[p/] you said that the entire body was clean.
translation: TYRION: 你在证言中提到，[p/]“尸体非常干净”。

original: TYRION: I [i]will[/i] admit that there weren’t any wounds on the body...
translation: TYRION: 我承认尸体上没有任何伤口……

original: TYRION: However,[p/][s/] the body was certainly not clean!
translation: TYRION: 但尸体可一点都不干净！

original: AriaC: ...
translation: AriaC: ……

original: TYRION: At the scene of the crime,[p/] there was a large pool of blood located where the body was.
translation: TYRION: 尸体所在位置有一大滩血迹。

original: TYRION: This blood had to have come from the victim’s body,[p/][s/] and it was certainly not clean like the commander testified!
translation: TYRION: 这血迹只能来自死者本人，[p/][s/]与指挥官的证言明显不符！

original: JUDGE: I’m sorry, Mr. Cuthbert,[p/] but I fail to see the significance of this.
translation: JUDGE: 抱歉，卡斯伯特先生。[p/]但我没看出这哪里重要。

original: TYRION: I’d like to remind the court of the prosecution’s case against my client.
translation: TYRION: 我向法庭重申检方起诉我的委托人的关键理由。

original: TYRION: They are accusing him of murdering the victim using [b]Necrotic Blight[/b]:[p/] a spell which would [i]not[/i] have physically wounded the victim.
translation: TYRION: 被告被起诉的根据是，[b]索命咒[/b]这法术有其特殊性，[p/]即杀害目标时[i]不会[/i]造成任何外伤。

original: TYRION: So why was there any blood at all?
translation: TYRION: 那为什么会有死者的血迹？

original: AriaC: Let’s not get ahead of ourselves.
translation: AriaC: 你的思维太跳跃了。

original: AriaC: The fact still stands.[p/] There were no wounds on the body,[p/] nor were there any reports of poison or disease on the autopsy.
translation: AriaC: 事实仍是如此，[p/]尸体上没有任何伤口，[p/]也没有中毒或疾病的迹象。

original: AriaC: There are clearly magical elements in this case.
translation: AriaC: 而这起案件显然有魔法的影响。

original: TYRION: But Catherine Bellwether [i]was[/i] bleeding profusely at some point!
translation: TYRION: 但凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟在死前某段时间[i]曾经[/i]大量出血！

original: TYRION: How else would there be a bloodstain on the body?
translation: TYRION: 不然尸体处怎么可能会留下血迹？

original: TYRION: Do you have an explanation for that, Ms. Steelwind?!
translation: TYRION: 对此你能作出解释吗？斯蒂尔文德检察官！

original: AriaC: ...No.[p/] I'll admit that the prosecution doesn't have an explanation for that.
translation: AriaC: ……不能。[p/]我承认检方对此确实无法解释。

original: AriaC: And while I do find the circumstances questionable,[p/] all other evidence clearly points to the defendant.
translation: AriaC: 我也认为这点很可疑，[p/]但其他所有证据都指向被告。

original: AriaC: So tell me, Mr. Cuthbert,[p/] if the victim wasn’t killed with [b]necromancy[/b],[p/] why was there a trace of it on the body?
translation: AriaC: 那你来告诉我，卡斯伯特先生。[p/]如果死者不是死于[b]死灵术[/b]，[p/]那尸体上为何会有相关的魔法痕迹？

original: TYRION: I’m glad you asked.
translation: TYRION: 你主动帮我提出来真是太好了。

original: TYRION: I’d like to present a spell that could have left a trace of [b]necromancy[/b] on the body!
translation: TYRION: 我申请向法庭出示另一种能在身体上留下[b]死灵术[/b]痕迹的法术！

original: Mend Wounds
translation: 疗愈术

original: Necrotic Blight
translation: 索命咒

original: Tyrion: [b]Necrotic Blight[/b]!
translation: Tyrion: 是[b]索命咒[/b]！

original: Judge: ...
translation: Judge: ……

original: Celeste: Um...[p/] Tyrion?
translation: Celeste: 唔……[p/]提利昂？

original: Celeste: We're supposed to prove that the trace [i]wasn't[/i] left by [b]Necrotic Blight[/b].
translation: Celeste: 我们要证明的是魔法痕迹[i]不是[/i]被[b]索命咒[/b]留下的。

original: AriaC: Your honor,[p/] it appears that the defense is admitting defeat.
translation: AriaC: 法官阁下，[p/]看起来辩方已然自承其败。

original: AriaC: [b]Necrotic Blight[/b] is the only spell that would have left that trace.
translation: AriaC: [b]索命咒[/b]是唯一能留下那种痕迹的法术。

original: Tyrion: W-[p/]Wait...[p/][s/] That was a mistake!
translation: Tyrion: 等、[p/]等下……[p/][s/]我搞错了！

original: Tyrion: I meant to present a [i]different[/i] spell.
translation: Tyrion: 我本来想出示[i]另一个[/i]法术的。

original: Judge: Um...[p/] What is this?
translation: Judge: 嗯……[p/]这是什么？

original: Tyrion: [i]This[/i] is what left the trace of [b]necromancy[/b] at the crime scene.
translation: Tyrion: [i]这[/i]就是能在现场留下[b]死灵术[/b]痕迹的东西！

original: AriaC: I fail to see how [i]that[/i] could leave a trace of [b]necromancy[/b].
translation: AriaC: 我可看不出来[i]那个法术[/i]怎么能留下[b]死灵术[/b]的痕迹。

original: Tyrion: O-[p/]Oh,[p/] I guess you're right.
translation: Tyrion: 啊、[p/]哦……[p/]好像是这样的。

original: Tyrion: [i]However[/i],[p/][s/] [i]that's[/i] not the spell I was speaking of!
translation: Tyrion: [i]话说回来[/i]，[p/][s/]我要说的不是[i]这个[/i]法术！

original: JUDGE: [b]Mend Wounds[/b]?
translation: JUDGE: [b]疗愈术[/b]？

original: JUDGE: Correct me if I’m wrong,[p/] but isn’t that a healing spell?
translation: JUDGE: 那不是个治愈法术吗？

original: TYRION: That’s correct, Your Honor.
translation: TYRION: 没错，法官阁下。

original: TYRION: Spells from the school of [b]necromancy[/b] can control the forces of death [i]and[/i] life!
translation: TYRION: [b]死灵术[/b]能够控制生死之力！

original: TYRION: [b]Mend Wounds[/b] is, in fact, a [b]necromancy[/b] spell!
translation: TYRION: 实际上，[b]疗愈术[/b]也是[b]死灵术[/b]的一种！

original: JUDGE: Really, now?[p/] I wasn't aware of this...
translation: JUDGE: 真的吗？[p/]这我确实不清楚……

original: TYRION: [i]Now[/i] I’d like the court to consider the following...
translation: TYRION: 我[i]现在[/i]向法庭提出以下可能性……

original: TYRION: What would happen if Bellwether was wounded,[p/] and someone attempted to heal her using [b]Mend Wounds[/b]?
translation: TYRION: 如果贝尔维瑟身受重伤，[p/]有人试着用[b]疗愈术[/b]治愈她的伤口会怎样？

original: TYRION: All of her wounds would disappear from her body!
translation: TYRION: 她身体上的所有外伤都会消失！

original: JUDGE: I see...[p/] That [i]does[/i] make sense!
translation: Judge: 我明白了……[p/]这[i]确实[/i]说得通！

original: AriaC: ...Do you think I'm that incompetent, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生……你真觉得我那么无能吗？

original: AriaC: Frankly,[p/] I'm a little insulted.
translation: AriaC: 老实说，[p/]我觉得有点被冒犯到。

original: AriaC: The Inquisition is well aware of what happens when a mage attempts to save a victim using [b]Mend Wounds[/b].
translation: Aria: 裁判所当然也早就注意到这种可能性。

original: AriaC: The healers that arrived at the scene already confirmed that the victim was long dead.
translation: Aria: 治愈师到现场的时候就立刻确认，受害者已经死亡多时。

original: AriaC: None of them attempted to heal her.
translation: AriaC: 没有人尝试过疗愈她。

original: Tyrion: ...Well,[p/] what if someone tried to heal her and didn't report it?
translation: Tyrion: ……那，[p/]如果有人偷偷治疗过她还向裁判所隐瞒事实呢？

original: AriaC: Please.[p/] None of the healers would have anything to gain by doing so.
translation: Aria: 得了吧，[p/]那么做有什么好处？

original: AriaC: In fact,[p/] as a necromancer,[p/] the defendant could have easily carried out the described scenario.
translation: AriaC: 实际上，[p/]作为死灵法师，[p/]被告可以很轻松的实施以下计划。

original: AriaC: He could have cast [b]Mend Wounds[/b] on the victim after murdering her to confound the investigation!
translation: AriaC: 他可以先杀掉受害者，再对其释放[b]疗愈术[/b]来混淆调查。

original: At the end of the day,[p/] the burden of proof was on us.
translation: 在今日的结尾，[p/]立证的压力来到了我们这边。

original: But if I could prove someone else healed the body,[p/] I would sever the only thread linking Wallace to the murder.
translation: 但只要我证明有他人对尸体施放过疗愈术，[p/]我就能切断唯一将华莱士与真凶相联系的线索。

original: Whoever this healer was...[p/] Valentina definitely knew her.
translation: 不论那个人是谁……[p/]瓦伦蒂娜肯定认识。

original: TYRION: Your Honor.[p/] I will admit that I don’t have any evidence to support my theory.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下。[p/]我承认目前没有足够的证据来支撑我的理论。

original: TYRION: However,[p/] I [i]do[/i] believe that we can bring it to light.
translation: TYRION: 但是，[p/]我有自信[i]能够[/i]证明我的猜想。

original: TYRION: There may have been [i]two[/i] people that witnessed someone cast magic on the body.
translation: TYRION: 有[i]两位[/i]目击证人看到了有人在对尸体施法。

original: TYRION: Valentina and Valerie Ianus:[p/][s/] the sisters who discovered the body.
translation: TYRION: 瓦伦蒂娜·伊努斯和瓦莱丽·伊努斯[p/][s/]——发现尸体的一对姐妹。

original: AriaC: ...This is nonsense.[p/] We’ve already questioned those two witnesses extensively.
translation: AriaC: ……这没道理，[p/]我们已经严格审讯过这两位目击证人了。

original: AriaC: If they [i]had[/i] witnessed something like that,[p/] it would have come up in their testimony.
translation: AriaC: 如果[i]真的[/i]看到了什么，[p/]她们会在审讯时告诉我们的。

original: TYRION: If that’s true,[p/] then the courts have nothing to lose by hearing their testimonies.
translation: TYRION: 如果真如你所说，[p/]那么法庭现在再听一遍她们的证词也未尝不可。

original: AriaC: Very well.[p/] If you’re so confident,[p/] let’s hear her testimony.
translation: AriaC: 好吧，[p/]既然你如此胸有成竹，[p/]那就让我们听听她们的证言。

original: JUDGE: It seems the prosecution has no objections.
translation: JUDGE: 看来检方没有异议。

original: JUDGE: If this line of questioning leads nowhere, however,[p/] I see no reason to further prolong this trial.
translation: JUDGE: 不过……[p/]如果此次传唤没能提供有价值的线索，[p/]我认为此案的审理就可以在此结束了。

original: TYRION: ...Of course, Your Honor.
translation: TYRION: ……当然，法官阁下。

original: VALENTINA: ...! [h="Oh, crap!|It’s that guy from before!" e="f" /]
translation: VALENTINA: ……！[h="糟了！是之前那个难办的家伙！" e="f" /]

original: VALENTINA: ... [h="What?!|He's the necromancer’s lawyer?!" e="f" /]
translation: VALENTINA: …… [h="什么？！|他是那个死灵法师的律师？！" e="f" /]

original: She just arrived at the stand,[p/] and she was already stressed out.
translation: 她一站上证人席，[p/]就显得非常紧张。

original: That would work in my favor.
translation: 这帮得上我的忙。

original: AriaC: Witness,[p/] please state your name and occupation for the court.
translation: AriaC: 证人，[p/]请向法庭告知你的姓名与职业。

original: VALENTINA: U-[p/]Um...[p/] My name?
translation: VALENTINA: 啊、[p/]唔……[p/]我的姓名？

original: AriaC: Witness,[p/] there’s no need to be so nervous.
translation: AriaC: 证人，[p/]你无需这么紧张。

original: AriaC: We merely want to hear about what you saw on the day of the murder.
translation: AriaC: 我们只是想听你说一说凶杀案当天发生了什么。

original: VALENTINA: R-[p/]Right.[p/] I-[p/]it’s just that guy over there.[p/] He...
translation: VALENTINA: 啊、[p/]啊哈哈……[p/]我知道了，[p/]就是那边那个家伙让我有点……

original: AriaC: Are you talking about Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 你是指卡斯伯特先生？

original: AriaC: ...Did this man harass you, witness?
translation: AriaC: ……证人，这个男人有骚扰你吗？

original: TYRION: W-[p/]Wait a minute...
translation: TYRION: 等、[p/]等下……

original: VALENTINA: U-[p/][s/]Um...[p/][s/] Yeah!
translation: VALENTINA: 唔、[p/][s/]唔……[p/][s/]对！

original: VALENTINA: He [i]super[/i] harassed me!
translation: VALENTINA: 他[i]严重地[/i]骚扰了我！

original: JUDGE: Mr. Cuthbert, I would expect someone of your profession to behave more professionally.
translation: JUDGE: 卡斯伯特先生，我希望以你的身份，行为应当更具专业素养一些。

original: I could hear Celeste snickering under her breath.
translation: 我都能听见塞莱斯特低声窃笑。

original: TYRION: You're enjoying this far too much...
translation: TYRION:你对此表现得太开心了吧……

original: TYRION: A-[p/]Anyways,[p/] please state your name and occupation for the court, Ms. Ianus.
translation: TYRION: 总、[p/]总之，[p/]请向法庭陈述你的姓名和职业，伊努斯女士。

original: VALENTINA: ... [h="Just calm down.|He can’t prove anything." e="f"/]
translation: VALENTINA: ... [h="冷静，冷静。|他什么都证明不了的。" e="f"/]

original: VALENTINA: ...My name is Valentina Ianus.
translation: VALENTINA: ……我叫瓦伦蒂娜·伊努斯。

original: VALENTINA: I'm the head chef at the Wyverngarde Imperial Academy.
translation: VALENTINA: 我是维文加德帝国大学院的主厨。

original: Judge: Really?[p/] And at such a young age.
translation: Judge: 真的吗？[p/]年纪轻轻就已经是主厨了。

original: AriaC: As I recall,[p/] you were one of the witnesses who discovered the body.
translation: AriaC: 我没记错的话，[p/]你是发现尸体的其中一人。

original: AriaC: Apparently,[p/] the defense finds your involvement suspect.
translation: AriaC: 目前来看，[p/]辩方认为你的行为有可疑之处。

original: VALENTINA: ...
translation: VALENTINA: ……

original: AriaC: Rest assured, Ms. Ianus.
translation: AriaC: 请放松，伊努斯女士。

original: AriaC: In this courtroom,[p/] you will be protected from Mr. Cuthbert’s “harassment”.
translation: AriaC: 在这间法庭里，[p/]你无需担心卡斯伯特先生的……“骚扰”。

original: TYRION: Ugh...
translation: Tyrion: 唉……

original: AriaC: Now,[p/] please testify to the court on what happened that day.
translation: AriaC: 现在，[p/]请就当天发生的事情向法庭作证。

original: VALENTINA: Y-[p/]Yeah...
translation: VALENTINA: 好、[p/]好的……

original: Valentina: I was walking with my sister in the west wing when we noticed something in a nearby classroom.
translation: Valentina: 我当时正和我妹妹在校园西侧散步，突然看到附近的教室里有什么东西。

original: Valentina: We looked over to see what it was.[p/][s/] That's when we saw Ms. Bellwether bleeding on the ground!
translation: Valentina: 我们好奇心作祟，靠近去看到底是什么，[p/][s/]结果竟然是贝尔维瑟教授躺在血泊之中！

original: Valentina: My sister tried her best to help her,[p/] but the professor had already lost a lot of blood...
translation: Valentina: 我妹妹尽全力救助她，[p/]但教授已经失血过多……

original: Valentina: While my sister did that,[p/] I used an emergency communication device to call for help.
translation: Valentina: 与此同时，[p/]我使用学院里的紧急通讯装置来求助。

original: Valentina: But it was too late.[p/] By the time her bleeding stopped,[p/] she’d already lost too much blood...
translation: Valentina: 但已经太迟了，[p/]止住血的时候，[p/]她已经失血太多了……

original: CELESTE: Hm...[p/] If your theory is true,[p/] that means she just lied in her testimony.
translation: CELESTE: 嗯……[p/]假设你的推测正确，[p/]那她就在证言中撒了谎。

original: CELESTE: She’s holding something back.
translation: CELESTE: 她还隐藏了某些事实。

original: TYRION: She definitely saw more than she’s letting on.
translation: TYRION: 她肯定还看到了还没说出来的东西。

original: I just needed to prove that somehow...
translation: 我只是得通过某个方式证明它……

original: TYRION: Where were you two coming from?
translation: TYRION: 当时你们是从哪里来的？

original: VALENTINA: We came from the kitchen.
translation: VALENTINA: 我们是从厨房那边过来的。

original: VALENTINA: We were taking a break after the lunch rush.
translation: VALENTINA: 午餐的供餐高峰期过后，我们想着去休息一下。

original: The cafeteria was on the west side of the academy,[p/] so that made sense.
translation: 餐厅在学院的西侧，[p/]这个描述是合理的。

original: AriaC: What did you see in the classroom, Ms. Ianus?
translation: AriaC: 伊努斯女士，你在讲堂里发现了什么？

original: TYRION: Did you notice anything else strange in the lecture hall?
translation: TYRION: 讲堂里当时有什么异常吗？

original: VALENTINA: Well, there [i]was[/i] that terrible smell.
translation: VALENTINA: 嗯，说起来当时讲堂里[i]有[/i]股恶臭。
