original: VALENTINA: It was awful.[p/] I almost couldn’t see because of how much I was tearing up.
translation: VALENTINA: 真的很呛很难闻，[p/]这股味道呛的我不停流眼泪，[p/]甚至都看不清东西。

original: It makes sense...[p/] Aside from Bellwether,[p/] that smell was the most notable thing in that room.
translation: 这是合理的……[p/]除了贝尔维瑟，[p/]房间里最引人注意的就是气味。

original: It would've been hard to notice anything else.
translation: 很难在此之外注意到其他东西。

original: She tried to...[p/] “help her”?
translation: 她们有试图……[p/]“救助她”？

original: TYRION: Ms. Ianus.[p/] How exactly did your sister try to help Ms. Bellwether?
translation: TYRION: 伊努斯女士，[p/]请问你妹妹具体是怎么救助贝尔维瑟教授的？

original: VALENTINA: W-[p/][s/]What? [h="Agh!|I slipped up!" e="f"/]
translation: VALENTINA: 什、[p/][s/]什么？ [h="啊！|我说漏嘴了！" e="f"/]

original: VALENTINA: O-[p/][s/]Oh,[p/] um...
translation: VALENTINA: 啊、[p/][s/]唔，[p/]这个……

original: VALENTINA: My sister used first aid to try to stop the bleeding.
translation: VALENTINA: 她用医疗包来试图止血。

original: TYRION: I...[p/] see.[p/] Could you please add that detail to your testimony?
translation: TYRION: 我……[p/]明白了，[p/]你能把刚刚的新细节加入到证言中吗？

original: VALENTINA: Y-[p/][s/]Yeah...[p/] Sure.
translation: VALENTINA: 嗯、[p/][s/]嗯……[p/]好的。

original: Valentina: She used first aid and applied pressure to her wound to stop the bleeding.
translation: Valentina: 她用医疗包来对伤口施加压力，帮助教授止血。

original: TYRION: Your sister knows how to use a first aid kit?
translation: TYRION: 你妹妹学过急救知识？

original: VALENTINA: Y-[p/]Yeah,[p/] it was covered in our training when we first started working there.
translation: VALENTINA: 嗯、[p/]嗯，[p/]在入职培训中有涵盖这部分。

original: VALENTINA: With all the nobles around,[p/] I guess the headmaster wanted to make sure we were prepared.
translation: VALENTINA: 毕竟周围这么多贵族，[p/]校长也想准备万全以备不时之需。

original: TYRION: A device?
translation: TYRION: 什么装置？

original: AriaC: It’s a communication device for use in an emergency.
translation: AriaC: 那是专用于应急的通讯装置。

original: TYRION: I see.[p/] So who [i]did[/i] you contact?
translation: TYRION: 明白了，[p/]你[i]当时[/i]联系了谁？

original: VALENTINA: I wasn’t sure, honestly.
translation: VALENTINA: 说实话我不太确定。

original: VALENTINA: I could hear a lot of people talking on the other end.
translation: VALENTINA: 当时能听到对面有很多人在交谈。

original: AriaC: That particular device broadcasts to the headmaster’s office and the City Watch Barracks.
translation: AriaC: 那个装置可以同时向校长办公室和城市安保播送语音。

original: AriaC: I imagine that’s why the headmaster was able to activate the lockdown so quickly.
translation: AriaC: 我想这也是校长能如此迅速激活封锁系统的原因。

original: TYRION: I see.
translation: TYRION: 我知道了。

original: TYRION: I see.[p/] That must have been a difficult experience for both of you.
translation: TYRION: 我明白了。[p/]对你们两位来说这肯定是个艰难的经历。

original: VALENTINA: It was especially hard on my sister.
translation: VALENTINA: 对我妹妹来说那尤其艰难。

original: VALENTINA: I think she blames herself for not being able to save her.
translation: VALENTINA: 我认为她因没能救到教授感到自责。

original: She seemed sincere when she said that.
translation: 她这句话看起来是真心的。

original: I didn't catch any dissonant thoughts through the Eye either.
translation: 而且荷鲁斯之眼也没有发现不相符的想法。

original: CELESTE: Honestly,[p/] her testimony makes a lot of sense.
translation: CELESTE: 老实说，[p/]她的证言完全说得通。

original: CELESTE: It’s hard to figure out which parts she might be lying about.
translation: CELESTE: 很难找出她在哪一部分可能说谎。

original: TYRION: There has to be a contradiction here somewhere...
translation: TYRION: 一定在哪个地方藏着矛盾……

original: CELESTE: Your theory is that Valentina saw someone use [b]Mend Wounds[/b] on Bellwether.
translation: CELESTE: 你的理论是，瓦伦蒂娜看见有人对贝尔维瑟使用了[b]疗愈术[/b]。

original: CELESTE: You should focus on the statements that describe how they both interacted with her.
translation: CELESTE: 你应该着重分析描述她们如何与她互动的证词。

original: AriaC: ...Witness.[p/] What is the meaning of this?
translation: AriaC: ……证人。[p/]这是什么意思？

original: VALENTINA: W-[p/][s/]What?[p/][s/] Why are you looking at me like that?
translation: VALENTINA: 怎、[p/][s/]怎么啦？[p/][s/]你为什么要这样看着我？

original: TYRION: Maybe [i]I[/i] can elaborate, Ms. Ianus.
translation: TYRION: 或许[i]我[/i]能解释清楚，伊努斯女士。

original: TYRION: You weren’t present in the gallery earlier,[p/] were you?
translation: TYRION: 你之前并没有在旁听席，[p/]对吗？

original: VALENTINA: N-[p/][s/]No.[p/] I was waiting in the lobby.
translation: VALENTINA: 没、[p/][s/]没有。[p/]我在大厅等候。

original: VALENTINA: Lady Steelwind told me to wait there.
translation: VALENTINA: 斯蒂尔文德小姐让我在那里等着。

original: I considered myself lucky.[p/] This wouldn't have been nearly as easy if Valentina had seen my cross-examination of Oyrm.
translation: 我暗喜自己运气不错。[p/]如果瓦伦蒂娜有观看奥蒙的交叉询问，事情肯定没这么简单。

original: TYRION: You see, Ms. Ianus...[p/] One key element of the case is that the body [i]didn’t[/i] have any wounds on it.
translation: TYRION: 你看，伊努斯女士……[p/]这个案件中一个很关键的要素，就是尸体上[i]没有[/i]任何伤口。

original: VALENTINA: Y-[p/]Yeah?[p/] So?
translation: VALENTINA: 是、[p/]是啊？[p/]所以呢？

original: TYRION: [i]So[/i], that begs the following question...
translation: TYRION: [i]所以[/i]，这就产生了一个问题……

original: TYRION: How did Valerie apply first aid when there shouldn’t have been [i]any[/i] wounds on the body?!
translation: TYRION: 瓦莱丽是怎么在尸体上没有[i]任何[/i]伤口的情况下使用医疗包的？！

original: VALENTINA: What?! [h="Ah! No...|Did I screw up?" e="f"/]
translation: VALENTINA: 什么？！ [h="啊！不……|我搞砸了吗？" e="f"/]

original: VALENTINA: I-[p/][s/]I... [h="But I saw that wound on her!|What happened?!" e="f"/]
translation: VALENTINA: 我、[p/][s/]我…… [h="但我是看到她身上有伤的啊！|怎么回事？！" e="f"/]

original: JUDGE: There’s clearly something amiss here.
translation: JUDGE: 这里面肯定有问题。

original: JUDGE: But I’m afraid I don’t fully understand the implications of this.
translation: JUDGE: 但恐怕我还没有完全明白其中的含义。

original: JUDGE: Are you accusing the witness of committing perjury, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: JUDGE: 卡斯伯特先生，你是要指控证人伪证吗？

original: When someone lied,[p/] they kept it as close to the truth as possible while changing minute details.
translation: 当人们说谎的时候，[p/]他们总是尽可能阐述事实，只不过改动个别细节。

original: In her thoughts,[p/] Valentina said that she was sure she [i]saw[p/] a wound on Bellwether...
translation: 而她的想法里，p/]瓦伦蒂娜自己说了她[i]看到了[p/]贝尔维瑟身上的伤口……

original: She also mentioned that [i]Valerie[/i] was the one who tried to save the professor.
translation: 她也提到[i]瓦莱丽[/i]就是尝试救助教授的那个人。

original: I knew that someone had cast healing magic on the body.[p/] That was why the wounds had disappeared.
translation: 我也已经知晓是有人在尸体上施放过治愈法术。[p/]所以伤口才消失了。

original: If the wounds disappeared after the twins discovered the body,[p/] that could only mean one thing.
translation: 而如果伤口是在这对双胞胎发现后才消失的，[p/]那只意味着一件事。

original: TYRION: The witness [i]was[/i] lying, Your Honor...[p/] But not about everything.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下，这位证人[i]是[/i]有说谎……[p/]但不都是。

original: TYRION: Valerie Ianus [i]did[/i] try to save the victim's life by addressing her wounds.
translation: TYRION: 瓦莱丽·伊努斯[i]确实有[/i]尝试处理被害人的伤口来挽救她的性命。

original: TYRION: But she didn’t use first aid...[p/][s/] She used magic!
translation: TYRION: 但用的不是急救包……[p/][s/]而是使用了魔法！

original: VALENTINA: ...?! [h="How did he|figure it out?!" e="fa"/]
translation: VALENTINA: .……？！ [h="他是怎么|发现这点的？！" e="fa"/]

original: AriaC: I'm sorry, Mr. Cuthbert,[p/] but your theory is completely flawed.
translation: AriaC: 抱歉，卡斯伯特先生。[p/]但你的推论漏洞百出。

original: TYRION: ...How so, Steelwind?
translation: TYRION: ……为什么呢，斯蒂尔文德？

original: AriaC: Well,[p/] it’s quite simple.
translation: AriaC: 这个嘛，[p/]其实很简单。

original: AriaC: We’ve already verified that neither of the sisters is a mage.
translation: AriaC: 我们已经证实，她们两姐妹都不是法师。

original: TYRION: ...What?!
translation: TYRION: ……怎么会？！

original: TYRION: W-[p/]Wait...[p/] How can you be so sure?
translation: TYRION: 等、[p/]等等……[p/]你怎么能这么确信？

original: AriaC: During the investigation,[p/] we had both the Ianus sisters attune to a [b]Spell Compendium[/b].
translation: AriaC: 在调查期间[p/]我们让姐妹两个都]尝试与[b]法术汇编[/b]绑定。

original: AriaC: It’s standard procedure for the Inquisition when interviewing witnesses.
translation: AriaC: 这是裁判所在询问证人前的标准程序。

original: Tyrion: T-[p/]Then that means...
translation: Tyrion: 那、[p/]那就是说……

original: AriaC: Neither of the Ianus sisters could attune to a [b]Compendium[/b]!
translation: AriaC: 伊努斯姐妹两个都无法与[b]汇编[/b]绑定！

original: VALENTINA: H-[p/][s/]Ha![p/][s/] T-[p/][s/]That’s right![p/][s/] The Inquisition checked us both!
translation: VALENTINA: 呵、[p/][s/]哈哈！[p/][s/]没、[p/][s/]没错！[p/][s/]裁判所已经检查过我们两个了！

original: VALENTINA: We're [i]not[/i] mages! [h="That was close..." e="f"/]
translation: VALENTINA: 我们[i]就不是[/i]法师！[h="好险……" e="f"/]

original: Was I wrong about Valerie being a mage?
translation: 我对瓦莱丽是法师的判断是错误的吗？

original: No...[p/] That couldn’t be right.
translation: 不可能……[p/]不可能是这样的。

original: VALENTINA: ...?! [h="How did he|figure it out?!"/]
translation: VALENTINA: .……？！ [h="他是怎么|发现这点的？！"/]

original: Her thoughts said, “How did he figure it out?!”.[p/] That meant that I [i]was[/i] on the right track.
translation: 她的想法显示，“他是怎么发现这点的？！”[p/]这只意味着我[i]就在[/i]正确的道路上。

original: Valerie [i]had[/i] to be the mage I was looking for.
translation: 瓦莱丽[i]只能是[/i]我一直在找的那名法师。

original: TYRION: Celeste.[p/] Is it possible for a mage to hold a [b]Spell Compendium[/b] and avoid attuning to it?
translation: TYRION: 塞莱斯特。[p/]法师触碰[b]法术汇编[/b]却不与之绑定，这种事情做得到吗？

original: CELESTE: No...[p/] It just needs to be on their person.
translation: CELESTE: 不行吧……[p/]只要带在身上就会生效了。

original: CELESTE: ...When I was arrested,[p/] the Inquisition also made me attune to one of their [b]Spell Compendiums[/b].
translation: CELESTE: ……我被逮捕的时候，[p/]裁判所也让我绑定他们提供的一部[b]法术汇编[/b]。

original: CELESTE: They were really careful to make sure that I did the attunement correctly.
translation: CELESTE: 他们很小心地确认了我有正确地与之绑定。

original: CELESTE: There’s no way a mage could avoid it with them watching you.
translation: CELESTE: 不可能有法师在他们眼皮子底下避免。

original: Right...[p/] Commander White may have been negligent sometimes,[p/] but even [i]he[/i] wasn’t that careless.
translation: 没错……[p/]怀特指挥官可能偶尔疏忽，[p/]但就算是[i]他[/i]也不会那么大意。

original: AriaC: Now,[p/] if you’re done,[p/] I do believe that you’ve exhausted all your options.
translation: ARIA: 既然你们讨论完了，[p/]我想你们手上也无牌可打了吧。

original: TYRION: W-[p/][s/]wait![p/][s/] I’m still not done cross-examining this witness!
translation: TYRION: 等、[p/][s/]等一下！[p/][s/]我还没对证人交叉询问呢！

original: AriaC: ...What could you possibly hope to glean from her testimony?
translation: AriaC: ……从她的证词中你还能指望得到什么？

original: Valentina was stressed out enough to see her thoughts.
translation: 瓦伦蒂娜十分紧张，足够我将她的想法看得一清二楚。

original: ...But I couldn't exactly say that I was planning to read her mind.
translation: ……但我又不能明说自己要读她的想法。

original: And at this point,[p/] I felt that I was already testing the judge's patience.
translation: 到了这一步，[p/]我已经是在挑战法官的耐心了。

original: TYRION: T-[p/][s/]There’s one key element of her testimony that the court is overlooking!
translation: TYRION: 她、[p/][s/]她的证词里还有一个之前被忽略的关键！

original: TYRION: I have a right as an attorney to complete my cross-examination.
translation: TYRION: 我作为律师有权完成这次交叉询问。

original: AriaC: Your Honor.[p/] The defense is clearly trying to buy time.
translation: AriaC: 法官阁下。[p/]辩方显然只是在试图拖延时间。

original: JUDGE: ...I might be compelled to agree with you.
translation: JUDGE: ……也许我同意你的观点。

original: JUDGE: However,[p/] I'll also admit that [i]some[/i] elements of the witness’s testimony are quite peculiar.
translation: JUDGE: 然而，[p/]我也承认证人的证词中有[i]一些[/i]内容不太寻常。

original: JUDGE: I will allow the defense to continue their cross-examination.
translation: JUDGE: 我同意辩方进行这次交叉询问。

original: That was close.
translation: 好险。

original: JUDGE: ...But know that this is your last chance, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: JUDGE: ……但是请记住，这是你的最后一次机会，卡斯伯特先生。

original: JUDGE: If you produce nothing substantial with your questioning,[p/] I [i]will[/i] pass my verdict.
translation: JUDGE: 如果你在询问中没有得出什么重要的内容，[p/]我[i]会[/i]直接宣布判决。

original: TYRION: O-[p/]Of course, Your Honor.
translation: TYRION: 没、[p/]没问题，法官阁下。

original: Alright...[p/] It was all or nothing.
translation: 好吧……[p/]成败在此一举。

original: If I couldn't find anything by reading her mind,[p/] this whole case was finished.
translation: 如果我不能在她的想法里找到什么……[p/]案件就会这么结束。

original: AriaC: ...Witness.[p/] Please give your testimony, once more.
translation: AriaC: ……证人。[p/]请你再一次陈述证词。

original: VALENTINA: U-[p/]Um... [p/]Okay... [h="How long does he plan|to keep me up here?!" e="fa" /]
translation: VALENTINA: 啊、[p/]唔……[p/]好的……[h="该死！|他还想让我在这里呆多久？！" e="fa" /]

original: Valentina: Like I said,[p/] my sister and I saw Ms. Bellwether bleeding on the ground.[p/] We rushed over to her. [h="I was definitely surprised|when I saw her like that." e="sf"/]
translation: Valentina: 正如我说过的，[p/]妹妹和我看见贝尔维瑟女士倒在血泊之中。[p/]我们赶紧冲过去查看。[h="看到她那个样子我确实很惊讶。" e="sf"/]

original: Valentina: N-[p/][s/]Now that you mention it...[p/] I don’t know if I saw any wounds on her.[p/] But I definitely saw blood! [h="I can’t go back on that now...|I just need to play dumb." e="f"/]
translation: Valentina: 既、[p/][s/]既然你提到了……[p/]我也不知道有没有在她身上看到伤口。[p/]但我肯定看到血了！[h="这一点上没法回头了……|我只好装傻了。" e="f"/]

original: Valentina: My sister tried to save her![p/][s/] But she didn’t use any magic! [h="Ugh, Valerie...|You’re too kind-hearted..." e="af"/]
translation: Valentina: 我妹妹尝试救助她！[p/][s/]但她没使用什么魔法！[h="啊，瓦莱丽……|你善良过头了……" e="af"/]

original: Valentina: We're not mages![p/][s/] Both of us held that book the knights gave us! [h="I was caught off guard when they asked us.|They almost found us out." e="f" /]
translation: Valentina: 我们俩不是法师！[p/][s/]我们都碰了骑士们给的那本书！[h="他们问的时候我有点措手不及。|差点就被发现了。" e="f" /]

original: Valentina: The commander was watching us the whole time![p/][s/] He can confirm it! [h="It’s a good thing that we’re twins...|Or else that trick wouldn’t have worked." e="hf" /]
translation: Valentina: 指挥官全程都在监视我们！[p/][s/]他可以作证！[h="还好我们是双胞胎……|不然这个把戏行不通的。" e="hf" /]

original: CELESTE: What are we going to do...?
translation: CELESTE: 我们该怎么办……？

original: CELESTE: They have pretty hard proof that Valerie isn’t a mage.
translation: CELESTE: 关于瓦莱丽不是法师这一点，他们有相当确凿的证据。

original: TYRION: Valerie [i]is[/i] the mage we’re looking for.[p/] I’m sure of it.
translation: TYRION: 我很确定，[p/]瓦莱丽[i]就是[/i]我们在找的那个法师。

original: Tyrion: I'm just not sure why they felt the need to lie to the Inquisition.
translation: Tyrion: 我只是不确定她们为什么要欺骗裁判所。

original: And more importantly,[p/] [i]how[/i] did they trick the Inquisition?
translation: 更重要的是，[p/]她们[i]怎么[/i]骗过裁判所的？

original: That matched the details of her previous testimony.
translation: 这与她早些时候证词的细节吻合。

original: There was nothing suspicious there,[p/] but I had no reason to doubt this.
translation: 这一部分没有可疑之处，[p/]而我也没有理由在这里做出疑问。

original: Tyrion: ...It sounds like you're just backtracking on your previous testimony.
translation: Tyrion: ……听起来你是在推翻之前的证词。

original: Valentina: I-[p/][s/]I'm not!
translation: Valentina: 我、[p/][s/]我才没有啦！

original: Valentina: I guess I just assumed she was wounded because of all the blood!
translation: Valentina: 我想……只是因为看到那么多的血才假设她受了伤！

original: Valentina: How was [i]I[/i] supposed to know she didn't have any wounds?![p/][s/] There was so much blood!
translation: Valentina: [i]我[/i]怎么会知道她身上没有伤口？！[p/][s/]地上那么大一摊血！

original: Her thoughts implied that she was lying,[p/] but her logic was sound.
translation: 她的想法已经透露了她在撒谎，[p/]但她证词的逻辑没有问题。

original: I should look at the thoughts that appeared during her other statements.
translation: 我应该检查她在陈述其他证词时浮现的想法。

original: Tyrion: If Valerie wasn't the one who closed her wounds,[p/] how did she try to "help" her?
translation: Tyrion: 如果瓦莱丽没有让伤口愈合，[p/]那她怎么“救助”贝尔维瑟的？

original: Valentina: I-[p/]I don't know...
translation: Valentina: 我、[p/]我不知道……

original: Valentina: She might have been looking for an open wound to apply first aid to.
translation: Valentina: 她可能只是在寻找需要包扎的可见创口。

original: Tyrion: But if we assume that you're telling the truth,[p/] there wouldn't be any wounds to find.
translation: Tyrion: 但如果我们假设你说的是事实，[p/]那一开始就没有任何可见外伤。

original: Tyrion: My client would have already closed them to confound the investigation.
translation: Tyrion: 你意思是因为伤口已经被我的委托人为了“扰乱调查”而治愈。

original: Valentina: I'm telling you![p/][s/] I don't know!
translation: Valentina: 我告诉你了！[p/][s/]我不知道！

original: She's pleading ignorance of what happened.
translation: 她声称对事情经过一无所知。

original: They "almost" found them out?
translation: 他们“差一点”就发现了？

original: Tyrion: Can I assume that this "book" was an unattuned [b]Spell Compendium[/b]?
translation: Tyrion: 我可以认为这本“书”就是指未绑定的[b]法术汇编[/b]吗？

original: AriaC: Yes.[p/] The Inquisition has several of them.
translation: AriaC: 没错。[p/]裁判所有不少。

original: AriaC: It's standard procedure to have witnesses attune to them.
translation: AriaC: 让证人与之绑定是标准程序。

original: Tyrion: But doesn't the kingdom require that mages register?
translation: Tyrion: 但王国不是要求法师必须注册在案吗？

original: Tyrion: Why don't you just cross-reference those records with the witnesses’ names?
translation: Tyrion: 你们将证人姓名与注册记录进行比对不就行了吗？

original: AriaC: For whatever reason,[p/] many mages among the commonfolk avoid registering with the kingdom.
translation: Aria: 不论原因是什么，[p/]平民中的许多法师都不喜欢向王国注册身份。

original: AriaC: As a result,[p/] many of them choose to hide their abilities.
translation: AriaC: 结果就是，[p/]他们中大多数都选择藏匿自己的能力。

original: Valentina: ...
translation: Valentina: ……

original: It was a "good thing that they're twins"?
translation: 她刚才是在想“还好我们是双胞胎”？

original: Tyrion: ...Did you pull some kind of trick to [i]deceive[/i] the Inquisition while attuning, Ms. Ianus?
translation: Tyrion: ……绑定汇编的时候，你是不是耍了什么花招来[i]欺瞒[/i]裁判所，伊努斯女士？

original: Valentina: O-[p/]Of course not!
translation: Valentina: 当、[p/]当然没有！

original: Valentina: W-[p/][s/]We know that lying to the Inquisition would get us in trouble!
translation: Valentina: 我、[p/][s/]我们知道向裁判所撒谎只会给自己惹麻烦！

original: Valentina: Why would [i]either[/i] of us take a risk like that?!
translation: Valentina: 为什么我们俩[i]一定[/i]要冒这么大的风险啊？！

original: Tyrion: Living as an unregistered mage is a serious crime.
translation: Tyrion: 作为未注册的法师活动是一项重罪。

original: Tyrion: If Valerie [i]was[/i] a mage,[p/] then you would have been charged with fraud right then and there.
translation: Tyrion: 如果瓦莱丽[i]真的是[/i]一位法师，[p/]你们就会被当场指控欺诈罪。

original: Valentina: Y-[p/]Yeah![p/][s/] But we already proved that we're not mages!
translation: Valentina: 是、[p/]是啊！[p/][s/]但已经证明了我们都不是法师！

original: The Eye seems to differ,[p/] but I'd need something else to convince the court.
translation: 我的荷鲁斯之眼看到相悖的内容，[p/]但我需要其他的方法来说服法庭。

original: I needed to think through this.[p/] This wasn’t like a normal cross-examination.
translation: 我得通盘考虑一遍。[p/]这并不是平常的交叉询问。

original: Nearly all of her thoughts were suspicious and contrary to her testimony.
translation: 她的所有想法都几乎可疑，而且与自己的证词相违背。

original: What I needed to do was find the thought that gave me a thread to pull on.
translation: 而我需要的就是找到那个可以让我找到更进一步线索的想法。

original: In this case,[p/] I would need to find the thought that implied how the twins tricked the commander.
translation: 在这里，[p/]我需要找出那个导向她们这对双胞胎是如何愚弄了指挥官的那条想法。

original: Once I found that,[p/] I could INTERPRET it without the need for evidence.
translation: 只要我找到了，[p/]我就能在无需证据的情况下<size=1.5em>解读</size>它。

original: Tyrion: Your Honor![p/][s/] The witness's testimony contradicts what she truly thinks!
translation: Tyrion: 法官阁下！[p/][s/]证人的证词与她的真实想法矛盾了！

original: Judge: ...Mr. Cuthbert,[p/] that just sounds like speculation.
translation: Judge: ……卡斯伯特先生，[p/]这听起来像是猜测。

original: Tyrion: You’ll have to trust me, Your Honor.
translation: Tyrion: 拜托您一定要相信我，法官阁下。

original: Tyrion: I have an instinct for this sort of thing.
translation: Tyrion: 我对这类东西有直觉的。

original: AriaC: Mr. Cuthbert.[p/] Your “instincts” do not make for concrete evidence.
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生。[p/]你所谓的“直觉”并不能成为确凿的证据。

original: AriaC: I can't believe I have to explain this to you...
translation: AriaC: 不敢相信我还得跟你解释这个……

original: Tyrion: R-[p/]Right...
translation: Tyrion: 是、[p/]是的……

original: I couldn't exactly say that I could see her thoughts...
translation: 我不能直白地说自己看得到她的想法……

original: TYRION: Ms. Ianus.[p/] Your thoughts betray you.
translation: TYRION: 伊努斯女士。[p/]你的想法背叛了你。

original: VALENTINA: W-[p/][s/]What...?
translation: VALENTINA: 什、[p/][s/]什么……？

original: I found the thought.
translation: 我找到那个想法了。

original: They must have done something to trick Orym,[p/] but what...?
translation: 她们肯定用某种方法骗过了奥蒙，[p/]不过是什么呢……？

original: It must have happened when he was interrogating them.
translation: 肯定是他在讯问她们时发生的。

original: ARIA: Orym collected their statements.
translation: ARIA: 是奥蒙采集了她们的证词。

original: TYRION: How are they holding up?[p/] I imagine they'd be rattled after discovering a body.
translation: TYRION: 她们情况如何？[p/]发现尸体应该很受惊吓。

original: ARIA: From what he said,[p/] they were extremely tense,[p/] but I suppose that's to be expected.
translation: ARIA: 根据他的说法，[p/]她们当时非常紧张，[p/]我觉得是合理的。

original: ARIA: He told me that they couldn't sit still.[p/] He found it difficult to take their statements because of that.
translation: ARIA: 他告诉我她们根本坐不住。[p/]因此他很难取得有效的证词。

original: They couldn't sit still...[p/] That implied they were moving somehow.
translation: “根本坐不住”……[p/]也就是说她们当时在以某种方式移动。

original: She also thought it was a good thing that they were twins...
translation: 她之前的想法也提到“还好是双胞胎”……

original: This means that their so-called “trick” wouldn’t have worked otherwise...
translation: 也就是说她们这个“花招”如果[i]不是[/i]双胞胎就行不通……

original: Fail
No...[p/] There had to be a way that the twins tricked Commander White.
translation: 不对……[p/]肯定有个法子能让那对双胞胎骗过怀特指挥官。

original: Steelwind said that the two of them "couldn't sit still".
translation: 斯蒂尔文德说过，她们两个“坐不住”。

original: Were they really just antsy,[p/] or were they tricking the commander somehow?
translation: 她们真的只是坐立不安，[p/]还是当时在想办法瞒过指挥官？

original: Of course![p/][s/] They switched places!
translation: 当然了！[p/][s/]她们调换了位置！

original: Valentina attuned to the first [b]Spell Compendium[/b]!
translation: 瓦伦蒂娜先去与第一个[b]法术汇编[/b]绑定！

original: Then she pretended to be Valerie to attune to the second one!
translation: 然后她假装成瓦莱丽去绑定第二个！

original: They even wear the same uniform.[p/] No wonder Commander White couldn’t tell the difference between them!
translation: 她们甚至一直穿着同样的制服。[p/]难怪怀特指挥官分不清她们两个人！

original: TYRION: Ms. Ianus.[p/] There’s something I want to confirm.
translation: TYRION: 伊努斯女士。[p/]有一件事我要确认一下。

original: TYRION: During the investigation,[p/] both you and Valerie attuned to a [b]Spell Compendium[/b].
translation: TYRION: 调查过程中，[p/]你和瓦莱丽两个人确实都绑定了各自的[b]法术汇编[/b]。

original: VALENTINA: Y-[p/][s/]Yeah.[p/][s/] That knight [i]watched[/i] us do it!
translation: VALENTINA: 对、[p/][s/]对的。[p/][s/]那个骑士全程[i]监督[/i]了的！

original: TYRION: And how did he have you do this?
translation: TYRION: 他具体是怎么让你们绑定的？

original: TYRION: Did you both attune to those [b]Compendiums[/b] at the same time?
translation: TYRION: 你们是同时与各自的[b]法术汇编[/b]绑定的吗？

original: TYRION: ...Or did you attune one after another?
translation: TYRION: ……还是在绑定一个后又绑定了另一个？

original: VALENTINA: W-[p/][s/]What?!
translation: VALENTINA: 这、[p/][s/]这个……

original: AriaC: I fail to see how that makes any difference, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: AriaC: 我看不出来这两者有什么区别，卡斯伯特先生。

original: JUDGE: Yes.[p/] I agree.
translation: JUDGE: 是的，[p/]我同意。

original: JUDGE: The [b]Spell Compendiums[/b] would work regardless of what order they went in.
translation: JUDGE: 不论她们按什么顺序操作，[b]法术汇编[/b]都会正常生效。

original: TYRION: You may not be aware of this, Your Honor,[p/] but Valentina and Valerie Ianus are identical twins.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下，或许您还没注意到这一点，[p/]瓦伦蒂娜·伊努斯和瓦莱丽·伊努斯是一对同卵双胞胎。

original: Tyrion: Which [i]means[/i] that their physical appearances are nearly identical to each other.
translation: Tyrion: [i]也就是说[/i]她们的外表几乎完全一致。

original: Tyrion: They also work in the same kitchen,[p/] which means that they must have been wearing the same uniform during questioning.
translation: Tyrion: 她们在同一间厨房工作，[p/]也就是说当时她们还穿着相同的制服。

original: TYRION: If Commander White didn’t have them attune at the same time,[p/][s/] what would stop the twins from switching places with each other?!
translation: TYRION: 如果怀特指挥官没有命令她们同时尝试绑定，[p/][s/]他有什么办法阻止这对双胞胎伪装成彼此呢？

original: AriaC: This is clearly nothing but baseless conjecture.
translation: AriaC: 这显然只是毫无根据的猜测。

original: AriaC: Orym wouldn’t fail at such a basic task.
translation: AriaC: 奥蒙才不会犯这么基本的错误。

original: TYRION: Really, Prosecutor Steelwind?
translation: TYRION: 真的吗，斯蒂尔文德检察官？

original: TYRION: Do you find it hard to believe that [i]Commander White[/i] would fail at a task like this?
translation: TYRION: 你很难相信[i]怀特指挥官[/i]会在这么简单的任务中失败吗？

original: AriaC: Even so,[p/] the gift of magic is inherited through bloodlines.
translation: AriaC: 就算是这样，[p/]魔法的天赋是经由血脉传承的。

original: AriaC: For a pair of genetically identical twins,[p/] it would be impossible for one twin to be a mage while the other is not.
translation: AriaC: 以一对同卵双胞胎而言，[p/]一个是法师而另一个不是应该不可能。

original: Tyrion: Has that been proven, Steelwind?
translation: Tyrion: 这有被证实过吗，斯蒂尔文德？

original: Tyrion: Because as far as I'm concerned,[p/] [i]that[/i] is baseless conjecture!
translation: Tyrion: 因为就我所知，[p/][i]这个观点[/i]也是毫无根据的猜测！

original: VALENTINA: W-[p/][s/]Wait a minute![p/][s/] This is crazy!
translation: VALENTINA: 等、[p/][s/]等一下呀！[p/][s/]这也太扯了！

original: VALENTINA: We [i]didn’t[/i] trick the Inquisition!
translation: VALENTINA: 我们[i]才没有[/i]欺骗裁判所！

original: VALENTINA: I keep telling you![p/][s/] My sister and I aren't mages!
translation: VALENTINA: 我说了好多次了！[p/][s/]我们两姐妹都不是法师！

original: TYRION: Then prove it, Ms. Ianus!
translation: TYRION: 那就证明这一点啊，伊努斯女士！

original: TYRION: Bring in your sister,[p/] and we’ll have you attune to [i]two[/i] [b]Spell Compendiums[/b] at the same time!
translation: TYRION: 把你妹妹带过来，然后让你们[i]两个[/i]同时绑定[b]法术汇编[/b]！

original: VALENTINA: N-[p/][s/]No...
translation: VALENTINA: 不、[p/][s/]不要……

original: JUDGE: Order in the court!
translation: JUDGE: 注意法庭秩序！

original: JUDGE: It’s clear that we won’t get anywhere unless we test the defense’s theory.
translation: JUDGE: 很显然，除非验证辩方的主张，否则庭审无法继续。

original: JUDGE: Bailiff![p/][s/] Escort Valerie Ianus to the stand,[p/] and bring two unattuned [b]Spell Compendiums[/b]!
translation: JUDGE: 法警！[p/][s/]把瓦莱丽·伊努斯护送到证人席，[p/]再送来两个未绑定的[b]法术汇编[/b]！

original: VALERIE: ...
translation: VALERIE: ……

original: CELESTE: They’ve both had their hands on those Compendiums for the last ten minutes.
translation: CELESTE: 她们都已经把手放在法术汇编上十分钟了。

original: CELESTE: There’s no way they can fake it in front of this many people.
translation: CELESTE: 在众目睽睽之下，她们也没办法造假。

original: Alright...[p/] It was the moment of truth.
translation: 好了……[p/]揭晓真相的时刻到了。

original: I could only hope that my theory was correct.
translation: 我只能祈盼自己的推论正确。

original: AriaC: No...![p/][s/] Did he seriously—?!
translation: AriaC: 不会吧……！[p/][s/]他真的被——？！

original: JUDGE: W-[p/][s/] What is it, Prosecutor Steelwind?
translation: JUDGE: 怎、[p/][s/]怎么了，斯蒂尔文德检察官？

original: AriaC: What I [i]see[/i] is the commander seeking new employment in the near future...
translation: AriaC: 我[i]发现[/i]指挥官最近该去找新工作了……

original: AriaC: [i]*sigh*[/i][p/] It appears that the defense was correct.
translation: AriaC: [i]*叹气*[/i][p/]看起来辩方是对的。

original: AriaC: Valentina Ianus isn’t a mage,[p/] but Valerie Ianus is.
translation: AriaC: 瓦伦蒂娜·伊努斯确实不是法师……[p/]但瓦莱丽·伊努斯是。

original: AriaC: What’s more,[p/] Valerie Ianus’s [b]Compendium[/b] contains the [b]Mend Wounds[/b] spell.
translation: AriaC: 还有，[p/]瓦莱丽·伊努斯的[b]法术汇编[/b]包括了[b]疗愈术[/b]这个魔法。

original: AriaC: Which makes the defense’s theory entirely plausible.
translation: AriaC: 意味着得辩方的推论是完全合理的。

original: VALERIE: P-[p/][s/]Please...[p/][s/] Just allow me to explain...
translation: VALERIE: 拜、[p/][s/]拜托……[p/][s/]让我解释一下……

original: AriaC: We should allow you to explain [i]what[/i] exactly?
translation: AriaC: 我们该容许你解释[i]什么[/i] ？

original: AriaC: You're an unregistered mage,[p/] and you and your sister have made a mess of the investigation and this trial.
translation: AriaC: 你是未注册的法师，[p/]而且你们两姐妹还把调查与庭审搅得一团糟。

original: VALERIE: How would you know what it’s like, [i]Lady[/i] Steelwind?
translation: VALERIE: 你怎么可能明白这种感受，斯蒂尔文德[i]小姐[/i]？

original: AriaC: ...What?
translation: AriaC: ……什么？

original: VALERIE: Do you think we don't know who you are?
translation: VALERIE: 你以为我们不知道你是谁？

original: VALERIE: You’re not like us.[p/] You don’t [i]have[/i] to hide.
translation: VALERIE: 你和我们并不一样。[p/]你[i]用不着[/i]隐藏什么。

original: VALERIE: But it's okay...[p/] This whole situation has gotten out of hand.
translation: VALERIE: 但是没关系……[p/]反正整个局面早就失控了。

original: VALERIE: I didn’t think hiding it would cause so much trouble,[p/] and I won’t let someone go to prison because of me.
translation: VALERIE: 我之前没想到隐藏这一点会造成这么多问题，[p/]但我也不会让别人因为自己坐牢。

original: Valerie: ...Even if he [i]is[/i] a necromancer.
translation: Valerie: ……就算他是[i]死灵法师[/i]。

original: VALERIE: ...Please let me testify about what I saw.
translation: VALERIE: ……请让我就自己所见进行作证。

original: VALERIE: I’ll tell all of you what really happened that day.
translation: VALERIE: 我会告诉你所有人，那天实际上发生了什么。

original: JUDGE: ...
translation: JUDGE: ……

original: Tyrion: Your Honor,[p/] I believe we may all benefit from hearing Ms. Ianus's testimony.
translation: Tyrion: 法官阁下，[p/]我相信我们都能从伊努斯女士的证词中受益。

original: JUDGE: Very well,[p/] but understand that there will be repercussions for your actions, witness.
translation: JUDGE: 很好，[p/]但你要明白你的行为会招致对应的处理结果，证人。

original: VALERIE: I know...
translation: VALERIE: I我明白……

original: Valerie: My sister and I were walking in the hallway from the kitchen to the west exit.
translation: Valerie: 姐姐和我当时走在从厨房到西部出口的走廊上。

original: Valerie: That's when I suddenly spotted the professor lying in a pool of blood in a nearby classroom.
translation: Valerie: 就是那时，我突然发现附近的讲堂里，教授倒在一片血泊之中。

original: Valerie: Valentina used a communication device to call for help while I tried to save her.
translation: Valerie: 瓦伦蒂娜用通讯设备呼叫求助，同时我试着挽救教授。

original: Valerie: I saw that she was bleeding,[p/] so I cast [b]Mend Wounds[/b] on her to close her wounds.
translation: Valerie: 我看到她正在流血，[p/]所以我对她施放了[b]疗愈术[/b]来愈合伤口。

original: Valerie: But it was too late.[p/] I closed the hole in her chest,[p/] but she was already dead.
translation: Valerie: 但已经来不及了。[p/]我把她胸口的那个洞合上了，[p/]但她已经死亡。

original: JUDGE: ...There was a hole in her chest?
translation: JUDGE: ……她胸口有一个洞？

original: TYRION: Your Honor.[p/] As you can clearly see from the witness’ testimony,[p/] the trace of [b]necromancy[/b] was left by the witness,[p/] not my client.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下。[p/]您能通过证词清楚地知道，[p/][b]死灵术[/b]魔法的痕迹是证人留下的，[p/]不是我的委托人。

original: TYRION: What’s more,[p/] it’s clear that there was a [i]physical[/i] wound on the body.
translation: TYRION: 还有，[p/]很明显尸体上曾经有一处[i]外伤[/i]。

original: JUDGE: I-[p/][s/]I see...[p/] Well...
translation: JUDGE: 我、[p/][s/]我明白了……[p/]那么……

original: His words trailed off.
translation: 他的言语没了后续。

original: He clearly didn’t want to pass a verdict with no clear culprit.
translation: 显然，在没有明确凶手身份的情况下，法官并不想下达判决。

original: But he had no choice.[p/] The case against Wallace was predicated on Bellwether being killed by [b]Necrotic Blight[/b].
translation: 但他也没有选择，[p/]对华莱士的指控内容是他用[b]索命咒[/b]杀死了贝尔维瑟。

original: With Valerie’s testimony,[p/] the prosecution didn't have a shred of evidence implicating him.
translation: 有了瓦莱丽的证词，[p/]检方没有任何证据表明他有罪。

original: JUDGE: [i]*sigh*[/i][p/] Very well.[p/] The court sees no reason to prolong this trial.
translation: JUDGE: [i]*叹气*[/i][p/]好吧。[p/]看起来本庭也没有理由继续本次审理。

original: JUDGE: With these new developments,[p/] the court has no choice but to find Wallace Nightgrave—
translation: JUDGE: 依据新发现的事实，[p/]本法庭已经没有其他选择，我们只能判定华莱士·奈特格雷夫没有——

original: AriaC: I believe the court is ignoring one key detail of the witness’s testimony.
translation: AriaC: 我相信本次庭审忽略了刚才证词中的一个关键细节。

original: TYRION: ...And what would that be, Ms. Steelwind?
translation: TYRION: ……你指的是什么，斯蒂尔文德女士？

original: AriaC: Let’s re-examine the witness’s testimony.
translation: AriaC: 让我们重新审视刚才的证词。

original: AriaC: The communication device that Valentina Ianus used logs the time of day during each use.
translation: AriaC: 瓦伦蒂娜·伊努斯使用的那个通讯设备会保存每次使用的时间。

original: AriaC: From this log,[p/] we know that Valentina used this device at 3:04 PM.
translation: AriaC: 从记录中中，[p/]我们可以得知瓦伦蒂娜在下午 3:04 使用了这个设备。

original: AriaC: This was an hour after the time of death.
translation: AriaC: 那已经是死亡时间一小时后了。

original: TYRION: Where are you going with this?
translation: TYRION: 你想说什么？

original: AriaC: Mr. Cuthbert.[p/] There was a witness who saw the victim before the body was found:[p/] Jan Hughes.
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生。[p/]被害人的尸体被发现前有人见到过她本人，[p/]这位证人就是简·休斯。

original: AriaC: He,[p/] along with another witness,[p/] spotted Bellwether walking in the hallways before the body was found.
translation: AriaC: 在贝尔维瑟的尸体被发现之前，[p/]他与另一位证人一起，[p/]看到过她在走廊路过。

original: JAN: I was cleaning the halls.
translation: JAN: 我当时正在打扫大厅。

original: JAN: Bellwether knocked over a vase...[p/] There were shards and dirt everywhere.
translation: JAN: 贝尔维瑟撞倒了一个花瓶……[p/]搞得满地都是碎片和泥土。

original: TYRION: Wait...[p/] You [s/][i]saw[/i] the professor before the twins arrived?
translation: TYRION: 等等……[p/]你[s/]在双胞胎到来之前[i]看到了[/i]教授？

original: JAN: Yeah.[p/] Like I said,[p/] she broke the vase right in this hallway...
translation: JAN: 是啊。[p/]我刚才说过了，[p/]她把走廊里的花瓶打碎了……

original: JAN: It was probably 20-30 minutes before the twins found the body.
translation: JAN: 大概是在那对双胞胎发现尸体 20 到 30 分钟之前。

original: AriaC: “20-30 minutes” before the body was found.
translation: AriaC: 尸体被发现前“20 到 30 分钟”。

original: AriaC: Do you see the discrepancy, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生，你发现这里面的问题了吗？

original: Wait...[p/][s/] That couldn't be right!
translation: 等等……[p/][s/]不可能是这样的！

original: Bellwether died more than an [i]hour[/i] before the body was found...
translation: 贝尔维瑟在尸体被发现时已经死了不止[i]一小时[/i]了……

original: So how did Jan see her half an hour [i]after[/i] her death?!
translation: 简怎么能在她[i]死后[/i]半小时看到她？！

original: AriaC: I wonder, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: AriaC: 我有点好奇啊，卡斯伯特先生。

original: AriaC: How could one make a dead body move and walk around?
translation: AriaC: 怎样能使一具死尸到处行走呢？

original: TYRION: No...
translation: TYRION: 不……

original: AriaC: We didn't just arrest the defendant based on those traces of [b]necromancy[/b].
translation: AriaC: 我们并非只基于[b]死灵术[/b]的痕迹逮捕了被告。

original: AriaC: We arrested him because only [i]one[/i] person in that school could have animated her corpse!
translation: AriaC: 我们是因为他是学院里[i]唯一[/i]能驱动尸体的人才逮捕他的！

original: Gallery: An undead?![p/][s/] Created [i]within[/i] the Imperial Academy?!
translation: Gallery: 僵尸？！[p/][s/]还是在帝国学院[i]内[/i]创造出来的？！

original: Gallery: How reprehensible!
translation: Gallery: 多么不道德！

original: TYRION: That’s ridiculous![p/][s/] She had a hole in her chest when the twins found her!
translation: TYRION: 太荒谬了！[p/][s/]她被双胞胎发现的时候胸口可是有个洞！

original: TYRION: Jan Hughes would have noticed that!
translation: TYRION: 简·休斯肯定会注意到这一点！

original: AriaC: [b]Animate Corpse[/b] stops the flow of blood.[p/] So she wouldn’t have tracked blood anywhere.
translation: AriaC: [b]活化死尸[/b]可以停止血液流动。[p/]所以她不会在其他任何地方留下血迹。

original: AriaC: The defendant is also proficient with [b]illusion[/b] magic.
translation: AriaC: 被告的[b]幻象术[/b]也相当精湛。

original: AriaC: He could have easily used an [b]illusion[/b] spell to hide the undead Bellwether’s wounds.
translation: AriaC: 对他来说，使用某种[b]幻象术[/b]隐藏僵尸贝尔维瑟的伤口也很简单。

original: TYRION: But another party could have easily used [b]illusion[/b] magic to disguise themselves as the victim.
translation: TYRION: 但其他人也可以轻易地使用[b]幻象术[/b]魔法把自己伪装成被害人。

original: AriaC: If that were true,[p/] how did they move the body to the classroom?
translation: AriaC: 如果是这样的话，[p/]他们又要怎么把尸体移动到讲堂里？

original: JUDGE: Hm...
translation: JUDGE: 嗯……

original: JUDGE: Ms. Steelwind.[p/] If your theory is true,[p/] it would mean that the murder occurred elsewhere.
translation: JUDGE: 斯蒂尔文德女士。[p/]如果你的主张为真，[p/]就意味着谋杀发生在其他地方。

original: JUDGE: Would the Inquisition happen to know where?
translation: JUDGE: 裁判所知道是哪里吗？

original: AriaC: ...Regrettably,[p/] we do not.
translation: AriaC: ……很抱歉，[p/]我们还不知道。

original: Tyrion: Then the prosecution's case against my client is still faulty!
translation: Tyrion: 那么检方对我的委托人的指控仍然是错误的！

original: Tyrion: You can't convict my client without more evidence!
translation: Tyrion: 在没有其他证据的情况下，你不能判我的委托人有罪！

original: JUDGE: I must agree with Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: JUDGE: 我只能同意卡斯伯特先生的意见。

original: JUDGE: With these new developments,[p/] the court sees it fit to suspend the trial for the time being.
translation: JUDGE: 依据新发现的事实，[p/]本次庭审应当暂时中断。

original: JUDGE: We will give the Inquisition time to investigate these unknowns.
translation: JUDGE: 我们将给裁判所一点时间来调查新出现的未知情况。

original: JUDGE: Court proceedings for this case will resume tomorrow morning.
translation: JUDGE: 依据新发现的事实，[p/]本次庭审应当暂时中断。

original: JUDGE: Court is adjourned.
translation: JUDGE: 休庭。

original: CELESTE: Hey...[p/] Are you feeling okay?
translation: CELESTE: 嘿……[p/]你感觉还好吗？

original: A body was seen moving around an hour after death...
translation: 被害者死后一个小时，尸体被目击四处移动……

original: It clearly wasn't Bellwether...
translation: 那肯定不是贝尔维瑟本人……

original: Or at the very least,[p/] she wasn't alive when Jan ran into her.
translation: 或者至少可以认为，[p/]被简看到的那个时候她已经死了。

original: So, what was it?
translation: 所以到底发生了什么事情？

original: CELESTE: Tyrion...?
translation: CELESTE: 提利昂……？

original: :Steelwind was right about one thing:[p/] there was [b]illusion[/b] magic involved...
translation: 斯蒂尔文德说对了一件事：[p/]作案过程中肯定有人施放[b]幻象术[/b]……

original: But which spell was it?[p/] Could it have been [b]Illusory Disguise[/b]?
translation: 但具体是哪种法术？[p/]会是[b]幻象伪装[/b]吗？

original: CELESTE: Tyrion!
translation: CELESTE: 提利昂！

original: TYRION: Ah...![p/] What...?
translation: TYRION: 啊……！[p/]怎么了……？

original: CELESTE: You’ve been pacing around the lobby since the trial ended.
translation: CELESTE: 庭审结束后，你一直就在大厅里走来走去。

original: Tyrion: S-[p/]Sorry...[p/] I was just thinking about Steelwind's theory.
translation: Tyrion: 抱、[p/]抱歉……[p/]我刚刚只是在想斯蒂尔文德的推论。

original: CELESTE: It’s a little creepy when you think about it...
translation: CELESTE: 仔细想想，这还有点令人毛骨悚然……

original: CELESTE: Do you really think someone turned the professor into an undead?
translation: CELESTE: 你真的觉得有别人把教授变成了僵尸吗？

original: TYRION: I don’t think so.[p/] The prosecution’s case is hinged on one key point:[p/] that Wallace was the only high-level necromancer nearby.
translation: TYRION: 我觉得不是。[p/]检方的立证建立在一个关键之上：[p/]即华莱士是附近唯一的高阶死灵法师。

original: TYRION: We have to assume that he’s the only person capable of using that type of magic.
translation: TYRION: 我们只能认为他是唯一一个能使用那一类魔法的人。

original: CELESTE: But then how was she walking around...?
translation: CELESTE: 那她又怎么四处走动的……？

original: TYRION: I don’t know...[p/] It doesn’t make any sense.
translation: TYRION: 我不知道……[p/]根本就说不通。

original: TYRION: It’s a given that Wallace didn’t animate the body.
translation: TYRION: 可以肯定的事，华莱士并没有令尸体复生。

original: Tyrion: No matter what they did,[p/] someone had to have used an [b]illusion[/b].
translation: Tyrion: 不论真凶做了什么，[p/]肯定有人使用了[b]幻象术[/b]。

original: CELESTE: Aren’t there spells that can create freestanding illusions?[p/] Not just disguises?
translation: CELESTE: 难道没有法术能创造自主活动的幻象，而不仅仅是伪装吗？

original: TYRION: I honestly don’t know...
translation: TYRION: 这我真不清楚了……

original: TYRION: We’d need to talk to someone who knows about that type of magic.
translation: TYRION: 我们得找个熟悉这类魔法的人谈一谈。

original: TYRION: Didn’t Eris say that she was studying [b]illusion[/b] magic?
translation: TYRION: 厄莉斯不是说过她一直在研习[b]幻象术[/b]类魔法吗？

original: TYRION: She might be able to give us a lead.
translation: TYRION: 她或许能给我们一些提示。

original: CELESTE: ...Is that really a good idea?
translation: CELESTE: ……这个主意真的好吗？

original: TYRION: What do you mean?
translation: TYRION: 这又从何说起？

original: CELESTE: What if [i]she’s[/i] the one who created the illusion?!
translation: CELESTE: 要是制造幻象的人就是[i]她[/i]呢？

original: TYRION: What...?
translation: TYRION: ……什么？

original: I was detecting fear from her again.
translation: 我又从她身上探测到了恐惧。

original: TYRION: Celeste,[p/] are you [i]afraid[/i] of Eris?
translation: TYRION: 塞莱斯特，[p/]你[i]害怕[/i]厄莉斯？

original: CELESTE: W-[p/][s/]What?![p/][s/] N-[p/][s/]No...!
translation: CELESTE: 什、[p/][s/]什么呀？！[p/][s/]我、[p/][s/]我才没有……！

original: TYRION: I saw it this morning, too.[p/] You always get really anxious whenever she’s around.
translation: TYRION: 早上我也看到了。[p/]她在附近的时候你总是变得十分不安。

original: CELESTE: O-[p/][s/]Oh.[p/] I didn't mean to be so obvious about it...
translation: CELESTE: 啊、[p/][s/]哦。[p/]我本不想表现得那么明显的……

original: Tyrion: What's wrong?
translation: Tyrion: 怎么了？

original: CELESTE: Sorry,[p/] it’s not based on anything real,[p/] but—
translation: CELESTE: 对不起，[p/]虽然这没有什么事实依据，[p/]但是……

original: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] How do I explain this?
translation: Celeste: 唔……[p/]我该怎么解释呢？

original: CELESTE: You already know that I was working as a mercenary before this.
translation: CELESTE: 你已经知道我在之前是当雇佣兵的。

original: CELESTE: When you do that kind of work,[p/] you build up an instinct to sense danger.
translation: CELESTE: 从事这类职业的话，[p/]就会培养出一种能感知危险的直觉。

original: CELESTE: You kind of [i]have[/i] to if you want to stay alive.
translation: CELESTE: 你[i]必须[/i]依靠这种感觉才活得下来。

original: TYRION: Sorry...[p/] I never knew.
translation: TYRION: 抱歉……[p/]我从没想过这一点。

original: CELESTE: Tyrion.[p/] I’ve fought literal monsters and barely escaped with my life.
translation: CELESTE: 提利昂。[p/]我与字面意义上的怪物们战斗过，好不容易才捡回一条命。

original: CELESTE: But when I’m near Eris,[p/] none of those creatures come even close.
translation: CELESTE: 但我在厄莉斯附近的时候，[p/]那些怪物与她相比甚至不值一提。

original: CELESTE: I get this feeling.[p/] It's like I’m in front of a predator that I couldn’t ever hope to beat.
translation: CELESTE: 我就是有这种感觉。[p/]就好像站在一个根本没希望打败的捕食者面前。

original: CELESTE: Every instinct I have tells me to run whenever she’s close by.
translation: CELESTE: 只要她在附近时，我全身上下的直觉都在告诉我“快跑”。

original: TYRION: Really...?[p/] But she doesn’t seem that dangerous—[p/]just a little mischievous.
translation: TYRION: 真的吗……？[p/]她看起来并没有那么危险——[p/]只是有点顽皮。

original: CELESTE: I-[p/]I know...[p/] I think maybe I’m just anxious or something.
translation: CELESTE: 我、[p/]我知道……[p/]也可能只是我最近很焦虑或怎么样。

original: CELESTE: [i]I[/i] should know better than anyone not to judge people by how they look.
translation: CELESTE: [i]我[/i]比谁都清楚，不应该以貌取人。

original: Tyrion: Hm...
translation: Tyrion: 嗯……

original: CELESTE: S-[p/]Sorry,[p/] forget I said anything.
translation: CELESTE: 对、[p/]对不起。[p/]忘掉我刚刚说的东西吧。

original: CELESTE: If you think we should talk to her,[p/] then we should do that.
translation: CELESTE: 如果你觉得应该和她对话，[p/]那我们就去。

original: Celeste’s instincts had never steered me wrong before.
translation: 塞莱斯特的直觉从未将我导向错误。

original: She had always been reliable,[p/] and if Eris was making [i]her[/i] feel this way,[p/] that must've meant something.
translation: 她一直很可靠。[p/]而且如果厄莉斯能让[i]她[/i]如此恐惧，[p/]那一定意味着什么。

original: But that’s all the more reason for us to talk to her.
translation: 但这给了我更多要与她对话的理由。

original: TYRION: But aside from that,[p/] there was also something else that the prosecutor said.
translation: TYRION: 但除开这个理由，[p/]检察官还说过这么几句话。

original: TYRION: There was another witness who saw Bellwether walking around.
translation: TYRION: 当时还有另一个目击者看到贝尔维瑟正在走动。

original: CELESTE: Right...[p/] Jan probably isn’t the most reliable witness.
translation: CELESTE: 你说得对……[p/]简应该不算靠谱的目击者。

original: Tyrion: He was probably only half-awake when he saw her.
translation: Tyrion: 他目击教授的时候大概还在半睡半醒之间。

original: CELESTE: ...But do you think Steelwind will tell us who that witness was?
translation: CELESTE: ……不过斯蒂尔文德会告诉我们那个目击者是谁吗？

original: TYRION: We still have that deal with her.[p/] We won’t lose anything by asking.
translation: TYRION: 我们和她的交易还有效。[p/]问一问也没什么损失。

original: Celeste: Honestly,[p/] that's still bothering me...
translation: Celeste: 老实说，[p/]那一点还是挺让我在意的……

original: Tyrion: What is?
translation: Tyrion: 哪一点？

original: Celeste: Why was she so interested in who my biological parents are? [h="It's none of|her business..." e="sa" /]
translation: Celeste: 她为什么对我的亲生父母身份那么感兴趣呢？[h="跟她|没有关系的……" e="sa" /]

original: That [i]was[/i] strange...[p/] She traded information about the investigation for it too.
translation: [i]确实[/i]很奇怪……[p/]她是用调查情报来交换这个信息的。

original: Tyrion: Maybe she thinks you're her long-lost sister.
translation: Tyrion: 或许她觉得你可能是她失散多年的姐妹。

original: Celeste: O-[p/][s/]Oh,[p/] I never even thought of that.
translation: Celeste: 啊、[p/][s/]呃，[p/]我还真没想过这个可能性。

original: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] I don't know.
translation: Celeste: 唔……[p/]我不知道。

original: Celeste: Wouldn't that mean I'm the daughter of Lucio Steelwind?
translation: Celeste: 那不就是说我是卢西奥·斯蒂尔文德的女儿？

original: Celeste: I think my dad would've thrown a fit if he ever heard that.
translation: Celeste: 我爸爸要是听到这句话肯定会大动肝火。

original: Tyrion: You [i]are[/i] pretty good at fighting.
translation: Tyrion: 你[i]很擅长[/i]战斗。

original: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] That actually makes a lot of sense.
translation: Celeste: 呃……[p/]这好像真的有点说得通。

original: Celeste: I guess I like Aria,[p/] and I've always wished I had a sister.
translation: Celeste: 不过我停喜欢阿莉亚的，[p/]也一直想有个姐妹。

original: Celeste: ...But I don't want to think about this now.
translation: Celeste: ……不过现在我不太想去思考这件事。

original: Tyrion: Maybe you can ask her when you're at that brunch you strongarmed her into.
translation: Tyrion: 或许你可以在那顿向她强要来的早午餐时问问她。

original: Celeste: Oh,[p/] I almost forgot!
translation: Celeste: 对哦，[p/]我差点都忘了！

original: Celeste: I can't believe I'm going to meet Altheris Duskweaver!
translation: Celeste: 简直不敢相信，我将要和阿尔忒莉丝·夕织见面！

original: Anyways,[p/] we still had a long investigation ahead of us.
translation: 总而言之，[p/]还有漫长的调查等着我们。

original: And we'd need to start by talking to Steelwind about that witness.
translation: 我们得从向斯蒂尔文德打听那个证人开始。

original: Valentina: Val,[p/] you're back!
translation: Valentina: 瓦尔，[p/]你回来啦！

original: Valentina: Where's the produce for tonight's dinner?
translation: Valentina: 今天晚餐要用的菜在哪里？

original: Valerie: The grocers all said someone already collected the deliveries.
translation: Valerie: 杂货店主们都说有人收把货完了。

original: Valerie: Do you think someone stole them?
translation: Valerie: 你觉得是有人偷走了吗？

original: Valentina: I bet word about the trial has gotten out already.
translation: Valentina: 我猜是庭审的消息已经传出去了。

original: Valentina: They're definitely not going to sell to us anymore.
translation: Valentina: 他们肯定不打算再卖货给我们了。

original: Valerie: ...
translation: Valerie: ……

original: Valentina: Ugh...[p/] That dumb attorney just had to go and ruin everything.
translation: Valentina: 唉……[p/]那个蠢律师就这么把一切都毁掉了。

original: Valerie: I don't know...[p/] I was watching the trial.
translation: Valerie: 我不明白……[p/]当时我目睹了庭审全程。

original: Valerie: Do you really think that boy killed Catherine?
translation: Valerie: 你真的觉得是那个男孩杀死了凯瑟琳？

original: Valentina: Of course, he did![p/][s/] He's a [i]necromancer[/i] for crying out loud!
translation: Valentina: 当然是他啊！[p/][s/]他可是个天杀的[i]死灵法师[/i]！

original: Valerie: If what they said was true,[p/] I'm one, too.
translation: Valerie: 如果他们说得没错的话，[p/]我也是。

original: Valentina: You know that's not the same thing.[p/] You only use healing magic.
translation: Valentina: 你知道那不是一回事。[p/]你只使用治愈法术。

original: Valentina: Come on,[p/] help me prep some of the leftover meat.[p/] I bet we can still make some soup out of it.
translation: Valentina: 来吧，[p/]帮我准备还剩下来的肉。[p/]我们还能用那些做点汤。

original: Valerie: I hate this...
translation: Valerie: 我不喜欢这样……

original: Valentina: Yeah,[p/] I know.[p/] The students are totally going to complain about it.
translation: Valentina: 是啊，[p/]我知道。[p/]学生们肯定会满腹牢骚。

original: Valerie: No,[p/] I [i]hate[/i] magic.
translation: Valerie: 不是这个。[p/]我[i]讨厌[/i]魔法。

original: Valentina: Sure.[p/] Whatever, Val...
translation: Valentina: 那当然。[p/]怎么样都好，瓦尔……

original: Valerie: ...What?
translation: Valerie: ……什么？

original: JUDGE: Court is now resumed for the trial of Wallace Nightgrave.
translation: JUDGE: 现在就华莱士·奈特格雷夫一案继续审理。

original: JUDGE: During yesterday's trial,[p/] it was revealed that the trace of [b]necromancy[/b] might not have been left by the defendant.
translation: JUDGE: 昨日已当庭证明，[b]死灵术[/b]魔法的痕迹可能不是由被告造成的。

original: JUDGE: It may have been left by a witness who cast [b]necromancy[/b] in an attempt to [i]heal[/i] the victim.
translation: JUDGE: 很有可能是一位目击证人在尝试[i]治愈[/i]被害人时留下了[b]死灵术[/b]魔法的痕迹。

original: JUDGE: However,[p/] the victim was seen by witnesses well after her time of death.
translation: JUDGE: 然而，[p/]被害人曾在推定死亡时间之后被目击到有正常活动。

original: JUDGE: That could only be explained if someone had used [b]necromancy[/b] to animate the victim’s body,[p/] which begged the following question.
translation: JUDGE: 目前只能解释为，被告使用[b]死灵术[/b]使尸体活，[p/]也就引出接下来的问题：

original: JUDGE: [i]If[/i] the victim had been raised as an undead and ordered to walk to Lecture Hall 2-B,[p/] where did the murder actually take place?
translation: JUDGE: [i]如果[/i]被害者变成僵尸被唤醒，又被命令走到了2-B号讲堂，[p/]那么凶杀到底发生在哪里？

original: JUDGE: Does the prosecution have an answer for this?
translation: JUDGE: 请问检方是否已经找到了这个问题的答案？

original: AriaC: Based on the testimonies of several witnesses,[p/] it is very likely that the murder took place in the library.
translation: AiaC: 基于几位目击者给出的证词，[p/]谋杀很可能发生在图书馆内。

original: JUDGE: Interesting...[p/] What led you to this conclusion, Ms. Steelwind?
translation: JUDGE: 令人在意……[p/]是什么让你得出这一结论的，斯蒂尔文德女士？

original: AriaC: First,[p/] I’d like to remind the court [i]where[/i] the victim was sighted before the body was found.
translation: AriaC: 首先，[p/]请在座各位回忆一下，在尸体被发现之前，[p/]受害者被目击到的[i]地点[/i]。

original: AriaC: It began when the victim had a meeting with the headmaster near the center of the building.
translation: AriaC: 事情是从受害者与校长于大楼中心附近会面时开始的。

original: Theodore: Our meeting was scheduled for 12:00 PM.[p/] According to my schedule for that day,[p/] our meeting lasted for an hour.
translation: Theodore: 我们约好在中午 12:00 见面。[p/]根据我当天的行程安排，[p/]这次会面持续了一个小时。

original: AriaC: This brings us to the statement of the next witness:[p/] a student at the academy.
translation: AriaC: 这将我们引向下一位证人：[p/]学院中一位在读学生。

original: AriaC: This student saw the victim walking in the hallways.
translation: AriaC: 那位学生看到被害人从走廊经过。

original: Miriam: I saw her coming out of the headmaster’s office.
translation: Miriam: 我看到她从校长室出来。

original: Miriam: She was heading towards the library.
translation: Miriam: 她正往图书馆的方向走。

original: AriaC: Which means that our first witness saw Bellwether leave the headmaster’s office.
translation: AriaC: 也就是说第一位目击者看到了贝尔维瑟离开校长室。

original: AriaC: Presumably,[p/] this would have happened [i]after[/i] her meeting there.
translation: AriaC: 可以推断，[p/]这发生在那里的会面[i]结束之后[/i]。

original: AriaC: [i]That[/i] would time this encounter at around 1:00 PM.
translation: AriaC: [i]这一点[/i]使这次相遇的时间确定在下午 1:00。

original: AriaC: The other event is the discovery of the body,[p/] which was when Valentina Ianus contacted security.
translation: AriaC: 另一件事就是尸体被人发现，[p/]也就是瓦伦蒂娜·伊努斯呼叫安保的时候。

original: Valerie: I suddenly spotted the professor lying in a pool of blood in the classroom.
translation: Valerie: 我突然发现附近的教室里，教授倒在一片血泊之中。

original: AriaC: As we’ve already established,[p/] this event occurred at 3:04 PM.
translation: AriaC: 正如我们已经确认的，[p/]这件事发生在下午 3:04。

original: AriaC: But the significance of this time is in what occurred [i]before[/i] the body was discovered.
translation: AriaC: 但在尸体被发现[i]之前[/i]发生的另一件事则意义非凡。

original: AriaC: The second witness,[p/] a member of the cleaning staff,[p/] spotted the victim in the west-wing hallway.
translation: AriaC: 第二位目击者，[p/]也是学院的清洁工，[p/]在西侧走廊看到了被害人。

original: Jan: Bellwether knocked over a vase...[p/] And there were shards and dirt everywhere.
translation: Jan: 贝尔维瑟撞倒了一个花瓶……[p/]搞得满地都是碎片和泥土。

original: Jan: It was probably 20-30 minutes before the twins found the body.
translation: Jan: 大概是在那对双胞胎发现尸体 20 到 30 分钟之前。

original: AriaC: This means that this encounter must have happened no later than 2:30 PM.
translation: Aria: 意味着此目击必然发生在下午 2:30 之后。

original: AriaC: And [i]this[/i] implies that the victim was near the library between 1:00 PM and 2:30 PM.
translation: Aria: 而[i]这[/i]也表明，被害人下午 1:00 到 2:30 之间在图书馆附近。

original: AriaC: According to the defendant’s statements,[p/] he was in the Library during this time period.
translation: AriaC: 根据被告人的说法，[p/]这个时段他在图书馆里。

original: AriaC: Furthermore,[p/] the time of death was at 2:01 PM.
translation: AriaC: 此外，[p/]死亡时间是下午 2:01。

original: AriaC: This means that Mr. Hughes saw the victim’s animated body.
translation: AriaC: 也就是说休斯先生看到了被害人已活化的尸体。

original: JUDGE: I see.[p/] What do you have to say in your defense, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: JUDGE: 我明白了。[p/]你的辩护意见如何，卡斯伯特先生？

original: TYRION: The prosecution’s argument is definitely well thought-out, Your Honor.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下，检方的推论的确经过深思熟虑。

original: TYRION: ...However,[p/] it is entirely predicated on the testimonies of all the witnesses involved.
translation: TYRION: ……然而，[p/]这完全基于全体相关证人的证词。

original: Steelwind’s deduction had to have a hole somewhere...
translation: 斯蒂尔文德的推论一定在某处有个漏洞……

original: And since our conversation yesterday,[p/] I’d had a feeling that Miriam was hiding something...
translation: 而且回想我们昨天的对话内容，[p/]感觉米莉亚姆还在隐瞒什么东西……

original: If I wanted to get to the truth,[p/] I would need to drag that out of her through a cross-examination.
translation: 如果我要澄清真相，[p/]就必须在交叉询问里从她身上挖出来。

original: TYRION: Your Honor.[p/] To test the validity of these claims,[p/] the defense would like both of these witnesses to testify.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下，[p/]为了检验这些说法是否正确，[p/]辩方希望两个目击者都能当庭作证。

original: Tyrion: The defense calls Miriam Frega to the stand.
translation: Tyrion: 辩方要求传唤米莉亚姆·弗雷加出庭作证。

original: JUDGE: F-[p/][s/]Frega?!
translation: JUDGE: 弗、[p/][s/]弗雷加？！

original: At the mention of her name,[p/] the judge’s face turned a bit pale.
translation: 提到她的姓氏，[p/]法官的脸色都有点变白了。

original: He fidgeted with his gavel,[p/] looking towards the bailiff and then towards Steelwind.
translation: 他的手指不安地在木槌上拨弄，[p/]看了看法警，又看向斯蒂尔文德。

original: AriaC: ...I had a feeling it would come to this.
translation: AriaC: ……我就预感事情会变成这样。

original: JUDGE: D-[p/][s/]Do you have any objections, Ms. Steelwind...?
translation: JUDGE: 你、[p/][s/]你有异议吗，斯蒂尔文德女士……？

original: AriaC: I do not, Your Honor.
translation: AriaC: 我没有，法官阁下。

original: Judge: ...Very well.
translation: Judge: ……那好吧。

original: Judge: Bailiff.[p/] Please escort...[p/] [i]Lady[/i] Frega to the stand.
translation: Judge: 法警。[p/]请护送……[p/]弗雷加[p][i]小姐[/i]到证人席。

original: AriaC: Witness,[p/] please state your name and occupation for the—
translation: AriaC: 证人，[p/]请向法庭告知你的姓名与职——

original: MIRIAM: You little snakes!
translation: MIRIAM: 你这个小骗子！

original: MIRIAM: How [i]dare[/i] you deceive me!
translation: MIRIAM: 你怎么[i]敢[/i]欺骗本小姐！

original: CELESTE: O-[p/]Oh...[p/] It looks like she found out.
translation: CELESTE: 哎、[p/]哎呀……[p/]看起来她已经发现了。

original: AriaC: I had the opportunity to debrief the witness beforehand.
translation: AriaC: 我之前有机会向证人询问。

original: AriaC: ...Ms. McCoy,[p/] I asked you to exercise discretion.
translation: AriaC: ……麦考伊女士，[p/]我是要你谨慎行事。

original: AriaC: I did not imply that you should impersonate a member of my family.
translation: AriaC: 我可没暗示你能扮作我的家族成员。

original: CELESTE: Y-[p/]Yeah...[p/] Sorry about that.
translation: CELESTE: 你、[p/]你说得对……[p/]这件事我道歉。

original: MIRIAM: I gave you [i]all[/i] of the tea that I imported from the Eastern Kingdoms!
translation: MIRIAM: 我还把从东方古国进口的茶叶[i]全都[/i]送给你了！

original: MIRIAM: I demand that you return it to me!
translation: MIRIAM: 我要求你还给我！

original: CELESTE: No![p/][s/] You gave them to me![p/][s/] They’re [i]legally[/i] mine now!
translation: CELESTE: 不行！[p/][s/]你自己赠送给我的！[p/][s/]从[i]法律上[/i]来讲现在就是我的了！

original: AriaC: ...Anyways, Miriam,[p/] could you please testify to the court about your encounter with the victim?
translation: AriaC: ……总之，米莉亚姆，[p/]你能就与被害人的相遇向法庭作证吗？

original: MIRIAM: ...Fine.
translation: MIRIAM: ……好吧。

original: Miriam: I was working on a research project in my dorm room when I decided to take a break.
translation: Miriam: 我当时正在自己宿舍里进行一个研究项目，然后想休息一下。

original: Miriam: I left my room and went on a walk.[p/] That’s when I saw Professor Bellwether exiting the Headmaster’s Office.
translation: Miriam: 我离开房间散了散步。[p/]那时我正好看到贝尔维瑟教授正从校长室出来。

original: Miriam: She was walking in my direction.[p/] So I greeted her,[p/] and she responded in kind.
translation: Miriam: 她正好向我这边走过来，[p/]所以我向她问好，[p/]她也和蔼地回应了我。

original: Miriam: After that,[p/] she headed towards the library.
translation: Miriam: 在那之后，[p/]她直接向图书馆走了过去。

original: Miriam: A short time after that,[p/] I went back to my room and continued my work.
translation: Miriam: 又过了一小会儿，[p/]我回到宿舍继续做研究。

original: JUDGE: I see...[p/] So it was only a brief encounter.
translation: JUDGE: 明白了……[p/]也就是说那次只是打了个照面。

original: AriaC: However brief it was,[p/] the witness’s testimony verifies two things.
translation: AriaC: 先不论多么短暂，[p/]证人的证词确认了两件事。

original: AriaC: One is that Miriam saw the professor exiting the Headmaster’s Office.
translation: AriaC: 一是米莉亚姆看到了教授从校长室离开。

original: AriaC: The other is that she witnessed the victim head toward the library.
translation: AriaC: 二是她也目击到被害人向图书馆走去。

original: AriaC: This gives us a rough timeline of where the victim was before her death.
translation: AriaC: 这让我们就被害人遇害前行动轨迹得出了一个大致的时序。

original: JUDGE: Hm...[p/] That [i]does[/i] seem consistent.
translation: JUDGE: 嗯……[p/]这看起来[i]是[/i]一致的。

original: Did Bellwether really enter the library after her meeting?
translation: 贝尔维瑟在会面后真的有进入图书馆吗？

original: I felt like I would've seen her there if she did.
translation: 如果她真的进来了，我认为自己肯定会看到。

original: Judge: Mr. Cuthbert.[p/] You may begin your cross-examination.
translation: Judge: 卡斯伯特先生，[p/]你可以开始交叉询问了。

original: TYRION: Was this research project a part of your schoolwork?
translation: TYRION: 这个研究项目是你的作业吗？

original: MIRIAM: It was an independent study to develop a new [b]conjuration[/b] spell formula.
translation: MIRIAM: 这是个关于创造[b]召唤术[/b]新范式的独立研究。

original: MIRIAM: The project is being sponsored by the Crown Prince himself.
translation: MIRIAM: 该项目由王储殿下本人直接赞助。

original: AriaC: ...I wasn’t aware that he was involved in such a study.
translation: AriaC: ……我还真不知道他参与了这样的研究。

original: MIRIAM: Of course you wouldn't.[p/] Did you expect to know every aspect of his life, dear Aria?
translation: MIRIAM: 你当然不知道。[p/]亲爱的阿莉亚，你期望了解他生活的方方面面吗？

original: ...I sensed some hostility.
translation: ……我感到一丝敌意。

original: MIRIAM: If you don’t keep an eye on him,[p/] House Frega might just steal him back from you.
translation: MIRIAM: 如果不把他盯紧了，[p/]弗雷加一族可能把他从你手上偷回来哦。

original: AriaC: Hmph...[p/] As if His Highness would align himself with your rapacious family again.
translation: AriaC: 哼……[p/]说得好像殿下会再一次与你们这个贪婪的家族同流合污一样。

original: TYRION: Um...
translation: Tyrion: 呃……

original: MIRIAM: Ha![p/] Our banking houses form the economic infrastructure of our kingdom.
translation: MIRIAM: 哈！[p/]我们家族的银行业构筑了整个王国的经济体系。

original: MIRIAM: But perhaps he’ll come to the Steelwinds if he needs to massacre a village of commoners.
translation: MIRIAM: 不过如果殿下想屠杀村子里的平民时，他可能会来找斯蒂尔文德家吧？

original: JUDGE: U-[p/][s/]Um...[p/][s/] With all due respect,[p/] may we please focus on the matter at hand?
translation: JUDGE: 呃、[p/][s/]嗯……[p/][s/]恕我冒昧，[p/]我们能专注在案件上吗？

original: AriaC: ...Of course, Your Honor.
translation: AriaC: ……当然，法官阁下。

original: TYRION: And you’re sure that you saw her exit the Headmaster’s Office?
translation: TYRION: 你确定自己真的看到她离开校长室吗？

original: MIRIAM: Yes.[p/] I remember it clearly.
translation: MIRIAM: 是的。[p/]我记得很清楚。

original: Miriam: I was surprised that she was still meeting with the headmaster at all.
translation: Miriam: 我也很惊讶她还在和校长会面呢。

original: She must've been referring to her family's plot to replace him.
translation: 她应该是指她们家密谋取代校长的事情吧。

original: AriaC: Did you interact with the professor at all, Miriam?
translation: AriaC: 米莉亚姆，那你有和教授交流吗？

original: Miriam: She was walking in my direction.[p/] So I greeted her, and she responded in kind.
translation: Miriam: 她正好向我这边走过来，[p/]所以我向她问好，她也和蔼地回应了我。

original: TYRION: Did anything seem off about her?
translation: TYRION: 她看起来有什么不对劲吗？

original: MIRIAM: ...No,[p/] but it was a very short encounter.
translation: MIRIAM: ……没有。[p/]我们就简单寒暄了一下。

original: MIRIAM: It’s not as if we stopped to have a conversation.
translation: MIRIAM: 我们也没有停下来聊天。

original: TYRION: You said that you greeted her,[p/] and she responded.
translation: TYRION: 你说你向她问了好，[p/]然后她回应了你。

original: Tyrion: What did she say?
translation: Tyrion: 她具体怎么回应的？

original: MIRIAM: W-[p/]Why is that important? [h="It's not important at all.|So why?" e="af" /]
translation: MIRIAM: 这、[p/]这重要吗？[h="这不重要。|但是为什么？" e="af" /]

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega,[p/] it’s possible that someone used [b]illusion[/b] magic that day.
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士，[p/]当天可能有人使用了[b]幻象术[/b]类魔法。

original: TYRION: [i]Every[/i] detail about the victim’s interactions could be important.
translation: TYRION: 关于与被害人互动的[i]每个[/i]细节都可能很重要。

original: MIRIAM: Well...[p/] I bid her good morning.
translation: MIRIAM: 那好吧……[p/]我跟她说“上午好”。

original: MIRIAM: She said,[p/] “Good morning” in response.
translation: MIRIAM: “上午好，”[p/]她是这么答复我的。

original: Miriam: She was walking towards me.[p/] So I bid her good morning, and she responded in kind.
translation: Miriam: 她正好向我这边走过来，[p/]所以我向她说“上午好”，她也和蔼地回应了我。

original: TYRION: And you’re certain that nothing seemed off about her.
translation: TYRION: 你也确定她看起来没什么异样。

original: MIRIAM: Y-[p/][s/]Yes.[p/] Like I said,[p/] it was a very short encounter. [h="I don't understand...|Why did she say that...?" e="af"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 是、[p/][s/]是的。[p/]就像我说的，[p/]只是一次简短的寒暄。[h="我还是不明白……|她为什么要那样说……？" e="af"/]

original: MIRIAM: It only happened over a few seconds.
translation: MIRIAM: 前后也就几秒钟吧。

original: AriaC: The witness’s interactions are not what’s important here.
translation: AriaC: 证人的交流内容无关紧要。

original: AriaC: What matters is that she [i]witnessed[/i] where the victim was coming from and where she went afterward.
translation: AriaC: 重要的是她[i]目击了[/i]被害人从哪里来。又去了哪里。

original: TYRION: Did you [i]see[/i] her enter the library?
translation: TYRION: 你有[i]看见[/i]她走进图书馆吗？

original: MIRIAM: ...I didn’t,[p/] but there’s not much else in that direction.
translation: MIRIAM: ……我没有。[p/]但那个方向没有其他房间了。

original: AriaC: From the testimony of Jan Hughes,[p/] we know that she later came from the library.
translation: AriaC: 从简·休斯的证词来看，[p/]她晚些时候又从图书馆的方向走过来。

original: AriaC: Even if she didn’t enter the library,[p/] she was still in that area for more than an hour.
translation: AriaC: 所以说即使她没有进入图书馆，[p/]这一个多小时她也就在那附近。

original: TYRION: How long did you leave your dorm room?
translation: TYRION: 你离开宿舍有多久？

original: MIRIAM: Only for a few minutes.[p/] I try not to let my breaks go for too long.
translation: MIRIAM: 只有几分钟。[p/]我尽量不让自己休息太久。

original: TYRION: And you didn’t see the professor again after your first encounter?
translation: TYRION: 你在第一次见面后就再也没见过教授了？

original: MIRIAM: No.[p/] I did not.
translation: MIRIAM: 没有。

original: CELESTE: Her testimony seems pretty straightforward,[p/] but she could still be lying...
translation: CELESTE: 她的证词非常直白，[p/]但仍可能有所隐瞒……

original: TYRION: I’m honestly not sure...
translation: TYRION: 说实话我不确定……

original: TYRION: We’ll just have to focus on her statements about how Bellwether acted.
translation: TYRION: 我们应该专注分析那些与贝尔维瑟行为有关的证词。

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega.[p/] If I recall correctly,[p/] you have a habit of getting absorbed in your work.
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士。[p/]如果我没记错，[p/]你在学习工作时一向全神贯注。

original: TYRION: So much so,[p/] that you’ll even lose track of the time of day.
translation: TYRION: 甚至会因过于专心致志而忘记时间。

original: MIRIAM: If [i]I[/i] recall correctly,[p/] you pulled that information out of me through your lies.
translation: MIRIAM: [i]我[/i]没记错的话，[p/]你是通过谎言诈出这个情报的。

original: TYRION: ...Regardless,[p/] earlier in today’s proceedings,[p/] the prosecutor made the following argument:
translation: TYRION: ……尽管如此。[p]在今日庭审的早些时候，[p/]检方提出了如下主张：

original: AriaC: Our first witness saw Bellwether leave the meeting with the headmaster.
translation: AriaC: 第一位目击者看到了贝尔维瑟离开校长室。

original: AriaC: [i]That[/i] would time this encounter around 1:00 PM.
translation: AriaC: [i]这一点[/i]使这次相遇的时间确定在下午 1:00左右。

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega.[p/] If you had said “Good morning” to the professor,[p/] you would have been mistaken...
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士。[p/]如果你向教授道了“上午好”，[p/]那你可能搞错了时间……

original: TYRION: ...Because that encounter could have only happened during the afternoon.
translation: TYRION: ……因为这次见面只可能发生在午后。

original: AriaC: And your point is?
translation: AriaC: 那又如何？

original: AriaC: You said it yourself, Mr. Cuthbert.[p/] The witness simply lost track of time.
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生，你自己都说过了。[p/]证人只是忘记了时间。

original: TYRION: What the witness said isn’t what’s important here.
translation: TYRION: 证人说了什么并不重要。

original: TYRION: The significance is in [i]what[/i] the professor said in response.
translation: TYRION: 重要的是教授回复了[i]什么[/i]。

original: TYRION: She had just come out of a meeting that was scheduled for noon and ran for an hour.
translation: TYRION: 她刚刚结束一次预约好在正午进行的会面，并且待了一个小时。

original: TYRION: She would be well aware that it was no longer morning.
translation: TYRION: 她一定会注意到已经不是上午了。

original: TYRION: Wouldn’t she have corrected the witness?
translation: TYRION: 她不应该纠正一下证人吗？

original: AriaC: Their encounter was extremely short,[p/] and the victim’s mind may have been preoccupied.
translation: AriaC: 她们的交流十分短暂，[p/]被害人当时可能专注在其他的思考。

original: AriaC: She could have easily responded to the witness without thinking.
translation: AriaC: 她可能只是不经思索就回复了证人的问候。

original: CELESTE: I’m going to be honest.[p/] I kind of agree with her.
translation: CELESTE: 说句实话，[p/]我有点认同她这个说法。

original: CELESTE: It’s not hard to believe that they were both confused about the time.
translation: CELESTE: 两个人都没注意到时间也并不难理解。

original: It was definitely a stretch,[p/] but I still couldn't shake the feeling that Miriam was hiding something.
translation: 虽然是有些牵强，[p/]但我还是摆脱不掉米莉亚姆有所隐瞒的直觉。

original: Every time I asked her about how Bellwether acted that day,[p/] the Eye of Horus read a suspicious thought.
translation: 每当我问她贝尔维瑟当天的行为时[p/]荷鲁斯之眼总是捕捉到可疑的念头。

original: There [i]had[/i] to be something there.
translation: [i]肯定[/i]还有什么东西。

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega.[p/] You haven’t been entirely truthful in your testimony, have you?
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士。[p/]你在作证时没有完全说真话，不是吗？

original: MIRIAM: T-[p/][s/]That’s absurd![p/][s/] What reason would I have to lie?! [h="It’s such a small detail!|Why does he even care?!" e="af"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 荒、[p/][s/]荒谬！[p/][s/]我为什么要说谎？！[h="那只是个小细节而已！他为什么会在意这个？！" e="af"/]

original: Tyrion: [i]Every[/i] detail about how she acted is important, Ms. Frega.
translation: Tyrion: 她的[i]每一个[/i]行为的细节都很重要，弗雷加女士。

original: Tyrion: What [i]aren't[/i] you telling us?
translation: Tyrion: 你[i]还有什么[/i]没告诉我们？

original: AriaC: Mr. Cuthbert,[p/] you have no basis to accuse the witness of perjury.
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生，[p/]你并没有指控证人作伪证的根据。

original: JUDGE: Y-[p/][s/]Yes![p/][s/] You will stop this at once!
translation: JUDGE: 是、[p/][s/]是的！[p/][s/]请你马上停止！

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega,[p/][s/] you're [i]lying[/i] about how Bellwether responded to your greeting, aren’t you?!
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士，[p/][s/]你[i]说谎[/i]了，贝尔维瑟并不是那样回应的，对吧？！

original: MIRIAM: I-[p/][s/]I... [h="It doesn’t make a difference...|All she did was yell at me..." e="af"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 我、[p/][s/]我…… [h="那又有什么不同……|她只不过吼了我……" e="af"/]

original: “All she did was yell”?
translation: “她只不过吼了我”？

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega.[p/] Is it possible that Bellwether’s response was less than friendly?
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士，[p/]贝尔维瑟对你的态度是不是不怎么友好？

original: MIRIAM: W-[p/][s/]What do you care?![p/][s/] What difference does it make?! [h="This peasant!|Why is he being so persistent?!" e="af"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 关、[p/][s/]关你什么事？！[p/][s/]那又有什么区别？！ [h="这个贱民！|他为什么这么坚持？！" e="af"/]

original: TYRION: My job is to make sure [i]every[/i] part of your testimony is truthful!
translation: TYRION: 我的工作就是确保你的证言[i]句句属实[/i]！

original: TYRION: [i]Every[/i] detail matters,[p/][s/] no matter how seemingly insignificant!
translation: TYRION: [i]每个细节[/i]都很重要。[p/][s/]看似无关紧要的细节，也可能暗藏玄机！

original: JUDGE: Mr. Cuthbert![p/] You [i]will[/i] stop this,[p/][s/] or I will find you in contempt!
translation: JUDGE: 卡斯伯特先生！[p/]你[i]如果[/i]再不停止，[p/][s/]我就会判你藐视法庭罪！

original: TYRION: The professor yelled at you,[p/] didn’t she, Ms. Frega?!
translation: TYRION: 教授吼了你，[p/]没错吧，弗雷加女士？！

original: MIRIAM: Yeah?![p/][s/] So what if she did?!
translation: MIRIAM: 是啊？！[p/][s/] 是又怎么样？！

original: AriaC: ...!
translation: AriaC: ……！

original: MIRIAM: E-[p/][s/]Er...[p/] I mean...
translation: MIRIAM: 呃、[p/][s/]那个……[p/]我想说的是……

original: TYRION: ...I'm sorry,[p/] but we all clearly heard what you just said.
translation: TYRION: ……抱歉，[p/] 但你刚才那句话我们都听得很清楚。

original: TYRION: So,[p/] you [i]do[/i] admit that she yelled at you.
translation: TYRION: 也就是说，[p/]你[i]承认[/i]她吼过你。

original: MIRIAM: Agh![p/][s/] You impertinent little-!
translation: MIRIAM: 啊！[p/][s/]你这个不要脸的——！

original: MIRIAM: Yes![p/][s/] I admit it![p/][s/] The professor [i]didn’t[/i] greet me back that day!
translation: MIRIAM: 没错！[p/][s/]我认了行吧！[p/][s/]那天，教授[i]并没有[/i]向我问好！

original: MIRIAM: Oh.[p/] Good morning, professor.
translation: MIRIAM: 噢。[p/]上午好，教授。

original: CATHERINE: Be quiet!
translation: CATHERINE: 安静！

original: MIRIAM: ...?!
translation: MIRIAM: ……？！

original: MIRIAM: She yelled at me to “Be quiet!”
translation: MIRIAM: 她吼我，让我“安静”！

original: MIRIAM: But until then,[p/] we had always been nothing but courteous with each other...
translation: MIRIAM: 在此之前，[p/]我们相处一直很客气的……

original: MIRIAM: I don’t know what got into her that day,[p/] but something had put her in a foul mood.
translation: MIRIAM: 也不知道她那天是遇到什么事了……[p/]惹得她一肚子邪火。

original: MIRIAM: B-[p/][s/]But that’s it![p/][s/] Everything else I said was the truth! [h="I [i]am[/i] telling the truth!|That's all she did!" e="a"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 但、[p/][s/]但是也就这样了！[p/][s/]我说的都是事实！ [h="我说的[i]都是[/i]事实！|她的行为就是这些了！" e="a"/]

original: MIRIAM: I [i]did[/i] see her come out of the Headmaster’s Office and walk towards the library! [h="She walked past me!|[i]That[/i] part was true!"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 我[i]的确[/i]见到她离开校长室，前往图书馆！ [g="她就从我身边走过！|[i]这[/i]句是实话！"/]

original: So, she [i]wasn’t[/i] lying about that...
translation: 所以，她在这件事上[i]没有[/i]说谎……

original: AriaC: So,[p/] is that all, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 那么，[p/]然后呢，卡斯伯特先生？

original: TYRION: ...What do you mean, “is that all”?!
translation: TYRION: ……什么叫“然后呢”？！

original: AriaC: You badgered this witness,[p/] all so you could prove...[p/] [i]what[/i] exactly?
translation: AriaC: 你纠缠这位证人，[p/]而你证明的不过是……[p/]到底证明了[i]什么[/i]呢？

original: TYRION: The witness committed perjury—
translation: TYRION: 这名证人作了伪证——

original: AriaC: The witness changed a [i]small[/i] detail of her testimony.
translation: AriaC: 证人不过是更正了证词中的一个[i]小小[/i]细节。

original: AriaC: A detail that is inconsequential to the case.
translation: AriaC: 一个与案件没什么关系的细节。

original: AriaC: It was clearly an act with no malicious intent.
translation: AriaC: 这个行为显然没有恶意。

original: After seeing her thoughts,[p/] it was difficult to disagree with that.
translation: 读取她的想法后，[p/]要反对这个解释很困难。

original: I was so sure that the Eye would give me a thread to pull on,[p/] but she was only lying to save face.
translation: 我确信荷鲁斯之眼能助力我推动庭审，[p/]但她只是因为维护面子才说了谎。

original: AriaC: The witness saw the victim leave the Headmaster’s Office and head toward the library.
translation: AriaC: 证人看到被害人离开校长室，走向图书馆。

original: AriaC: Do you have any concrete evidence to refute [i]that[/i], Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 你有任何可以反驳[i]这个事实[/i]的确实证据吗，卡斯伯特先生？

original: TYRION: ...N[p/][s/]-No...[p/] I guess not.
translation: TYRION: ……没、[p/][s/]没有……[p/]我想没有。

original: CELESTE: W-[p/][s/]Wait![p/][s/] Is this really okay?!
translation: CELESTE: 等、[p/][s/]等一下！[p/][s/]就这么算了吗？！

original: CELESTE: At this rate,[p/][s/] this will be the only chance you have to cross-examine her!
translation: CELESTE: 这样下去，[p/][s/]你之后再也没机会对她进行交叉询问了啊！

original: TYRION: I don’t think she’s lying anymore,[p/] and I was really pushing my luck earlier...
translation: TYRION: 我不认为她还有说谎，[p/]而且刚才我也确实太冒进了……

original: TYRION: If I continue pressing her,[p/] the judge might [i]actually[/i] charge me with contempt...
translation: TYRION: 我要是再追问下去，[p/]法官恐怕[i]真的要[/i]指控我藐视法庭了……

original: But if Miriam wasn’t the one who was lying,[p/] then...
translation: 但如果米莉亚姆不是说谎的那个人，[p/]那么……

original: TYRION: The defense has no further questions for the witness, Ms. Steelwind.
translation: TYRION: 辩方对证人没有其他疑问了，斯蒂尔文德检察官。

original: The prosecutor stayed silent for a while.
translation: 检察官沉默了片刻。

original: ...She almost looked disappointed.
translation: ……她看起来似乎有点失望。

original: AriaC: Very well.[p/] Miriam,[p/] you are dismissed.
translation: AriaC: 那好吧。[p/]米莉亚姆，[p/]你可以离开了。

original: MIRIAM: Hmph...
translation: MIRIAM: 哼……

original: Miriam shot me a look of disdain,[p/] but she left the room without protest.
translation: 米莉亚姆轻蔑地瞪了我一眼，[p/]但也没有再抗议，就这么离开了。

original: The judge let out a sigh as the young noble was escorted out of the room.
translation: 看到那位年轻贵族被护送离开后，法官叹了一口气。

original: It was as if he were expecting the young noble to literally explode at any moment.
translation: 看起来他认为那位大小姐随时可能字面意义上地失控。

original: AriaC: Now with that out of the way...[p/] What else do you have, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 现在，既然这一节揭过去了……[p/]你还剩下什么手段吗，卡斯伯特先生？

original: The only way to refute the prosecution’s theory was to cast doubt on one of the witnesses.
translation: 想反驳检方的主张只有一个办法，那就是证明其中一名证人很可疑。

original: If it wasn’t Miriam,[p/] then...
translation: 如果米莉亚姆不行，[p/]那么……

original: TYRION: Steelwind.[p/] To test your theory,[p/] we must question every witness who saw the victim that day.
translation: TYRION: 斯蒂尔文德。[p/]为了验证你的主张，[p/]我们必须询问每一名目击到被害人的证人。

original: TYRION: So,[p/] with that said,[p/] the defense would like to call Jan Hughes to the stand.
translation: TYRION: 因此……[p/]辩方希望传唤简·休斯出庭作证。

original: AriaC: ...I hope you understand, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: AriaC: ……卡斯伯特先生，我希望你想清楚当前的情况。

original: AriaC: Your entire case rests on the assumption that one of the witness accounts is incorrect.
translation: AriaC: 你要是想翻盘，前提是其中一名证人的证词有误。

original: AriaC: If your cross-examination of Mr. Hughes leads nowhere,[p/] then I hope you’re ready to concede.
translation: AriaC: 如果对休斯先生的交叉询问也没有揭示新情报，[p/]届时希望你做好认输的准备。

original: I didn't like the sound of it,[p/] but she was right.
translation: 我不喜欢这个说法，[p/]但她没有错。

original: Unless I could find...[p/][s/] [i]something[/i] in Jan’s testimony,[p/] I wouldn't have a case at all.
translation: 除非……[p/][s/]我能在简的证词里找到[i]什么[/i]，[p/]我就走投无路。

original: AriaC: Bailiff,[p/] please bring in Mr. Hughes.
translation: AriaC: 法警，[p/]请将休斯先生带上来。

original: AriaC: Witness,[p/] please state your name and occupation for the courtroom.
translation: AriaC: 证人，[p/]请向法庭告知你的姓名与职业。

original: JAN: ...
translation: JAN: ……

original: AriaC: Witness![p/][s/] Name and occupation!
translation: AriaC: 证人！[p/][s/]姓名和职业！

original: JAN: A-[p/][s/]Ah,[p/][s/] right.
translation: JAN: 啊、[p/][s/]啊，[p/][s/]明白。

original: JAN: My name is Jan Hughes.[p/] I’m on the cleaning staff of the academy.
translation: JAN: 我叫简·休斯，[p/]是学院的清洁工。

original: AriaC: ...Mr. Hughes,[p/] please testify to the court about your encounter with the professor that day.
translation: AriaC: ……休斯先生，[p/]请你就当天与教授的相遇向法院作证。

original: JAN: ...Alright.
translation: JAN: ……好。

original: Jan: I saw the professor when I was cleaning the west-wing hallways.[p/] It was about 20-30 minutes before the body was discovered.
translation: Jan: 我是在清理西侧走廊的时候看到教授的，[p/]当时大概是在发现尸体的 20 到 30 分钟之前。

original: Jan: She walked by me,[p/] but she looked pretty out of it.
translation: Jan: 她从我身旁走过，[p/]但她看起来十分不正常。

original: Jan: I heard she was undead when this happened...[p/] Pretty creepy if you ask me.
translation: Jan: 事发后听说她当时已经是僵尸一样的生物了……[p/]真把我吓坏了。

original: Jan: After that,[p/] she went into the empty classroom.
translation: Jan: 在那之后，[p/]她进了一间空教室。

original: TYRION: Well...[p/] That was[p/] straightforward.
translation: TYRION: 好吧……[p/]这证言……[p/]很直白清晰。

original: CELESTE: Come on, Jan![p/][s/] What are we supposed to do with that?!
translation: CELESTE: 别这样，简！[p/][s/]你这样我们怎么办呀？！

original: JAN: I don’t know.[p/] [i]You[/i] guys are the lawyers.
translation: JAN: 我怎么知道，[p/][i]你们[/i]才是律师。

original: JAN: I’m just telling you what I saw.
translation: JAN: 我只是把我看到的说出来而已。

original: TYRION: How are you so sure that it was 30 minutes before?
translation: TYRION: 你为什么如此确定是 30 分钟前？

original: JAN: I always check the time to make sure I’m on schedule.
translation: JAN: 我经常确认时间，来保证自己按时间表进行工作。

original: JAN: I was supposed to finish cleaning the halls by 3:00 pm.
translation: JAN: 我本应在下午 3:00 完成大厅的清理工作。

original: :Right...[p/] The body was discovered at 3:04 PM.
translation: :没错……[p/]尸体被发现的时间是下午 3:04。

original: AriaC: What was the "professor" like, Mr. Hughes?
translation: AriaC: “教授”看起来是什么样子，休斯先生？

original: Jan: She walked by me...[p/] But she looked pretty out of it.
translation: Jan: 她从我身旁走过……[p/]但她看起来十分不正常。

original: TYRION: Did anything else look off about her?
translation: TYRION: 她看起来有什么不对劲的地方吗？

original: JAN: Yeah, probably.[p/] She [i]was[/i] an undead after all.
translation: JAN: 是啊，应该吧。[p/]她那会儿已经是[i]僵尸[/i]了嘛。

original: TYRION: That remains to be proven.
translation: TYRION: 这一点还有待证明。

original: JAN: If you say so...
translation: JAN: 你这么说也行吧……

original: TYRION: Anyways,[p/] what was her demeanor like?
translation: TYRION: 总之，[p/]她当时的神态举止如何？

original: Jan: She looked like she was in a bad mood.
translation: Jan: 她当时看起来心情不太好。

original: Jan: Either that or she was tired,[p/] but I guess she was actually just dead...
translation: Jan: 也可能是她太累了，[p/]不过现在一想，她那会儿已经死了……

original: Jan: I heard she was undead. Which is pretty creepy because she pushed me out of her way.
translation: Jan: 我听说她已经是死尸了。这事真挺吓人的，因为当时她把我推开了。

original: Jan: I heard she was undead. Which is pretty creepy because she knocked over a vase.
translation: Jan: 我听说她已经是死尸了。这事真挺吓人的，因为她当时撞倒了一个花瓶。

original: Jan: I heard she was undead. Which is pretty creepy because she yelled at me.
translation: Jan: 我听说她已经是死尸了。这事真挺吓人的，因为她当时朝我大吼大叫。

original: TYRION: Did you see anyone else enter that classroom?
translation: TYRION: 你有看见别人进那间教室吗？

original: JAN: I’m honestly not sure.[p/] I wasn't paying much attention to her.
translation: JAN: 我不太确定。[p/]我没太注意她。

original: JAN: I [i]did[/i] think it was weird that she went in there.
translation: JAN: 我当时[i]是[/i]觉得她进那间教室很奇怪。

original: JAN: With the funky smell,[p/] I can't think of any reason why someone would go there.
translation: JAN: 教室里味道那么难闻，[p/]真不敢想有什么原因能让人主动进去。

original: CELESTE: He’s not giving us a lot to work with...
translation: CELESTE: 他的证言没留给我们什么突破口……

original: TYRION: He tends to leave out details unless we directly ask him about them.
translation: TYRION: 除非我们主动问他，不然他会在证言里遗漏很多细节。

original: TYRION: I just need to ask him the right questions.
translation: TYRION: 只要问对问题就好。

original: TYRION: Maybe we can pull more information out of him.
translation: TYRION: 或许能从他身上获取更多信息。

original: TYRION: I believe you’ve forgotten a few details about what the professor did.
translation: TYRION: 有关教授当时的所作所为，我想你漏掉了一些细节。

original: JAN: Yeah...?
translation: Jan: 是哦……？

original: Jan: Sorry,[p/] it’s hard to remember these things sometimes...
translation: Jan: 抱歉，[p/]有些时候我记不清这些事……

original: Did she do anything to you?
translation: 她有对你做什么吗？

original: TYRION: Did she interact with you at all?
translation: TYRION: 她和你有过任何互动吗？

original: JAN: Oh...[p/] yeah...
translation: JAN: 哦……[p/]对……
