original: JAN: I didn’t notice her at first and I accidentally got in her way.
translation: JAN: 我最开始没注意到她，不小心挡了她的路。

original: JAN: She shoved me to the side and kept walking forward.
translation: JAN: 她把我推到一边然后继续往前走。

original: Did she touch anything?
translation: 她有碰到什么吗？

original: TYRION: Did she touch anything?
translation: TYRION: 她有碰到什么东西吗？

original: JAN: She knocked over a vase and shattered it.
translation: JAN: 她撞倒了一个花瓶，那个花瓶摔碎了。

original: JAN: It [i]might[/i] have been an accident,[p/] but she’s done stuff like that on purpose before.
translation: JAN: 本来这[i]可能[/i]是个意外……[p/]但是她以前也故意做过类似的事情。

original: Did she make any sounds?
translation: 她有发出什么声音吗？

original: TYRION: Did you hear her make any sounds?
translation: TYRION: 你有听到她发出什么声音吗？

original: JAN: Oh...[p/] Yeah...
translation: JAN: 哦……[p/]对……

original: JAN: After she knocked over the vase,[p/] she yelled at me to [s/]“Be Quiet!”.
translation: JAN: 她撞倒花瓶之后，[p/]朝我大喊[s/]“安静！”。

original: JAN: ...But I didn’t even say anything.
translation: JAN: ……但我当时一个字都没说。

original: TYRION: This detail could be extremely important.
translation: TYRION: 这个细节可能至关重要。

original: TYRION: Please add it to your testimony, Mr. Hughes.
translation: TYRION: 请将此加到你的证言里，休斯先生。

original: JAN: Whatever you say, man...
translation: JAN: 随你啦……

original: TYRION: Mr. Hughes.[p/] You said that Bellwether yelled at you.
translation: TYRION: 休斯先生。[p/]你有提到贝尔维瑟向你吼过。

original: TYRION: What were her exact words?
translation: TYRION: 她朝你吼了什么？

original: JAN: Uh...[p/] I think she yelled at me to “Be Quiet!”.
translation: JAN: 唔……[p/]我记得她朝我吼道“安静！”。

original: AriaC: What...?
translation: AriaC: ……什么？

original: JAN: I thought it was weird.[p/] I didn’t even say anything.
translation: JAN: 我感觉很怪，[p/]因为当时我什么都没说。

original: JAN: But I know better than to talk back to her.
translation: JAN: 但我知道最好别跟她顶嘴。

original: TYRION: That’s the thing, Mr. Hughes.
translation: TYRION: 就是这个，休斯先生。

original: Tyrion: The prosecution’s theory is as follows:[p/] the professor was murdered in the library and was reanimated using [b]Animate Corpse[/b].
translation: Tyrion: 检方的立论是这样的：[p/]教授在图书馆被杀害，然后尸体被施放了[b]活化死尸[/b]。

original: TYRION: With a quick [b]illusion[/b] spell,[p/] no one would notice that she was undead.
translation: TYRION: 在某种[b]幻象术[/b]的伪装下，[p/]没人会注意到她是死尸。

original: TYRION: However,[p/][s/] if what you saw was [i]truly[/i] the undead Bellwether...
translation: TYRION: 不过，[p/][s/]如果你见到的[i]真的是[/i]活尸贝尔维瑟的话……

original: TYRION: ...How did she speak to you?!
translation: TYRION: ……她怎么可能和你说话？！

original: JAN: Huh...?
translation: JAN: 哈……？

original: AriaC: This...[p/][s/] can't be right!
translation: AriaC: 这……[p/][s/]这不可能！

original: TYRION: Mr. Hughes,[p/] undead can follow simple orders,[p/] but they don’t have the intelligence to speak.
translation: TYRION: 休斯先生，[p/]虽然活尸能遵从简单的命令，[p/但它们没有足够的智力来说话。

original: AriaC: Perhaps the witness was mistaken!
translation: AriaC: 或许证人搞错了！

original: JAN: N-[p/][s/]No![p/][s/] I’m sure I heard her yell at me!
translation: JAN: 不、[p/][s/]不是这样的！[p/][s/]我很清楚地记得她朝我吼过！

original: JAN: I remembered because what she said didn’t make any sense!
translation: JAN: 因为她吼得我一头雾水，所以我记得很清楚！

original: TYRION: Exactly![p/][s/] He didn’t say anything,[p/] but she still yelled at him to “Be quiet!”.
translation: TYRION: 正是如此！[p/][s/]他什么都没说，[p/]但她仍旧吼了“安静！”。

original: ...Wait a minute.
translation: ……等一下。

original: JUDGE: I’m...[p/] afraid I don’t understand.
translation: JUDGE: 我……[p/]恐怕不太理解。

original: JUDGE: We’ve already established that the victim was dead long before her encounter with Mr. Hughes.
translation: JUDGE: 我们已经确定，死者在遇到休斯先生之前就已经死了。

original: JUDGE: But...[p/] if what he saw wasn’t an undead,[p/][s/] what was it?
translation: JUDGE: 但……[p/]如果他所见的教授并非活尸，[p/][s/]那会是什么呢？

original: AriaC: It [i]had[/i] to be an undead!
translation: AriaC: 只能是活尸！

original: AriaC: What other explanation is there?!
translation: AriaC: 否则还能有什么解释？！

original: It couldn’t have been a [b]Major Illusion[/b].
translation: 不可能是[b]高等幻象术[/b]。

original: Otherwise,[p/] it wouldn’t have been able to shove Jan out of the way or knock over the vase.
translation: 否则，[p/]她当时也不可能把简推开或者撞倒花瓶。

original: Whatever it was,[p/] someone probably used an [b]Illusory Disguise[/b] to make it look like Bellwether.
translation: 无论那是什么，[p/]某人可能用了[b]幻象伪装[/b]来假扮贝尔维瑟。

original: Does that mean it [i]was[/i] a person?
translation: 也就说那[i]其实[/i]是个人在假扮？

original: No...[p/] If it were a person,[p/] how did Bellwether’s body end up in the lecture hall?
translation: 不对……[p/]如果是人假扮的话，[p/]那又如何解释贝尔维瑟的尸体在讲堂呢？

original: Bellwether wouldn’t have been able to turn herself invisible if she were dead.
translation: 如果贝尔维瑟死了，她也没办法隐身。

original: And whatever Jan saw,[p/] it needed to be something that could have transported Bellwether’s body unseen.
translation: 无论简看到了什么，[p/]一定得是某种能不被人发现，并转移贝尔维瑟尸体的东西。

original: It would have also needed to have a mass [i]and[/i] the ability to speak.
translation: 同时也得有实体[i]和[/i]说话的能力。

original: Or at the very least,[p/] it needs to be something that can recreate Bellwether’s voice.
translation: 或者说至少得是某种能模仿贝尔维瑟声音的东西。

original: What could have done that?
translation: 或者说至少得是某种能模仿贝尔维瑟声音的东西。

original: Construct
No...[p/] That wasn't right.
translation: 不……[p/]那肯定不对。

original: I remembered there was [i]something[/i] that could have recreated Bellwether's voice.
translation: 我记得有[i]一个[/i]能再现贝尔维瑟声音的东西。

original: TYRION: That’s it!
translation: TYRION: 就是这个！

original: AriaC: What...?!
translation: AriaC: ……什么？

original: TYRION: Everyone,[p/] the witness didn’t actually [i]hear[/i] the dead victim speaking.
translation: TYRION: 各位，,[p/]证人并没有[i]听到r[/i]已死的被害人说话。

original: TYRION: What he [i]actually[/i] heard was Bellwether's voice being recreated using magic.
translation: TYRION: 他听到贝尔维瑟的声音，[i]实际上[/i]是用魔法再现的。

original: AriaC: Are you trying to say that her voice was recreated using a spell...?
translation: AriaC: 你是想说她的声音是用某种法术产生的……？

original: TYRION: Not a spell, Steelwind.[p/] It was artificery.
translation: TYRION: 不是法术，斯蒂尔文德。[p/]是奥术装置。

original: TYRION: And whoever the murderer is,[p/] they had the perfect piece of artificery available to them.
translation: TYRION: 无论真凶是谁，[p/]学院里都有完美的奥术装置供其使用。

original: TYRION: One programmed with Catherine Bellwether’s voice.
translation: TYRION: 一个集成了凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟的声音的奥术装置。

original: AriaC: You can’t possibly mean—!
translation: AriaC: 你不会是要说——！

original: TYRION: That’s right, Steelwind!
translation: TYRION: 没错，斯蒂尔文德！

original: TYRION: What Mr. Hughes saw was an Arcane Construct!
translation: TYRION: 休斯先生当时看到的是一个奥术构造体！

original: JUDGE: An “Arcane Construct”?
translation: JUDGE: 一个“奥术构造体”？

original: TYRION: It is a magically animated suit of armor, Your Honor.
translation: TYRION: 法官阁下，那是一种由魔力驱动的盔甲。

original: JUDGE: But we ruled out such a possibility, hadn’t we?
translation: JUDGE: 但我们排除了这种可能性，不是吗？

original: JUDGE: Construct or not,[p/] no one could disguise themselves [i]and[/i] carry the body to the classroom.
translation: JUDGE: 无论是不是奥术构造体，[p/]都没人能在用法术伪装自己的同时，把尸体搬到教室。

original: TYRION: A person wouldn’t have been able to do it,[p/] but Arcane Constructs are a different thing entirely.
translation: TYRION: 人是做不到的，[p/]但奥数构造体是另一回事。

original: TYRION: Those suits of armor are extremely large,[p/] but more importantly,[p/][s/] they’re hollow!
translation: TYRION: 那些盔甲非常大，[p/]更重要的是，[p/][s/]它们是中空的！

original: JUDGE: That means that theoretically,[p/] someone could have placed the victim’s body inside it...
translation: JUDGE: 理论上来说，[p/]某人很可能把受害者的尸体放在里面……

original: TYRION: The Arcane Construct wouldn’t [i]just[/i] transport the body.
translation: TYRION: 奥术构造体[i]不只是[/i]转移尸体。

original: TYRION: With an [b]Illusory Disguise[/b],[p/] it would also confuse and mislead anyone who saw it!
translation: TYRION: 通过[b]幻象伪装[/b]，[p/]它还能误导所有看见它的人！

original: AriaC: I commend your deduction, Mr. Cuthbert.[p/] I would have never considered that possibility.
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生，我对你的推论表示赞赏，[p/]我确实没有想过这种可能性。

original: AriaC: It’s certainly plausible,[p/] but what does this prove exactly?
translation: AriaC: 这确实合理，[p/]但又证明了什么呢？

original: TYRION: It proves that the body wasn’t animated using [b]necromancy[/b].
translation: TYRION: 这证明了尸体没有被[b]死灵术[/b]活化。

original: TYRION: My client isn’t the murderer!
translation: TYRION: 我的委托人不是凶手！

original: AriaC: The defendant is still capable of performing all of the acts that you described.
translation: AriaC: 被告依然可以执行你描述的每一个行动。

original: AriaC: His [b]Compendium[/b] contains [b]Illusory Disguise[/b] after all.
translation: AriaC: 毕竟他的[b]法术汇编[/b]也包含了[b]幻象伪装[/b]。

original: TYRION: There were several students in the library that day.
translation: TYRION: 案发当天图书馆有许多学生。

original: TYRION: [i]Any[/i] of them could have committed the murder!
translation: TYRION: 他们中的[i]任何一个[/i]都有可能实施犯罪！

original: AriaC: One [i]might[/i] come to that conclusion,[p/] if they didn’t have one crucial piece of evidence.
translation: AriaC: 如果没有关键性的证据的话，[p/]是有可能得出这样的结论。

original: AriaC: I’d like to present a new piece of evidence to the court.
translation: AriaC: 那么我想向法庭提交新的证据。

original: From under her table,[p/] Steelwind pulled out Miriam Frega's bloody rapier.
translation: 斯蒂尔文德从桌子下拿出了一把沾血的刺剑。

original: JUDGE: A sword...?[p/][s/] I-[p/][s/]Is that...?!
translation: JUDGE: 是一把剑……？[p/][s/]那、[p/][s/]那就是……？

original: AriaC: Yes, Your Honor.
translation: AriaC: 是的，法官阁下。

original: AriaC: [i]This[/i] is the murder weapon.
translation: AriaC: [i]这[/i]就是凶器。

original: AriaC: This rapier was reported stolen by Miriam Frega weeks before the murder.
translation: AriaC: 在谋杀发生几周前，米莉亚姆·弗雷加通报称这把刺剑失窃。

original: AriaC: During the investigation,[p/] it was finally found in the [i]defendant’s[/i] locker.
translation: AriaC: 调查期间，[p/]我们在[i]被告的[/i]储物柜里找到了它。

original: TYRION: W-[p/][s/]Wait!
translation: Tyrion: 等、[p/][s/]等下！

original: AriaC: He was clearly trying to use one of her possessions in a paltry attempt to frame her.
translation: AriaC: 显然被告想利用米莉亚姆的所有物来陷害她。

original: AriaC: Why...[p/] he even stole her locker’s nameplate and placed it over his.
translation: AriaC: 他甚至……[p/]偷换了自己和弗雷加女士储物柜的名牌。

original: Damn it...[p/][s/] That wasn't what really happened!
translation: 糟糕……[p/][s/]事情不是这样的！

original: But honestly,[p/] it sounded more plausible than what [i]really[/i] took place...
translation: 但老实说，[p/]这听起来比[i]实际上[/i]的情况更合理……

original: CELESTE: ...We’re basically back to square one, aren’t we?
translation: CELESTE: ……我们基本是又回到了起点，不是吗？

original: CELESTE: Anyone could have told that Construct to do all those things.
translation: CELESTE: 谁都能让那些奥术构造体去做这些事。

original: Wait...[p/] Was that really true?
translation: 等一下……[p/]真的是这样吗？

original: The Construct transported the professor’s body,[p/] and someone used an [b]illusion[/b] to make it look like her.
translation: 奥术构造体搬运了教授的尸体，[p/]还被人用[b]幻象术[/b]伪装成贝尔维瑟的样子。

original: They even used a pre-recorded voice to make the illusion more convincing...
translation: 甚至用了提前录制好的声音，来使幻象更加可信……

original: Could [i]anyone[/i] have done that?
translation: 有[i]谁[/i]能做到这一点呢？

original: Theodore
No...[p/] The Constructs will take orders from anyone,[p/] but not all of their functions are enabled.
translation: 不对……[p/]谁都能给构造体下指令，[p/]但不是所有的功能都开放。

original: Who would have every function available to them?
translation: 谁会有完整的使用权限呢？

original: It was at that moment that several memories flooded back to me.
translation: 就在那时几条记忆在我的脑海中闪现。

original: JAN: Uh...[p/] I think she yelled at me to “Be quiet”.
translation: JAN: 唔……[p/]我记得她朝我吼道“安静！”。

original: MIRIAM: Until then,[p/] we had always been nothing but courteous with each other...
translation: MIRIAM: 在此之前，[p/]我们相处一直很客气的……

original: MIRIAM: I don’t know what got into her that day,[p/] but something put her in a foul mood.
translation: MIRIAM: 也不知道她那天是遇到什么事了……[p/]惹得她一肚子邪火。

original: Catherine: Be quiet!
translation: Catherine: 安静！

original: TYRION: S-[p/][s/]Sorry!
translation: TYRION: 对、[p/][s/]对不起！

original: Catherine: BE QUIET!
translation: Catherine: <size=1.5em>安静！</size>

original: Eris giggled to herself.[p/] She was clearly amused by what was happening.
translation: 厄莉斯咯咯地笑了起来。[p/]她显然对发生的事情感到很好笑。

original: ERIS: The construct’s “voice” is an amalgam of pre-recorded phrases.
translation: ERIS: 奥术构造体的“声音”只是拼凑了一系列提前录制好的片段。

original: ERIS: I’m not sure if you noticed,[p/] but it uses the voice of Professor Bellwether.
translation: ERIS: 不知道你有没有注意到，[p/]它用的是贝尔维瑟教授的声音。

original: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] I knew there was something wrong with it.
translation: Celeste: 唔……[p/]我就觉得有些怪怪的。

original: ERIS: Unfortunately,[p/] you can’t make them say anything other than basic responses.
translation: ERIS: 不过遗憾的是，[p/]它们只能做一些基本的答复。

original: ERIS: Only the headmaster can change those settings.
translation: ERIS: 只有校长能更改这些设定。

original: TYRION: No...![p/][s/] Was it [i]him[/i] the entire time?!
translation: TYRION: 不会吧……！[p/][s/]一直以来，背后的人是[i]他[/i]？！

original: CELESTE: What is it, Tyrion?
translation: CELESTE: 怎么了，提利昂？

original: CELESTE: Did you figure something out?
translation: CELESTE: 你弄明白什么东西了吗？

original: TYRION: I-[p/][s/]I...[p/] did.
translation: TYRION: 我、[p/][s/]I我……[p/]想到了。

original: I didn't like where this was going,[p/] but with the way the pieces were laid out,[p/] there was only one explanation.
translation: 我不喜欢这个流向，[p/]但把细节拼在一起后，[p/]这就是唯一的解释。

original: TYRION: Steelwind,[p/] earlier you said that my client could have orchestrated this entire ruse,[p/] but that’s simply not true.
translation: TYRION: ……斯蒂尔文德。[p/]先前你提到我的委托人也能自导自演这一切，[p/]但这是不对的。

original: AriaC: How so?[p/] Anyone could have ordered the Construct to carry the victim’s body.
translation: AriaC: 怎么会？[p/]谁都能命令构造体运送尸体。

original: TYRION: Yes,[p/] but not everyone can [i]change[/i] what the Constructs are able to say.
translation: TYRION: 这确实不假，[p/]但不是所有人都有权限[i]更改[/i]构造体能说的话。

original: TYRION: Only one individual has the credentials for that...
translation: TYRION: 只有一个人有权限做到这一点……

original: TYRION: Theodore Redmond:[p/] Headmaster of the Imperial Academy!
translation: TYRION: 那就是西奥多·雷德蒙，[p/]帝国学院的校长！

original: CELESTE: Wait,[p/][s/] you’re not serious, are you?!
translation: CELESTE: 等下，[p/][s/]你不是认真的吧？！

original: CELESTE: You think the [i]headmaster[/i] did all this?!
translation: CELESTE: 你认为[i]校长[/i]是幕后黑手？！

original: TYRION: I...[p/] don’t want to believe it,[p/] but he’s the only person who [i]could[/i] have done it.
translation: TYRION: 我…….[p/]也不愿意相信，[p/]但他是唯一有[i]能力[/i]这么做的人。

original: AriaC: That’s completely ridiculous!
translation: AriaC: 这太荒谬了！

original: AriaC: Headmaster Redmond is 88 years old![p/][s/] He could [i]never[/i] do something like this!
translation: AriaC: 雷德蒙校长已经88岁了！[p/][s/]他[i]没有能力[/i]这么做！

original: TYRION: Steelwind,[p/] there’s one common element between each of the witnesses’ encounters with Bellwether.
translation: TYRION: 斯蒂尔文德，[p/]两位证人与贝尔维瑟接触时都有一个共同点。

original: TYRION: It’s what Bellwether said to them.
translation: TYRION: 就是贝尔维瑟对他们说的话。

original: AriaC: She yelled at both of them to “Be quiet!”...
translation: AriaC: 她都向目击者吼了一句“安静！”……

original: TYRION: Miriam Frega was particularly surprised.
translation: TYRION: 米莉亚姆·弗雷加对此特别惊讶。

original: TYRION: She had a good relationship with the professor,[p/] but when greeted by the professor,[p/] Bellwether just shouted at her.
translation: TYRION: 她与教授关系很好，[p/]但当她向教授问候时，[p/]贝尔维瑟却吼了回去。

original: TYRION: ...Almost as if the professor was responding indiscriminately.
translation: TYRION: ……仿佛教授是在不分对象的进行回答。

original: TYRION: And recall her encounter with Jan Hughes.
translation: TYRION: 也请回忆一下她遇到简·休斯的时候。

original: TYRION: The professor knocked over a vase and shouted at him to "Be quiet!" immediately after.
translation: TYRION: 教授撞倒了花瓶，然后立刻朝着休斯先生吼道“安静！”

original: TYRION: But he hadn’t said anything.
translation: TYRION: 但他当时什么都没说。

original: CELESTE: ...She was responding to the sound of the vase breaking!
translation: CELESTE: ……她当时是在对花瓶碎掉的声音做出反应！

original: TYRION: Now,[p/] let me ask you this, Steelwind.
translation: TYRION: 现在，[p/]我来问问你，斯蒂尔文德。

original: TYRION: Where did Bellwether come from [i]before[/i] she encountered Ms. Frega and Mr. Hughes?
translation: TYRION: 在遇到弗雷加女士和休斯先生[i]之前[/i]，贝尔维瑟是从哪里走过来的？

original: AriaC: Her meeting—
translation: AriaC: 她的会面——

original: TYRION: —With the headmaster.
translation: TYRION: ——与校长的会面。

original: JUDGE: It appears that the defense truly means to indict Theodore Redmond.
translation: JUDGE: 看来辩方真心打算起诉西奥多·雷德蒙。

original: JUDGE: If so,[p/] we have no choice but to take a brief recess until he can be brought here.
translation: JUDGE: 这样的话，[p/]我们别无选择，只能在他被护送至此之前短暂休庭。

original: Theodore: There’s no need.
translation: Theodore: 没有休庭的必要。

original: THEODORE: Fortunately for you,[p/] I was already in the gallery.
translation: THEODORE: 幸运的是，[p/]我本来就在旁听席上。

original: The headmaster stood up from the gallery behind me and slowly made his way onto the witness stand.
translation: 校长从我身后的旁观席上站起身，并慢慢地独自走上证人席。

original: ...Had he been here the entire time?
translation: ……他一直就在那里吗？

original: THEODORE: Now,[p/] please correct me if I’m wrong, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: THEODORE: 现在……[p/]如果我说的有问题，请纠正我，卡斯伯特先生。

original: THEODORE: But are you trying to say that [i]I[/i] am the one who committed this crime?
translation: THEODORE: 你是想说，[i]我[/i]就是实施了这次谋杀的人吗？

original: TYRION: ...I’m sorry, Mr. Redmond,[p/] but no matter how I look at it,[p/] everything I’ve found points to you.
translation: TYRION: ……抱歉，雷德蒙先生。[p/]无论我怎么看，[p/]一切的证据都指向你。

original: THEODORE: No,[p/] there’s no need to apologize.
translation: THEODORE: 不，[p/]你没必要道歉。

original: THEODORE: In fact,[p/] I should commend you on the lengths that you’re going to defend dear Wallace.
translation: THEODORE: 实际上，[p/]我应该向你为华莱士辩护到这一步致谢。

original: AriaC: ...The court appreciates your understanding, Mr. Redmond.
translation: AriaC: ……感谢您出庭，雷德蒙先生。

original: THEODORE: ... [h="How can she speak so cordially?|After [i]all[/i] she's done!" e="a" /]
translation: THEODORE: ……[h="她怎么还能这么亲切地说话？|而且是在做了[i]这么多[/i]事情之后！" e="a" /]

original: THEODORE: Now then...[p/] To clear the air,[p/] I suppose I should give [i]my[/i] testimony on what happened that day.
translation: THEODORE: 好了……[p/]为了消除误会，[p/][i]我[/i]应该向法庭陈述那天发生了什么。

original: Theodore: That day,[p/] I had a meeting scheduled with the professor at noon.
translation: Theodore: 那天，[p/]我和教授约好在中午见面。

original: Theodore: She showed up at the expected time,[p/] and we discussed various administrative matters.
translation: Theodore: 她准时到场，[p/]我们一起探讨了许多管理方面的事项。

original: Theodore: Our meeting went on for an hour.[p/] After which, she left to prepare for her next class.
translation: Theodore: 我们的会谈持续了一小时，[p/]在那之后，她便离开去准备下一堂课。

original: Theodore: Despite our many disagreements,[p/] we still knew how to be civil with one another.
translation: Theodore: 虽然有许多分歧，[p/]但我们都知道尊重对方。

original: Theodore: After all,[p/] I had no reason to bear a personal grudge against her.
translation: Theodore: 毕竟，[p/]我没有理由对她怀恨在心。

original: CELESTE: I...[p/] just can’t see it.
translation: CELESTE: 我……[p/]我就是不理解。

original: CELESTE: He seems like such a nice old man.
translation: CELESTE: 他看起来就是位和蔼的老人。

original: CELESTE: Is he [i]really[/i] the killer we’re looking for?
translation: CELESTE: 他[i]真的是[/i]我们要找的真凶吗？

original: TYRION: He has to be.[p/] No one else could have orchestrated this entire plot.
translation: TYRION: 只能是他。[p/]除了他没有人能做到这一切。

original: I just needed to find out how to prove it...
translation: 我只是得找到证明的方法……

original: TYRION: What was this meeting for?
translation: TYRION: 会面是为了什么？

original: THEODORE: Oh,[p/] nothing of note.
translation: THEODORE: 哦，[p/]没什么重要的。

original: THEODORE: We were merely discussing her daily operations and duties within the academy.
translation: THEODORE: 我们只是简单讨论了她在学院的日常工作和职责。

original: THEODORE: In an academy such as ours,[p/] it is beneficial to regularly communicate with the staff.
translation: THEODORE: 在我们这样的学院里，[p/]经常与员工沟通有助于学院发展。

original: TYRION: So, she showed up at [i]exactly[/i] 12:00 PM?
translation: TYRION: 所以说她[i]准时[/i]在 12:00 赴约了？

original: THEODORE: More or less.
translation: THEODORE: 差不多吧。

original: THEODORE: Catherine Bellwether was many things,[p/] but she was never tardy.
translation: THEODORE: 凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟可能有许多缺点，[p/]但她从不迟到。

original: There weren’t any witnesses who saw her before the meeting.
translation: 在会面发生之前没有任何目击证人。

original: So, I didn't have a way to disprove what he’s saying.
translation: 所以，我没有证伪这个发言的根据。

original: I needed to look elsewhere in his testimony.
translation: 我需要仔细查看他证词里的其他地方。

original: AriaC: How long did this meeting last, Headmaster?
translation: AriaC: 校长，这次会面持续了多久？

original: Theodore: Our meeting went on for an hour.[p/] After which, she left.[p/] Presumably to prepare for her next class.
translation: Theodore: 我们的会谈持续了一小时，[p/]在那之后，她便离开去准备下一堂课。

original: TYRION: So that means the professor left your office at 1:00 PM?
translation: TYRION: 意思是教授在下午 1:00 离开了你的办公室？

original: THEODORE: Yes.[p/] She was quite adamant about taking time to prepare her lesson plans.
translation: THEODORE: 没错。[p/]她固执地要留出时间来备课。

original: Now that I thought about it,[p/] Miriam had no idea what the time was when she saw Bellwether.
translation: 现在想起来，[p/]米莉亚姆并不知道她看到贝尔维瑟时是几点。

original: If the headmaster [i]was[/i] lying about when the meeting ended,[p/] there’d be no way to verify it.
translation: 即使校长在会谈结束的时间上[i]说谎[/i]，[p/]我也没有办法证明这一点。

original: Which would account for the “hour gap” that Steelwind mentioned.
translation: 这也就解释了斯蒂尔文德提到的“一小时间隔”。

original: Damn it...[p/] Did the headmaster really do this?
translation: 可恶……[p/]校长真的是凶手吗？

original: TYRION: After hearing so much about her...[p/] I find that a little hard to believe.
translation: TYRION: 了解了更多关于她的事之后……[p/]我发现有点难以相信。

original: THEODORE: ...I can see why you’d say that,[p/] but despite everything,[p/] I was still her superior.
translation: THEODORE: ……我明白你为什么这么说，[p/]但不论如何，[p/]我还是她的上司。

original: THEODORE: She always remained professional when speaking with me.
translation: THEODORE: 她在和我沟通时总是保持着专业风范。

original: Was that really true, though?
translation: 不过，真的是这样吗？

original: TYRION: Really?[p/] Even after the way she’s acted toward the students and faculty?
translation: TYRION: 真的吗？[p/]即使她对学生和教职员工是那种态度？

original: THEODORE: Make no mistake,[p/] I’ve heard many complaints regarding her actions.
translation: THEODORE: 不要误会，[p/]我收到过许多针对她行为的举报。

original: THEODORE: And I’ve had many conversations with her to attempt to correct her behavior.
translation: THEODORE: 我也和她谈过很多次，尝试纠正她的行为。

original: THEODORE: At the end of the day,[p/] however,[p/] she [i]was[/i] a remarkable professor.
translation: THEODORE: 归根结底，[p/]她[i]仍然[/i]是一位出色的教授。

original: THEODORE: ...Regardless of her lack of people skills.
translation: THEODORE: ……只是为人方面的确有所缺失。

original: CELESTE: His testimony pretty much matches what we know so far.
translation: CELESTE: 他的证言与我们所知的内容基本一致。

original: TYRION: I’m not entirely sure if he’s lying or not.
translation: TYRION: 我不太确定他是否在说谎。

original: TYRION: At the very least,[p/] we know that he was involved in the professor’s murder.
translation: TYRION: 但至少，[p/]我们能确定他与教授的谋杀案有关。

original: First,[p/] I would need to make his motive clear.
translation: 首先，[p/]我需要弄清楚他的动机。

original: TYRION: Redmond.[p/] Did you really hold no animosity toward Professor Bellwether?
translation: TYRION: 雷德蒙，[p/]你真的对贝尔维瑟教授没有敌意吗？

original: THEODORE: Of course not.
translation: THEODORE: 当然没有。

original: THEODORE: I [i]did[/i] have strong opinions about how she treated the students,[p/] but I always remained professional.[p/] We both did.
translation: THEODORE: 我对她对待学生的方式[i]确实[/i]持有强烈的意见，[p/]但这只是工作层面。[p/]我们都是如此。

original: TYRION: Frankly,[p/] I find that hard to believe.
translation: TYRION: 说实话，[p/]我很难相信这一点。

original: TYRION: In fact,[p/] I think you might have had a [i]very[/i] good reason to murder the professor.
translation: TYRION: 实际上，[p/]我倒是认为你有[i]强烈的[/i]谋杀动机。

original: TYRION: ...Considering that she was going to take your job.
translation: TYRION: ……因为她马上要取代你的校长位置。

original: THEODORE: S-[p/][s/]So you knew about that...
translation: THEODORE: 所、[p/][s/]所以说你知道这件事……

original: AriaC: I’m sorry,[p/] but I don’t follow.
translation: AriaC: 对不起，[p/]但我跟不上这段对话。

original: AriaC: Just [i]how[/i] was the professor going to take the headmaster’s job?
translation: AriaC: 教授[i]怎么能[/i]取代校长的位置？

original: TYRION: According to Miriam Frega,[p/] Catherine Bellwether was currying favor with the school board.
translation: TYRION: 根据米莉亚姆·弗雷加所述，[p/]凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟一直在巴结学院董事会。

original: TYRION: In fact,[p/] there was a plan to oust Mr. Redmond and appoint Bellwether as the new headmaster of the academy.
translation: TYRION: 实际上，[p/]最近贵族们也计划罢免雷德蒙先生，并任命贝尔维瑟作为学院新校长。

original: AriaC: W-[p/][s/]What?!
translation: AriaC: 什、[p/][s/]什么？！

original: AriaC: ...B-[p/][s/]But in any case,[p/] I doubt that the headmaster had [i]any[/i] idea of this until now.
translation: AriaC: ……但、[p/][s/]但无论如何，[p/]我认为校长直到现在才知道这件事。

original: TYRION: I’d like to remind the court of the witness’s reaction just now.
translation: TYRION: 我想请法庭回忆证人刚刚的反应。

original: TYRION: He said,[p/] “So you knew about that...”
translation: TYRION: 他说， [p/]“所以说你知道这件事……”

original: TYRION: His reaction was one of surprise,[p/] but he wasn’t surprised [i]by[/i] this information.
translation: TYRION: 他确实感到惊讶，[p/]但并非因为这个消息本身。

original: TYRION: He was surprised that I [i]knew[/i] this information!
translation: TYRION: 而是对我[i]知道[/i]这件事而感到惊讶！

original: AriaC: T-[p/][s/]That’s-!
translation: AriaC: 这、[p/][s/]这是——！

original: THEODORE: ...Please,[p/] dear Aria.
translation: THEODORE: ……别这样，[p/]亲爱的阿莉亚。

original: THEODORE: I may be a frail old man,[p/] but I’m perfectly capable of defending myself.
translation: THEODORE: 我可能是个孱弱的老头子，[p/]但是我还有自己辩护的能力。

original: TYRION: If you have an explanation, Mr. Redmond,[p/] then by all means,[p/] I’d love to hear it.
translation: TYRION: 如果你对此有任何解释，雷德蒙先生，[p/]我洗耳恭听。

original: THEODORE: ...Gladly.
translation: THEODORE: ……乐意至极。

original: Theodore: It [i]is[/i] true that I knew about the Fregas’ plot beforehand,[p/] but I had only [i]just[/i] learned about it.
translation: Theodore: 没错，我[i]的确[/i]提前得知了弗雷加一族的计划，但也只是[i]最近[/i]才知道。

original: Theodore: On the day of the murder,[p/] the professor told me about her plan.[p/] She was going to replace me as headmaster and replace the staff with her Arcane Constructs.
translation: Theodore: 案发当日，[p/]教授对我讲述了她的计划。[p/]她要代替我担任校长，用奥术构造体取代工作人员。

original: Theodore: Now,[p/] you might say that this would have given me the perfect motive to murder the professor.
translation: Theodore: 各位或许会认为，这正好是我谋杀教授的动机。

original: Theodore: However,[p/] the supposed murder weapon was stolen from Lady Frega.[p/] This happened weeks before our meeting.
translation: Theodore: 然而，[p/]这把据称的凶器是弗雷加女士那里偷来的。[p/]这是谋杀案发生数周之前的事。

original: Theodore: I had no knowledge of their plan before she told me,[p/] and therefore,[p/] I wouldn’t have known to steal Lady Frega’s weapon in an attempt to frame her.
translation: Theodore: 她告诉我之前，我并不知道他们的计划，[p/]更遑论为了陷害弗雷加女士，专门偷走她的武器了。

original: AriaC: Are you satisfied now, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生，你满意了吗？

original: AriaC: There is no way that the headmaster could have come up with this plan.
translation: AriaC: 校长不可能想得出这个杀人计划。

original: CELESTE: Hm...[p/] If he [i]really[/i] did do this,[p/] that means he stole the rapier too, right?
translation: CELESTE: 嗯……[p/]如果[i]真是[/i]他下的手，[p/]就说明剑也是他偷的，对吧？

original: TYRION: ...Most likely.
translation: TYRION: ……很有可能。

original: CELESTE: His alibi makes sense.[p/] He couldn’t have planned this whole thing unless he knew about Bellwether's plans.
translation: CELESTE: 他的不在场证明很合理。[p/]除非他事先就知道贝尔维瑟的打算，不然不可能计划周密。

original: CELESTE: That would mean he knew about this weeks ago.
translation: CELESTE: 那他几周前就该知道了。

original: CELESTE: But how did he even find out?
translation: CELESTE: 但他究竟是怎么发现的呢？

original: TYRION: The best way to tell a convincing lie is to leave a lot of truths and only change one detail.
translation: TYRION: 想撒谎撒得令人信服，最好的办法就是说真话，只改动其中一处细节。

original: TYRION: ...Maybe Bellwether [i]did[/i] tell him,[p/] but she actually told him weeks ago.
translation: TYRION: ……说不定贝尔维瑟[i]确实[/i]把计划告诉他了，[p/]只是在几周前就说了。

original: But how would I [i]prove[/i] that?
translation: 但我要怎么[i]证明[/i]呢？

original: TYRION: So, you only learned about it recently?
translation: TYRION: 你最近才知道吗？

original: TYRION: Doesn’t that seem a bit too convenient for you?
translation: TYRION: 时机是不是有点太巧了？

original: THEODORE: It may appear that way.[p/] Yes.
translation: THEODORE: 是有点巧。[p/]没错。

original: Theodore: But...
translation: Theodore: 不过……

original: TYRION: That must have infuriated you.
translation: TYRION: 你听了想必勃然大怒吧。

original: TYRION: Your colleague betrayed you [i]and[/i] attempted to steal your job.
translation: TYRION: 同事背叛了你，[i]而且[/i]是意图窃取你的校长之位。

original: THEODORE: I’m only human. Of course I was taken aback.
translation: THEODORE: 我也不过是凡人，[p/]听了这话自然吃了一惊。

original: THEODORE: I’ve been headmaster of the Imperial Academy for nearly sixty years.
translation: THEODORE: 我就任帝国学院校长已有快六十年了。

original: THEODORE: To think that the professor [i]and[/i] the board would go around my back like that.
translation: THEODORE: 教授和董事会竟然会[i]一同[/i]在我背后谋划这种事。

original: Theodore: Now, you might say that this would have given me the perfect motive to murder the professor.
translation: Theodore: 各位或许会认为，这正好是我谋杀教授的动机。

original: TYRION: With the professor dead,[p/] you won’t have to worry about losing your job.
translation: TYRION: 教授这么一死，[p/]你不用担心丢掉工作了。

original: TYRION: At least not for a while.
translation: TYRION: 至少这一阵子不用。

original: THEODORE: I suppose you’re correct,[p/] but there are others who benefit too.
translation: THEODORE: 我想你说得对。[p/]但也有其他人从中获益。

original: THEODORE: The faculty staff is now aware of the Fregas’ plot.
translation: THEODORE: 教职工们现在也知道了弗雷加的阴谋。

original: THEODORE: With her plot delayed,[p/] they won’t need to worry about abruptly losing their jobs either.
translation: THEODORE: 她的阴谋推迟了，[p/]他们也就不用担心自己哪一天突然丢了饭碗。

original: ...But what would happen if I proved that Redmond was the killer?
translation: ……但如果我证明了雷德蒙就是真凶，会发生什么事？

original: He would be sent to prison [i]and[/i] the school board would just appoint someone else to carry out their plan...
translation: 他会被投入狱中，[i]同时[/i]学院董事会就可以指派其他人来执行他们的计划……

original: No...[p/] I couldn't think about that now.
translation: 不行……[p]我不能去想这个事情。

original: If I couldn't prove Redmond's guilt,[p/] the court would convict Wallace.
translation: 如果我不能证明雷蒙德的罪行，[p/]法庭就会宣判华莱士有罪。

original: TYRION: As the headmaster,[p/] you’d probably have the tools available to get into her room.
translation: TYRION: 作为校长，[p/]你很可能有进入她房间的手段。

original: THEODORE: ...Yes,[p/] I will admit that.
translation: THEODORE: ……没错，[p/]我承认这一点。

original: THEODORE: The academy has a master key that can be used to enter each of the students' dorms.
translation: THEODORE: 学院方有一把可以打开所有学生宿舍门的万能钥匙。

original: TYRION: Then you had the perfect way to get into her room [i]and[/i] steal the rapier undetected.
translation: TYRION: 那你就有闯进她的房间，[i]并且[/i]不为人知地盗走刺剑的完美手法了。

original: THEODORE: I suppose I did.
translation: THEODORE: 我承认我确实有。

original: THEODORE: However,[p/] there’s one flaw with your logic.
translation: THEODORE: 然而，[p/]你的逻辑中有一处缺陷。

original: TYRION: It was my understanding that the school board wanted to keep this a secret until the very end.
translation: TYRION: 据我理解，董事会确实想把这个秘密藏到最后一刻。

original: TYRION: Why would Bellwether,[p/] of all people,[p/] tell you about her betrayal?
translation: TYRION: 为什么所有人之中[p/]，偏偏是贝尔维瑟来告诉你她的背叛行为呢？

original: THEODORE: I imagined she wanted to taunt me with that information.
translation: THEODORE: 我想过她可能是想用这个信息嘲讽我。

original: THEODORE: We’ve long had our disagreements,[p/] and looking back,[p/] she may have resented me for that.
translation: THEODORE: 我们长期以来存在分岐，[p/]回首过往种种，[p/]她可能就是因此怨恨我。

original: THEODORE: At that point,[p/] there wasn’t anything I could do to stop her.
translation: THEODORE: 到了那个时候，[p/]我已经没有什么制止她的方法。

original: TYRION: Really?[p/] I thought you and the professor were on good terms.
translation: TYRION: 真的吗？[p/]我还以为你和教授之间相处融洽呢。

original: THEODORE: I’d thought so too,[p/] but I suppose it was all a façade. [h="Hmph...|I was never on good terms with that witch..." e="a"]
translation: THEODORE: 我原本也这么认为……[p/]但我想都只是表面功夫罢了。[h="哼……|我跟那个女巫可没什么好关系……" e="a"]

original: THEODORE: She was just biding her time until she could take my position as headmaster.
translation: THEODORE: 她只是在等待时机取代我的校长之位。

original: CELESTE: If he's the one behind this,[p/] he had to have known about Bellwether’s betrayal weeks ago.
translation: CELESTE: 如果他确实是真凶，[p/]那他肯定几周前就知道了贝尔维瑟的背叛。

original: TYRION: Right...[p/] The question is:[p/] how do we prove it?
translation: TYRION: 是的……[p/]但问题是：[p/]怎么证明这一点？

original: TYRION: Redmond.[p/] You keep saying that you didn’t know about Bellwether’s plot before yesterday.
translation: TYRION: 雷德蒙。[p/]你一直在说昨天之前你都不知道贝尔维瑟的阴谋。

original: TYRION: Do you still plan on standing behind that claim?
translation: TYRION: 你还打算继续这个说法吗？

original: THEODORE: Of course I am.[p/] It’s the truth.
translation: THEODORE: 当然。[p/]这是事实。

original: TYRION: I’m sorry, Redmond,[p/] but you should really close your doors during your meetings.
translation: TYRION: 那我很抱歉，雷德蒙。[p/]但你应该在与人会面时把门关好。

original: THEODORE: W-[p/][s/]What...? [h="No!|...Did someone see us?!" e="f"/]
translation: THEODORE: 这、[p/][s/]这是……？ [h="不！|当时有人偷看我们？！" e="f"/]

original: TYRION: It [i]is[/i] true that Bellwether revealed her plan to you during one of your meetings.
translation: TYRION: 贝尔维瑟在与你的一次会面中揭明了她的计划，[i]这是事实[/i]。

original: TYRION: In fact,[p/] Jan Hughes happened to overhear that same meeting.
translation: TYRION: 实际上，[p/]简·休斯无意中听到了那一次对话。

original: TYRION: But he only overheard the part where the staff would be replaced.
translation: TYRION: 但他只听到了教职工们会被替换的那一部分。

original: THEODORE: ...!
translation: THEODORE: ……！

original: TYRION: And that's the strangest part, Redmond.
translation: TYRION: 这才是最奇怪的地方，雷德蒙先生。

original: TYRION: According to Mr. Hughes, this meeting...
translation: TYRION: 根据休斯先生的证言，这场会面……

original: TYRION: ...Occurred weeks ago!
translation: TYRION: ……发生在几周之前！

original: AriaC: You can’t accuse the headmaster of perjury based on a rumor!
translation: AriaC: 你不能因为道听途说，就指控校长在作伪证！

original: AriaC: Everything you’ve just said is based on second-hand information!
translation: AriaC: 你所说的一切都只是基于二手信息！

original: TYRION: Mr. Hughes [i]distinctly[/i] overheard that the staff would be replaced with Arcane Constructs.
translation: TYRION: 休斯先生[i]清楚地[/i]听到，教职员工都会被替换成奥术构造体。

original: TYRION: That is [i]too[/i] specific and [i]too[/i] accurate to assume that he misheard.
translation: TYRION: 如果只是听错的话，不可能[i]这么[/i]具体准确。

original: AriaC: The professor must have only revealed her plan for the Arcane Constructs.
translation: AriaC: 教授应该只是揭露了关于奥数构造体的计划。

original: AriaC: That [i]still[/i] doesn’t prove that he knew about her treachery beforehand.
translation: AriaC: [i]仍然[/i]无法证明校长在那时就知道了她的反叛。

original: TYRION: Professor Bellwether had no authority over the cleaning staff’s employment.
translation: TYRION: 贝尔维瑟教授无权决定清洁人员的去留。

original: TYRION: It wouldn’t make sense for her to [i]just[/i] reveal her plan for the Arcane Constructs.
translation: TYRION: 没道理[i]只[/i]揭露她计划中关于奥术构造体的部分。

original: TYRION: That would only make sense if he knew that Bellwether would be taking his job.
translation: TYRION: 只有一种可能说得通：校长知道贝尔维瑟会取代自己的职位。

original: Tyrion: So, tell me one thing, Redmond.
translation: Tyrion: 所以，告诉我，雷德蒙校长。

original: TYRION: Why did you find the need to lie about this?
translation: TYRION: 为什么你选择在这里说谎？

original: TYRION: Is it because you saw a need to establish an alibi?
translation: TYRION: 是因为你发现需要制造不在场证明吗？

original: THEODORE: ...
translation: THEODORE: ……

original: TYRION: Redmond.[p/] I'm only going to ask you one more time.
translation: TYRION: 雷德蒙。[p/]我最后问你一次。

original: TYRION: [i]Did[/i] you murder Catherine Bellwether?
translation: TYRION: 是[i]你[/i]杀了凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟吗？

original: Theodore Redmond had done something truly terrible.
translation: 西奥多·雷德蒙犯下了很严重的罪行。

original: Theodore: The school board rejected my proposed staffing budget.
translation: Theodore: 学院董事会拒绝了我的员工预算。

original: Theodore: We won't be able to hire more custodians...
translation: Theodore: 我们无法招募更多校工……

original: Catherine: Of course they rejected it.[p/] Our current janitor simply needs to stop lazing about.
translation: Catherine: 他们当然会拒绝。[p/]我们的清洁工不能再这样磨洋工了。

original: Catherine: Then you wouldn't have to spend all of your free time helping him.
translation: Catherine: 你也无需再耗用自己的业余时间去帮助他。

original: Theodore: How did you—?!
translation: Theodore: 你是怎么——？！

original: Theodore: Is [i]that[/i] how they found out![p/][s/] Did you [i]tell[/i] them?!
translation: Theodore: [i]所以[/i]他们才发现了！[p/][s/]你真的[i]告诉[/i]他们了？！

original: Catherine: I did...
translation: Catherine: 是啊……

original: Theodore: Why?![p/][s/] What I do after school hours is none of your concern!
translation: Theodore: 为什么？！[p/][s/]我在放学后做什么和你有什么关系？！

original: Catherine: It [i]becomes[/i] my concern when the headmaster of [i]my[/i] academy debases himself in such a manner.
translation: Catherine: 既然在[i]我[/i]的学院里，校长用这种方式作践自己的地位，那就与我[i]有关[/i]了。

original: Catherine: You were mopping floors alongside him like a common servant.[p/] Have you no shame?
translation: Catherine: 你就像个仆人一样和他一起拖地。[p/] 你都没有羞耻感吗？

original: Theodore: What else was I supposed to do?!
translation: Theodore: 那我应该怎么做呢？！

original: Theodore: You can't possibly expect one man to keep an entire school clean!
translation: Theodore: 你不可能指望一个人就能保持整座学院的清洁！

original: Catherine: Hughes is clearly capable.[p/] The academy is spotless despite his lounging about.
translation: Catherine: 休斯当然可以。[p/]像他那样游手好闲，学院依旧一尘不染。

original: Theodore: Only because he's working during every waking hour!
translation: Theodore: 那只是因为他只要醒着，就在工作！

original: Theodore: He barely has enough time to sleep!
translation: Theodore: 他基本上都没有足够的睡眠时间！

original: Catherine: Please.[p/] I've caught him napping on the job more times than I can count.
translation: Catherine: 拜托。[p/]我都数不清多少次抓到他在工作时间偷偷睡觉了。

original: Catherine: Honestly,[p/] you coddle these animals far too much...
translation: Catherine: 老实说，[p/]你对这些动物太过溺爱……

original: Theodore: ...
translation: Theodore: ……

original: Theodore: Professor Bellwether,[p/] I've called you here to discuss your treatment of certain students.
translation: Theodore: 贝尔维瑟教授。[p/]我是因为你对待特定学生群体的方式才叫你过来的。

original: Catherine: This again?
translation: Catherine: 又是这个？

original: Theodore: Do you remember Gillian Fletcher?[p/] He was a part of your Advanced Illusion Track.
translation: Theodore: 你还记得吉连·弗莱彻吗？[p/]他参加了你的高等幻象术课程。

original: Catherine: I remember failing him.[p/] His performance during the final exam was laughable.
translation: Catherine: 我记得我给了他一个不及格。[p/]他在期末考核上的表现太可笑了。

original: Theodore: ...They found his body in the lake last night.
translation: Theodore: ……昨晚，在湖底找到了他的尸体。

original: Catherine: ...
translation: Catherine: ……

original: Theodore: I had always warned you that something like this might happen.
translation: Theodore: 我一直都在警告你，这样的事情有可能发生。

original: Theodore: I understand you feel that you have responsibilities to the kingdom,[p/] but our students are still human beings.
translation: Theodore: 我明白你对王国负责，[p/]但我们的学生首先是人。

original: Catherine: I fail to see how any of this is [i]my[/i] responsibility.
translation: Catherine: 我可没看出来[i]自己[/i]有什么责任。

original: Theodore: Professor![p/][s/] Surely,[p/] even [i]you[/i] must understand—!
translation: Theodore: 教授！[p/][s/]毫无疑问，[p/]即使是[i]你[/i]也必然明白——！

original: Catherine: No,[p/] I think it's [i]you[/i] who fails to understand.
translation: Catherine: 不，[p/]我觉得没搞明白的人是[i]你[/i]。

original: Catherine: He may have been a mage,[p/] but he could never walk the path of the Scaled Lord's chosen with such a plebeian constitution.
translation: Catherine: 他可能确实是一名法师，[p/]但以他这贱民的天赋，他永无可能走上鳞甲领主为我们选择的道路。

original: Catherine: What did you think would happen?
translation: Catherine: 你觉得会变成什么样呢？

original: Catherine: The [i]real[/i] act of cruelty was placing that layabout next to our kingdom's best and brightest.
translation: Catherine: 把那个游手好闲的家伙安排在王国最优秀与聪慧的人身旁才是[i]真正l[/i]残忍的事情。

original: Catherine: What did you think happens to trash when they're faced with their betters?
translation: Catherine: 你觉得，当垃圾面对远比他们优秀的人时，会发生什么？

original: Theodore: [i]You[/i] never allowed him the opportunity to succeed!
translation: Theodore: [i]你[/i]从来就没有给他成功的机会！

original: Theodore: Don't think I'm blind to what's been happening!
translation: Theodore: 别以为我没看到发生的事情！

original: Theodore: I have received several reports that you've been harassing the students admitted through the scholarship program!
translation: Theodore: 我已经收到多分报告，指出你一直在骚扰那些通过奖学金程序录取的学生！

original: Catherine: Then take those reports to the school board, Redmond.
translation: Catherine: 那把这些报告提交到董事会啊，雷德蒙。

original: Catherine: If these urchins fall apart over the tiniest bit of criticism,[p/] then they have no place here.
translation: Catherine: 如果这些小鬼因为这一点点批评就崩溃，[p/]那学院本来就没有他们的位置。

original: Catherine: They can't handle it, Redmond.[p/] It's that simple.
translation: Catherine: 他们只是没能力应对，雷德蒙。[p/]就这么简单。

original: Catherine: Maybe this incident will finally make you see reason.
translation: Catherine: 这起意外最后或许会让你恢复理智。

original: Theodore: You—!
translation: Theodore: 你——！

original: Theodore: What do I do?!
translation: Theodore: 我该做什么？！

original: Theodore: How do I stop her?!
translation: Theodore: 我要怎么阻止她？！

original: Theodore: It's only a matter of time before the school board names her as the new headmaster...
translation: Theodore: 学院董事会提名她担任新校长只是时间问题了……

original: Theodore: After that,[p/] I won't be able to protect anyone from her...
translation: Theodore: 一旦实施，[p/]我就再也无法从她手中保护任何人……

original: Theodore: I'll be powerless...
translation: Theodore: 我将变得毫无力量……

original: Eris: That's not how I see it.
translation: Eris: 我不这么认为哦。

original: Theodore: What...?
translation: Theodore: 什么……？

original: Eris: You're clinging to shadows, Redmond.[p/] Titles,[p/] influence,[p/] reputation—[p/]they're all just illusions.
translation: Eris: 你不过是在执迷于虚妄，雷德蒙。[p/]头衔、[p/]影响力、[p/]名誉——[p/]这些都不过是幻象。

original: Eris: Strip those away,[p/] and you're Bellwether's equal.
translation: Eris: 把那些幻象剥去，[p/]你和贝尔维瑟是平等的。

original: Theodore: Hmph...[p/] If only it truly worked like that.
translation: Theodore: 哼……[p/]要真是这样倒好了。

original: Theodore: Reality is far more complicated than that...
translation: Theodore: 现实远比这复杂……

original: Eris: Is it, though?
translation: Eris: 真的是这样吗？

original: Eris: Her friends on the school board can't pump blood through her veins.
translation: Eris: 她董事会的朋友们可无法帮她流动血液。

original: Eris: Those nobles she dotes on can't draw breath into her lungs.
translation: Eris: 她巴结的贵族们也无法帮她呼吸。

original: Eris: All are equal in death.[p/] The survivors are the ones who determine what will be.
translation: Eris: 死亡面前万物平等。[p/]只有活下来的人才能决定未来。

original: Eris: It doesn't matter if you're a commoner,[p/] a noble,[p/] or the Scaled Lord himself.
translation: Eris: 不论你是平民，[p/]是贵族，[p/]还是鳞甲领主本人。

original: Theodore: W-[p/][s/]What are you saying...?
translation: Theodore: 你、[p/][s/]你在说些什么……？

original: Eris: You should fight for what you believe in.
translation: Eris: 你应当为自己的信仰而战。

original: Eris: Do whatever it takes to create the universe you want.
translation: Eris: 为了创造你想要的世界而不择手段。

original: He had truly despised Catherine Bellwether with all of his heart.
translation: 他内心深处深深鄙夷凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟。

original: In his mind,[p/] this world was a better place without her in it.
translation: 按他的想法，[p/]这个世界没有她会变得更好。

original: Yet the sound of that rapier piercing her heart had been echoing endlessly within his head.
translation: 然而那柄刺剑刺穿她心脏的声音仍然在他脑海中不停地回响。

original: It was as if her ghost were floating over his shoulder,[p/] torturing him by repeating her last anguished gasps.
translation: 仿佛就是她的鬼魂缠绕在肩头，[p/]重复着临终的痛苦喘息以折磨他。

original: It made his stomach churn.[p/] He took no pleasure in taking her life,[p/] and his soul felt forever scarred from what he'd done.
translation: 他感到反胃，[p/]他在夺取她的生命后没有任何喜悦，[p/]他的灵魂因所作所为受到永恒的创伤。

original: Eris: ...But you've already come this far, haven't you?
translation: Eris: ……但你已经做到这个份上了，不是吗？

original: Theodore: I [i]have[/i] already come this far.
translation: Theodore: 我[i]已经[/i]做到这个份上了。

original: THEODORE: What a fine mess this is... [h="I’m not done...|Not yet..."/]
translation: THEODORE: 真是一团糟啊…… [h="我还没完……|还没有……"/]

original: AriaC: ...H-[p/][s/]Headmaster?!
translation: AriaC: ……校、[p/][s/]校长？！

original: THEODORE: So,[p/] you truly plan on pushing this,[p/] do you?
translation: THEODORE: 所以，[p/]你是动真格地要这么做，[p/]对吧？

original: Tyrion: I won't let anyone stop me from getting justice for Wallace.
translation: Tyrion: 没有人能阻挡我为华莱士讨回公道。

original: THEODORE: Well,[p/] your thesis [i]sounds[/i] promising, Mr. Cuthbert,[p/] but I believe your arguments could use a little work.
translation: THEODORE: 好吧，[p/]你的论点[i]听起来[/i]很有趣，卡斯伯特先生，[p/]但我相信你的推论还有待完善。

original: Theodore: You think I killed Catherine Bellwether?[p/][s/] Me?
translation: Theodore: 你认为是我杀了凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟？[p/][s/]我？

original: Theodore: I am an elderly man in his late 80’s.
translation: Theodore: 我已经是个年近九十的老头子了。

original: Theodore: I can barely walk,[p/] much less wield a rapier.
translation: Theodore: 我都快要走不动了，[p/]更别提使用刺剑了。

original: Construct|Contructs
Tyrion: But you and Bellwether weren’t the only people in that room, were you?
translation: Tyrion: 但房间里可不只有你和贝尔维瑟，不是吗？

original: Tyrion: You needed the Arcane Construct to carry Bellwether’s body.
translation: Tyrion: 你需要奥术构造体来搬运贝尔维瑟的尸体。

original: Tyrion: That means that the Construct would have already been in your office.
translation: Tyrion: 那个奥术构造体肯定已经在你的办公室里了。

original: Tyrion: And with your privileges,[p/] you could have easily programmed the Construct to stab Bellwether for you.
translation: Tyrion: 以你的权限，[p/]你可以轻松命令奥术构造体替你杀害贝尔维瑟。

original: Theodore: ...!
translation: Theodore: ……！

original: No...[p/] That’s not right.
translation: 不对……[p/]再好好想想。

original: He's technically correct.[p/] There's no way he could have overpowered Bellwether by himself.
translation: 严格上来说没错，[p/]他确实没办法一个人制服贝尔维瑟。

original: But was he [i]really[/i] by himself?
translation: 但他[i]真的[/i]只是一个人吗？

original: Theodore: E-[p/][s/]Even so,[p/] think about what would have transpired afterward.
translation: Theodore: 即、[p/][s/]即便如此，[p/]想想之后发生了什么。

original: Theodore: Do you recall Ms. Steelwind’s timeline of Bellwether’s witnesses?
translation: Theodore: 你还记得斯蒂尔文德女士所列，有关贝尔维瑟被目击的时间线吗？

original: Theodore: With your theory,[p/] the Construct would have spent more than [i]an hour[/i] in the library.
translation: Theodore: 根据你的理论，[p/]奥术构造体会在图书馆停留超过[i]一小时[/i]。

original: Theodore: Having it there would have risked my so-called ruse from being discovered. [h="I was lucky.|Lady Frega can’t tell night from day." e="h"/]
translation: Theodore: 如果把它放在那里，我那所谓的诡计就有可能会被识破。[h="还好还好。|弗雷加小姐昼夜不分。" e="h"/]

original: Logic
Intuition
TYRION: The timing deduced from Ms. Frega’s testimony is predicated on one thing.
translation: TYRION: 根据弗雷加女士的证言推断出的时间有个前提。

original: TYRION: She saw Ms. Bellwether exit your office after your meeting.
translation: TYRION: 她看见了贝尔维瑟女士在会面结束后离开你的办公室。

original: TYRION: However,[p/] if we assume that you’re [i]lying[/i] about when this “meeting” ended,[p/] your entire argument falls apart.
translation: TYRION: 然而，[p/]如果我们假定你在这次“会谈”的结束时间上[i]说了谎[/i]，[p/]你的整个主张就将分崩离析。

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega would have encountered Bellwether after her death at 2:01 PM.
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士就是在下午 2:01，贝尔维瑟死后遇到了她。

original: THEODORE: M-[p/][s/]Ms. Frega wouldn’t have made a mistake like that!
translation: THEODORE: 弗、[p/][s/]弗雷加女士才不会犯这样的错误！

original: TYRION: Ms. Frega thought it was [i]morning[/i] when she saw Bellwether!
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士看到贝尔维瑟的时候，还以为当时是[i]上午[/i]！

original: TYRION: She can’t reliably tell the time!
translation: TYRION: 她对时间的记忆并不准确！

original: Empathy
Tyrion: Redmond,[p/] what you’re saying clearly doesn’t match with what you’re thinking.
translation: Tyrion: 雷德蒙。[p/]你所说的和你所想的明显不一致。

original: Theodore: What kind of weak assertion is that?!
translation: Theodore: 你这是什么无力的主张？！

original: Theodore: How could you [i]possibly[/i] know what I'm thinking?
translation: Theodore: 你怎么[i]可能[/i]知道我在想什么？

original: Tyrion: O-[p/]Oh, um...
translation: Tyrion: 噢、[p/]噢，呃……

original: I needed to choose my words more carefully.
translation: 我得仔细斟酌自己的言语。

original: Theodore: T-[p/][s/]Then what about where the rapier was placed?!
translation: Theodore: 那、[p/][s/]那关于刺剑被遗落的地方呢？！

original: Theodore: If I really [i]was[/i] the murderer,[p/] then that would mean I planted the weapon in young [i]Wallace’s[/i] locker!
translation: Theodore: 如果我[i]真的是[/i]凶手，[p/]就意味着是我把武器放在了[i]华莱士的[/i]储物柜里！

original: Theodore: Several of the students had lockers there that I had access to.
translation: Theodore: 我还能打开其他几个学生的储物柜。

original: Theodore: Wallace is one of my prized students.[p/][s/] If I had to frame anyone,[p/][s/] he would be the [i]last[/i] person I chose!
translation: Theodore: 华莱士是我的爱徒之一。[p/][s/]如果我一定要陷害谁，[p/][s/][i]最不可能[/i]选的就是他！

original: LockerBlood2
Tyrion: You’re right, Mr. Redmond.
translation: Tyrion: 你说得对，雷德蒙先生。

original: Tyrion: You wouldn’t try to frame Wallace,[p/] but you [i]would[/i] try to frame Miriam Frega.
translation: Tyrion: 你不会陷害华莱士，[p/]但你[i]会[/i]陷害米莉亚姆·弗雷加。

original: He wouldn't have [i]intentionally[/i] framed Wallace.
translation: 他不会[i]故意[/i]陷害华莱士。

original: Something must have confused him about whose locker he placed the rapier in.
translation: 在选择把刺剑放进哪个储物柜的时候，他肯定被什么东西误导了。

original: Tyrion: It would have been the perfect act of revenge, wouldn’t it?
translation: Tyrion: 真是一场完美的复仇剧，不是吗？

original: Tyrion: You murder your treacherous co-worker [i]and[/i] frame the daughter of the family that helped her!
translation: Tyrion: 你杀掉那个背信弃义的同事，[i]同时[/i]又嫁祸给支持她家族的千金！

original: Tyrion: If Miriam had been implicated,[p/][s/] the Inquisition would have immediately swept Bellwether's murder under the rug!
translation: Tyrion: 如果米莉亚姆被牵扯进来，[p/][s/]裁判所会马上把贝尔维瑟的谋杀案掩盖起来！

original: Tyrion: But something went wrong, didn’t it, Redmond?
translation: Tyrion: 但有个地方出了问题，不是吗，雷德蒙？

original: Tyrion: The labels on Wallace’s locker and Miriam’s locker were switched.
translation: Tyrion: 华莱士和米莉亚姆储物柜上的名牌被交换了。

original: Tyrion: Anyone who saw that would have easily mixed them up.
translation: Tyrion: 看到名牌的人都会混淆二者。

original: Theodore: I am the [i]headmaster[/i] of the Imperial Academy!
translation: Theodore: 我是这座帝国学院的[i]校长[/i]！

original: Theodore: I have records of all the students’ lockers and where they’re located!
translation: Theodore: 我有所有学生的储物柜及其位置的记录！

original: Theodore: If I truly planned this,[p/][s/] I would have [i]known[/i] where Wallace’s locker was!
translation: Theodore: 如果我真的谋划了这一切，[p/][s/]我会[i]记住[/i]华莱士的储物柜在哪里！

original: Theodore: A simple change in labels wouldn’t have led me to make a careless mistake like that!
translation: Theodore: 简单换个标签才不会让我犯下这么粗心的错误！

original: Construct|LockerCon
TYRION: But it wasn’t you, was it?
translation: TYRION: 但并非你自己动手，不是吗？

original: TYRION: Your Arcane Construct was the one who planted the rapier in the locker.
translation: TYRION: 把刺剑放入储物柜的是你的奥术构造体。

original: No...[p/] He would have noticed if the locker IDs were switched.
translation: 不对……[p/]他自己会注意到储物柜的名牌被交换了。

original: But that was all based on the assumption that [i]he[/i] was the person who planted the rapier.
translation: 但那只是基于放置刺剑的是[i]他本人[/i]这一假定情况。

original: TYRION: I bet you commanded it to “place this rapier in the locker of Miriam Frega”.
translation: TYRION: 我敢打赌，是你命令它“将这把刺剑放到米莉亚姆·弗雷加的储物柜里”。

original: TYRION: But it saw the ID number on Wallace’s locker and assumed that it was Miriam’s.
translation: TYRION: 但它看到华莱士的储物柜上的名牌，就认为这是米莉亚姆的。

original: THEODORE: T-[p/][s/]This is...![p/][s/] I-[p/][s/]I...!
translation: THEODORE: 这、[p/][s/]这是……！[p/][s/]我、[p/][s/]我……！

original: Redmond was desperately stammering.
translation: 雷德蒙在绝望中变得结巴了起来。

original: THEODORE: Ms. Steelwind,[p/][s/] say something!
translation: THEODORE: 斯蒂尔文德女士。[p/][s/]说些什么啊！

original: AriaC: ...What?![p/][s/] I...
translation: AriaC: ……什么？！[p/][s/]我……

original: AriaC: Agh!
translation: AriaC: 呃！

original: AriaC: Mr. Cuthbert![p/][s/] Your theory may be plausible but there’s no evidence to support it!
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生！[p/][s/]你的说法可能有道理，但没有证据支持！

original: THEODORE: Ha![p/][s/] That’s right![p/][s/] You don’t have any proof, do you?!
translation: THEODORE: 哈！[p/][s/]没错！[p/][s/]你没有任何证据，不是吗？

original: THEODORE: Saying that I could have committed the murder isn’t the same as proving I did it!
translation: THEODORE: 提出我有实施谋杀的可能性，和证明我确实做了，可根本不是一回事！

original: LockerCon
Tyrion: Your Arcane Construct is [i]still[/i] in the locker room where it planted the rapier!
translation: Tyrion: 你的奥术构造体[i]仍然[/i]待在放置刺剑的储物柜室！

original: Tyrion: All we have to do is take a look inside it,[p/] and we’ll see the blood inside!
translation: Tyrion: 我们只需要调查内侧，[p/]就能看到里面的血迹！

original: THEODORE: Is that so, Mr. Cuthbert?
translation: THEODORE: 是这样吗，卡斯伯特先生？

original: What...?[p/] Why did he still look so confident?
translation: 这……？[p/]他为什么看起来还这么自信？

original: No...[p/] Wasn't there some sort of evidence that would track the orders given to him?
translation: 不会吧……[p/]不应该有可以什么证据能导向他下的那些指令吗？

original: AriaC: No...![p/] Mr. Cuthbert...[p/] I...
translation: AriaC: 不行……！[p/]卡斯伯特先生……[p/]我……

original: AriaC: I already checked the inside of that Construct during my investigation.
translation: AriaC: 我已经在调查时检查了构造体的内腔。

original: AriaC: The interior was completely clean.
translation: AriaC: 里面完全是干净的。

original: TYRION: What?!
translation: TYRION: 怎么会？！

original: THEODORE: The Constructs’ primary function is to assist and [i]clean[/i], dear Tyrion!
translation: THEODORE: 构造体的主要功能就是辅助和[i]清洁[/i]，我亲爱的提利昂！

original: THEODORE: They have a function that allows them to clean [i]themselves[/i],[p/][s/] inside and out!
translation: THEODORE: 它们本身就有清洁[i]自身[/i]的机能，[p/][s/]外表和内部皆有！

original: Tyrion: That still wouldn't erase the magical traces.
translation: Tyrion: 那还是无法抹除魔法痕迹。

original: Theodore: Healing spells may leave traces of [b]necromancy[/b],[p/] but so would a healing potion!
translation: Theodore: 治愈魔法会留下[b]死灵术[/b]的痕迹，[p/]但治疗的药剂也可以！

original: Theodore: With no evidence of blood,[p/] there could be a myriad of reasons why those traces are there!
translation: Theodore: 没有血迹作为证据，[p/]很多原因都可能导致这些痕迹出现！

original: TYRION: W-[p/][s/]Well,[p/] we can still look at its command history, right?!
translation: TYRION: 好、[p/][s/]好吧，[p/]但我们还是可以检查它的指令记录，对吧？！

original: AriaC: ...Think about it, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: AriaC: ……仔细想想，卡斯伯特先生。

original: AriaC: Do you honestly think that the murderer would leave behind evidence like that?
translation: AriaC: 你真的觉得凶手会留下这么显著的证据吗？

original: AriaC: ...I’m sure that [i]whoever[/i] orchestrated this plot,[p/] they ordered the Construct to wipe its logs when it was finished.
translation: AriaC: ……我很肯定，[i]不论是谁[/i]精心策划了这场阴谋，[p/]他们都会命令构造体删除历史记录。

original: TYRION: N-[p/][s/]No...
translation: TYRION: 不、[p/][s/]不……

original: THEODORE: That’s right, Mr. Cuthbert!
translation: THEODORE: 就是这样，卡斯伯特先生！

original: THEODORE: Your case against me is theoretical at best!
translation: THEODORE: 你对我的指控，说到底也就是来自间接证据！

original: THEODORE: But I suppose I can still give you marks for trying!
translation: THEODORE: 至少你的尝试精神可嘉！

original: He thought of everything!
translation: 他考虑得十分周全！

original: Did he really get rid of all of the evidence?!
translation: 他真的清理了所有证据吗？！

original: I was running out of options.
translation: 我的选项即将用尽。

original: But I still had [i]one[/i] option left.
translation: 但仍然还剩[i]最后一个[/i]。

original: THEODORE: ...Ha![p/] It’s unbecoming to glare like that, young Tyrion!
translation: THEODORE: ……哈！[p/]那样瞪着我很没礼貌啊，年轻人！

original: AriaC: ...? [h="He's doing it again..."/]
translation: AriaC: ……？ [h="他又在那样做了……"/]

original: I needed to bring myself back to that moment with Garrick Pierce.
translation: 我需要将自己带回对峙加里克·皮尔斯的那个时刻。

original: Everything was at stake for Wallace in this trial.
translation: 这场庭审中，一切都在将华莱士逼向绝境。

original: He endured the collective hatred of everyone who didn't understand what he was doing.
translation: 他一直忍受着那些不理解他做法的人们向他集中的憎恨。

original: Yet he stayed true to his ideals,[p/] no matter how much it harmed him.
translation: 但他仍然信奉自己的理念，[p/]无论这给他带来了多少伤害。

original: He studied [b]necromancy[/b],[p/] all for the betterment of mankind.
translation: 他研习[b]死灵术[/b]，[p/]都是为了造福人类。

original: His life and his future were in my hands,[p/] and I would [i]not[/i] see his potential destroyed.
translation: 他的性命与未来都取决于我，[p/]而我[i]不愿意[/i]看到他的潜力就这样被摧毁。

original: I activated the Empowered Eye again.
translation: 我又一次激活了强化之眼。

original: Redmond did a good job of covering his tracks,[p/] but there was no such thing as the perfect crime.
translation: 雷德蒙很好地掩盖了行踪，[p/]但从来就没有什么完美犯罪。

original: There had to be something that he forgot to get rid of!
translation: 肯定有什么他忘记抹去的痕迹！

original: Theodore: Why was the Construct in the locker room...?
translation: Theodore: 为什么那个构造体最后会留在储物柜室呢……？

original: Theodore: It shouldn't have been there if it had followed my orders.
translation: Theodore: 按照我的指令，它不应该留在那里。

original: Theodore: No matter...[p/] It wiped its logs.[p/] That's all that matters.
translation: Theodore: 不要紧的……[p/]它自己把日志删除了。[p/]只要这样就万无一失。

original: Theodore: They have nothing.
translation: Theodore: 他们没有证据。

original: So, he [i]did[/i] order it to wipe its logs...
translation: 所以，他[i]确实[/i]命令了构造体删除自身的日志……

original: In order to cover all of its tracks,[p/] it probably would have done this last.
translation: 并以此掩盖它的行踪，[p/]这大概率是最后一条指令。

original: Construct|Logic|Map
Theodore: The Construct's orders were clear.
translation: Theodore: 对构造体的指令很明确。

original: Theodore: Plant the body in Lecture Hall 2-B.
translation: Theodore: 把尸体放到 2-B 讲堂里。

original: Theodore: And then plant the evidence in Frega's locker.
translation: Theodore: 然后把证据放进弗雷加的储物柜。

original: Theodore: It was [i]supposed[/i] to head to the Storage Room afterward.
translation: Theodore: 之后它[i]本应[/i]回到储藏室。

original: Theodore: What happened?
translation: Theodore: 到底发生了什么？

original: Interesting...[p/] The Construct wasn't [i]supposed[/i] to be in the Locker Room?
translation: 这就有意思了……[p/]那个构造体[i]不应该[/i]在储物柜室里？

original: Tyrion
Theodore: I can't believe I let this boy push me this far...
translation: Theodore: 我真不敢相信，这个小伙子能把我逼到这个地步……

original: Theodore: I was too careless...[p/] I should have been [i]much[/i] more wary of him.
translation: Theodore: 我太大意了……[p/]我应该对他[i]更加[/i]警惕的。

original: Eris
Theodore: Agh...[p/] My head...
translation: Theodore: 啊……[p/]我的脑袋……

original: Theodore: The stress from this trial must be giving me a migraine...
translation: Theodore: 庭审带来的压力让我犯偏头痛了……

original: That was strange...[p/] Why couldn't I make him think about Eris?
translation: 奇怪了……[p/]我为什么不能让他想厄莉斯的事情？

original: Well,[p/] I suppose it doesn't matter.[p/] I had no reason to think Eris was involved anyway.
translation: 算了，[p/]应该不太重要。[p/]我没有任何原由认定厄莉斯也参与其中。

original: Ruby
Theodore: It's all Tymora's fault that I'm even here...
translation: Theodore: 我现在会在这里，都是泰摩拉的错……

original: Theodore: If it weren't for my debts,[p/] that boy would have never even [i]met[/i] Wallace.
translation: Theodore: 如果不是我的债务，[p/]那个小子永远不会[i]遇见[/i]华莱士。

original: Catherine|Blood2|Catherine Autopsy|BellRep|BellPlan|BellPlan2
Theodore: I can't believe I put myself into this mess for [i]Bellwether[/i] of all people...
translation: Theodore: 我真不敢相信自己会为了[i]贝尔维瑟[/i]卷入这堆破事……

original: Theodore: ...Why do I feel remorse for her?
translation: Theodore: ……我为何因她产生悔意？

original: Theodore: She [i]deserved[/i] what happened to her.
translation: Theodore: 她根本就是[i]罪有应得[/i]。

original: Jan|Valentina|Valerie
Theodore: I wasn't just thinking of myself...
translation: Theodore: 我并不是只为了自己考虑……

original: Theodore: The staff...[p/][s/] Bellwether would have thrown them onto the [i]street[/i] if not for what I did!
translation: Theodore: 那些教职工……[p/][s/]如果我不动手，贝尔维瑟就会让他们所有人[i]流落街头[/i]！

original: Miriam|Four|Aria
Theodore: This is all the nobility's fault!
translation: Theodore: 这都是贵族们的错！

original: Theodore: This [i]whole[/i] time they were plotting to throw me out.
translation: Theodore: [i]这段时间[/i]他们一直在密谋赶我下台。

original: Theodore: It's [i]their[/i] fault that Bellwether is dead![p/][s/] Not mine!
translation: Theodore: 贝尔维瑟的死都怪[i]他们[/i]！[p/][s/]不怪我！

original: Theodore: Her blood is on the hands of the Fregas [i]and[/i] the Steelwinds.
translation: Theodore: 害死她的是弗雷加[i]和[/i]斯蒂尔文德两家贵族。

original: Foul
Theodore: I wonder...[p/] Did I leave any other pieces of evidence behind?
translation: Theodore: 我在想……[p/]我还留下了其他证据吗？

original: Theodore: I was far too reckless...
translation: Theodore: 我太鲁莽了……

original: Theodore: But I needed [i]some[/i] way to keep that lecture hall empty.
translation: Theodore: 但我需要[i]某种[/i]让那个讲堂空无一人的方法。

original: Oh, right.[p/] He must have botched the alchemy experiment on purpose to keep the lecture hall clear.
translation: 噢，对啊。[p/]他是故意搞砸了那个炼金实验，来确保讲堂里没有人。

original: But that didn't really tell me anything I could use right now.
translation: 但这并没有让我掌握更多可用的事实。

original: Head Action|Lockdown
Theodore: I had to do everything I could to shift guilt away from myself.
translation: Theodore: 为了让自己洗脱嫌疑，我使出了一切手段。

original: Theodore: ...But did I leave any holes in my alibi?
translation: Theodore: ……但我的不在场证明有留下什么漏洞吗？

original: Theodore: No...[p/] I accounted for everything.
translation: Theodore: 没有吧……[p/]每个方面我都算计过了。

original: Theodore: There's [i]no[/i] possible way I left any evidence behind.
translation: Theodore: 我[i]不可能[/i]留下任何证据。

original: JanTest2
Theodore: ...My [b]illusion[/b] should have been flawless.
translation: Theodore: ……我的[b]幻象术[/b]是无懈可击的。

original: Theodore: I can't believe this boy was able to deduce what happened.
translation: Theodore: 我不敢相信，这小伙子能推理出发生的事情。

original: Blood|Blood2|Cheat|Rapier|Rapier2
Theodore: I did everything I could to cast doubt on Frega's brat.
translation: Theodore: 我使劲浑身解数栽赃弗雷加家的小孩儿。

original: Theodore: I can't believe Valerie placed a trace of [b]necromancy[/b] on the body.
translation: Theodore: 不敢相信瓦莱丽竟然在尸体上留下了[b]死灵术[/b]魔法的痕迹。

original: Theodore: To make matters worse,[p/] the Construct placed the evidence in the wrong locker.
translation: Theodore: 更糟的是，[p/]那个构造体把物证放在了错误的柜子里。

original: So, he [i]did[/i] send the Construct to the locker room to plant the evidence.
translation: 所以，他[i]确实[/i]有让构造体把物证放在储物柜里。

original: He must have also fabricated the documents that accused Miriam of cheating.
translation: 他肯定还伪造了指控弗雷加作弊的文件。

original: It was all to make [i]her[/i] look like the murderer,[p/] but this doesn't give me anything new to work with.
translation: 这也是为了让[i]她[/i]更像凶手，[p/]但这并没有让我获得可以打破局面的信息。

original: Theodore: ...?
translation: Theodore: ……？

original: Theodore: Why am I thinking of this [i]now[/i]?
translation: Theodore: 我为什么[i]现在[/i]在想这个？

original: Hm...[p/] That piece of evidence didn’t evoke any useful thoughts from him.
translation: 唔……[p/]那份证据没能让他产生什么有用的想法。

original: Maybe I needed to try PROJECTING something related to the Construct's actions.
translation: 或许我该<size=1.5em>投射</size>跟构造体的行动有关的事物。

original: There was nothing there for me to use.
translation: 没有可以让我利用的内容。

original: Wait...[p/] He ordered the Construct to go to the Storage Room?
translation: 等下……[p/]他曾命令过奥术构造体前往储藏室？

original: It should have done that [i]after[/i] it was finished planting evidence in the locker room.
translation: 它本应在储物柜里放下物证[i]之后[/i]离开的。

original: But we [i]found[/i] it in the Locker Room...
translation: 但我们是在储物柜室里[i]找到[/i]它的……

original: Lockdown|Head Action
No...[p/] Redmond clearly didn't intend for the Construct to end up in the Locker Room.
translation: 不对啊……[p/]雷蒙德的本意明显不是让奥术构造体最后留在储物柜室里。

original: Someone or something must have interfered with it.
translation: 某人或某物一定干扰了它。

original: Right...[p/] The body was probably reported earlier than Redmond expected.
translation: 没错……[p/]尸体被发现并被报告的时间，可能要早于雷德蒙所预料的时间。

original: That meant he probably started the lockdown [i]while[/i] the Construct was still in the Locker Room.
translation: 也就是说，很可能在他启动封锁系统的[i]同时[/i]，构造体还在储物室里。

original: But does this change anything?
translation: 但这会改变什么吗？

original: No...[p/] The lockdown prevented the Construct from leaving the Locker Room.
translation: 不对……[p/]封锁阻止了奥术构造体离开储物柜室。

original: Would that have affected any of the elements at play during that time?
translation: 那这段时间，构造体的行动会有受到其他影响吗？

original: Right...[p/] The series of commands would have been interrupted...
translation: 对啊……[p/]指令的序列会被干扰……

original: Wait a minute!
translation: 等等！

original: MIRIAM: Constructs execute a series of commands in the order that they are given.
translation: MIRIAM: 奥术构造体会按照顺序，执行收到的一系列指令。

original: MIRIAM: But let’s say one of those tasks is impossible to complete.
translation: MIRIAM: 但我们假设其中有些任务是无法完成的。

original: MIRIAM: When the Construct gets to that task,[p/] it will deem the entire series impossible to complete.
translation: MIRIAM: 当奥术构造体开始执行无法完成的任务时，[p/]它会认定整套命令都无法执行。

original: MIRIAM: As a result,[p/] it will stop executing the series altogether.
translation: MIRIAM: 结果就是，[p/]它会停止执行全部任务。

original: Celeste: So if a task in a series of commands is impossible,[p/] then that command will interrupt the entire series.
translation: Celestel: 也就是说如果一系列任务中之一无法完成，[p/]那么这个任务会中断后续任务的进行。

original: If Redmond was trying to cover his tracks,[p/] the Construct’s [i]final[/i] command would be to wipe its memory...
translation: 如果雷德蒙有尝试掩盖自己的行踪，[p/]构造体接收的[i]最后一条[/i]指令一定是抹除所有记录……

original: But if its orders were interrupted by the lockdown,[p/] then—!
translation: 但如果指令因封锁启动而中断，[p/]那么——！

original: TYRION: Ms. Steelwind,[p/] I have nothing more to ask this witness.
translation: TYRION: 斯蒂尔文德女士，[p/]我没有要向证人询问的问题了。

original: AriaC: What?!
translation: AriaC: 什么？！

original: CELESTE: You’re not giving up, are you?
translation: CELESTE: 你还没放弃对吧？

original: CELESTE: Yeah...[p/] I thought so,[p/] but how are you going to prove he did it if he’s not on the stand?
translation: CELESTE: 是啊……[p/]我也觉得你不会放弃，[p/]但他都不在证人席上，你要怎么证明是他干的？

original: TYRION: Don’t worry.[p/] The next witness’s testimony will be all I need.
translation: TYRION: 别担心，[p/]只要下一个证人的证言就足够了。

original: CELESTE: "Next" witness?
translation: CELESTE: “下一个”证人？

original: AriaC: That look on your face isn’t one of resignation...
translation: AriaC: 你脸上可不是放弃希望的表情……

original: THEODORE: Ha![p/][s/] It’s nothing but desperate bravado.
translation: THEODORE: 哈！[p/][s/]不过是深陷绝望之中的垂死挣扎罢了。

original: THEODORE: Now,[p/] if you’ll excuse me...
translation: THEODORE: 现在，[p/]恕我失陪……

original: AriaC: ...You’ve let him get away, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: AriaC: ……你让他就这么走了，卡斯伯特先生。

original: AriaC: I hope you know what you’re doing.
translation: AriaC: 我希望你清楚自己在做什么。

original: TYRION: I do, Steelwind.
translation: TYRION: 我很清楚，斯蒂尔文德。

original: TYRION: First,[p/] I’d like for the Inquisition to bring in the Arcane Construct in the academy’s locker room.
translation: TYRION: 首先，[p/]我想请裁判所将位于学院储物柜室里的奥术构造体带到法庭上来。

original: AriaC: We’ve already established that the murderer could have wiped its history.
translation: AriaC: 我们已经确认了，凶手很可能抹消了它存储的日志。

original: TYRION: Please...[p/] Just humor me for a second.
translation: TYRION: 拜托……[p/]这次你就稍微迁就我一下。

original: AriaC: ...Fine.
translation: AriaC: ……那好吧。

original: AriaC: Bailiff,[p/] please relay Mr. Cuthbert's request to Commander White.
translation: AriaC: 法警，[p/]请将卡斯伯特先生的要求传达给怀特指挥官。

original: AriaC: Well...[p/] Here's your Construct.
translation: AriaC: 来了…….[p/]你要的构造体。

original: AriaC: I hope you know what you're doing, Mr. Cuthbert.
translation: AriaC: 卡斯伯特先生，我希望你知道自己要做什么。

original: TYRION: Construct!
translation: TYRION: 奥术构造体！

original: Construct: WHAT ARE YOUR ORDERS?
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>有何命令？</size>

original: TYRION: Please recite your command history.
translation: TYRION: 请复述你的历史指令。

original: Construct: REPORTING.
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>报告：</size>

original: Construct: COMMAND 1:[p/] STANDBY IN \[Headmaster’s Office\].
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>命令1：[p/]在\[校长办公室\]待命。</size>

original: Construct: COMMAND 2:[p/] AWAIT VOCAL SIGNAL \[“Attack!”\] FROM \[Theodore Redmond\].
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>命令2：[p/]等待\[西奥多·雷德蒙\]的\[“攻击！”\]声音信号。</size>

original: Redmond stood up from the gallery,[p/] his face turning from confusion into terrified realization.
translation: 雷德蒙从旁听席上突然站起，[p/]表情从困惑变成惊恐的领悟。

original: Steelwind watched him carefully,[p/] clutching the handle of her cane.
translation: 斯蒂尔文德警惕地盯住他，[p/]攥紧了手杖的把手。

original: Construct: COMMAND 3:[p/] TREAT \[Catherine Bellwether\] AS A HOSTILE ENTITY AND NEUTRALIZE.
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>命令3：[p/]将\[凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟\]视为敌对单位，并消灭该对象。</size>

original: THEODORE: Construct![p/][s/] Wipe your—!
translation: THEODORE: 奥术构造体！[p/][s/]清除你的——！

original: AriaC: [i]Hodl[/i]!
translation: AriaC: [i]Hodl[/i]！

original: Before he could finish his order,[p/] the prosecutor whipped out her cane and pointed it square at the headmaster.
translation: 还没等他说完命令，[p/]检察官突然抽出手杖直指校长。

original: The headmaster tensed as his body tightened and he fell over,[p/] restrained by magical energy.
translation: 校长身体突然紧绷，摔倒在地，[p/]被魔力束缚住了。

original: He struggled against the spell to no avail.[p/] He could only watch through gritted teeth as the Construct continued.
translation: 他拼命在法术下挣扎，但无济于事。[p/]他只得紧咬牙关，眼睁睁看着构造体继续读下去。

original: JUDGE: M-[p/][s/]Ms. Steelwind?!
translation: JUDGE: 斯、[p/][s/]斯蒂尔文德女士？！

original: AriaC: Excuse the interruption.[p/] Please continue.
translation: AriaC: 抱歉擅自打断庭审。[p/]请继续吧。

original: Construct: COMMAND 4:[p/] AWAIT VOCAL SIGNAL “Leave” FROM \[Theodore Redmond\].
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>命令4：[p/]等待\[西奥多·雷德蒙\]的“离开”声音信号。</size>

original: Construct: COMMAND 5:[p/] MOVE TO CLASSROOM 2-B. REPLY TO ANY INQUIRIES WITH VOICE LINE #3
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>命令5：[p/]移动至教室 2-B，过程中使用预设声音 #3 回复一切询问。</size>

original: Construct: COMMAND 6:[p/] REMOVE \[Catherine Bellwether\] FROM INTERIOR FRAME AND PLACE ON FLOOR.
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>命令6：[p/]将\[凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟\]从内部取出并放置于地上。</size>

original: TYRION: Thank you, Construct.
translation: TYRION: 奥术构造体，感谢你的陈述。

original: TYRION: You can stop now.[p/] I think we all know the rest.
translation: TYRION: 你可以停止运行了，[p/]我想剩下的我们都知道了。

original: TYRION: But just to be clear,[p/] who gave you this series of commands?
translation: TYRION: 但有一点请你说清楚，[p/]是谁给予你这一系列的命令的？

original: Construct: COMMANDS WERE PROVIDED BY Headmaster \[Theodore Redmond\].
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>命令由校长\[西奥多·雷德蒙\]所提供。</size>

original: THEODORE: How...?[p/][s/] HOW?!
translation: THEODORE: 怎么可能……？[p/][s/] <size=1.5em>这怎么可能？！</size>

original: THEODORE: I ordered the Construct to wipe its command history!
translation: THEODORE: 我命令过奥术构造体清除它的历史记录！

original: TYRION: Redmond,[p/] Constructs don’t follow the same logic that humans do.
translation: TYRION: 雷德蒙，[p/]构造体和人类的逻辑思维不同。

original: TYRION: They’re prone to error when their commands are impossible to execute.
translation: TYRION: 当命令不可能执行时，它们就很容易出错。

original: THEODORE: “Impossible”?![p/][s/] How were my commands impossible?!
translation: THEODORE: “不可能”？！[p/][s/]我的命令怎么会是不可能的？！

original: TYRION: You were the one that [i]made[/i] it impossible.
translation: TYRION: <u>导致</u>命令无法执行的正是你自己。

original: TYRION: You activated the lockdown system.
translation: TYRION: 你激活了学院的封锁系统。

original: THEODORE: The lockdown...?
translation: THEODORE: 封锁系统……？

original: TYRION: I imagine you never expected anyone to go to Lecture Hall 2-B.
translation: TYRION: 我想你根本没想过会有人进入2-B号讲堂。

original: Tyrion: But the Ianus twins discovered the body earlier than you expected.
translation: Tyrion: 但伊努斯姐妹在比你预想更早的时候发现了尸体。

original: TYRION: You had no choice but to immediately activate the lockdown system when it was reported.[p/] It would have been suspicious otherwise.
translation: TYRION: 你别无选择只能在案件被通报时立即激活封锁系统。[p/]否则你自己就会收到怀疑。

original: TYRION: However,[p/][s/] the Construct was still in the Locker Room when you did this.
translation: TYRION: 然而，[p/][s/]当时奥术构造体还在储物柜室里。

original: THEODORE: So [i]that’s[/i] why it was there...
translation: THEODORE: 原来<u>这</u>就是为什么它在那……

original: TYRION: The Construct finished its tasks in the Locker Room,[p/] but then it tried to follow your next command.
translation: TYRION: 奥术构造体完成了在储物柜室里的任务。[p/]……但之后它试图进行下一项指令。

original: TYRION: It attempted to move to the Storage Room,[p/] but was prevented from doing so.
translation: TYRION: 它尝试移动至储藏室，[p/]但动作被阻止了。

original: TYRION: Completion of that command was impossible.
translation: TYRION: 这一项指令不可能完成。

original: TYRION: So,[p/] the series of commands was stopped [i]before[/i] it wiped its history.
translation: TYRION: 所以，[p/]指令的执行停止在了清除历史记录<u>之前</u>。

original: THEODORE: No...!
translation: THEODORE: 不……！

original: TYRION: Theodore Redmond![p/][s/] You ordered your Construct to murder Catherine Bellwether.
translation: TYRION: 西奥多·雷德蒙！[p/][s/]你命令奥术构造体杀害凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟。

original: TYRION: Then you had it place the murder weapon in a locker to frame Miriam Frega!
translation: TYRION: 之后命令其将凶器放在储物柜里，试图陷害米莉亚姆·弗雷加！

original: TYRION: And we have your Construct’s testimony to prove it!
translation: TYRION: 我们有奥术构造体的证言来证实这一切！

original: Tyrion: ...That's your last move, Redmond.[p/] That’s checkmate.
translation: Tyrion: ……无处可逃了，雷德蒙。[p/]将死。

original: AriaC: I...[p/] can’t believe it...
translation: AriaC: 我……[p/无法相信……

original: AriaC: How could you do something like this, Headmaster?
translation: AriaC: 您怎会做出这样的事，校长？

original: THEODORE: ...She was going to take everything from me.
translation: THEODORE: ……她要夺走我的一切。

original: THEODORE: My position.[p/][p/][s/] My academy.[p/][p/][s/] My students.
translation: THEODORE: 我的职位。[p/][p/][s/]我的学院。[p/][p/][s/]我的学生。

original: THEODORE: Everything would be gone.[p/][s/] It was going to be [i]stolen[/i] by her and the Fregas!
translation: THEODORE: 我的一切都将化为乌有。[p/][s/]这一切都会被她和弗雷加家族的人<u>偷走</u>！

original: AriaC: I—
translation: AriaC: 我——

original: AriaC: Why didn’t you say anything...?
translation: AriaC: 你为什么不说出来呢……？

original: AriaC: I could have—
translation: AriaC: 我本可以——

original: THEODORE: Don’t you [i]dare[/i] stand there and act ignorant, Lady Steelwind!
translation: THEODORE: 少站在那装无辜了！斯蒂尔文德小姐！

original: THEODORE: Do you think the Fregas acted alone?!
translation: THEODORE: 你以为弗雷加家是单独行事的吗？！

original: THEODORE: The Grand General is also on the school board,[p/] and he endorsed this plan just as much as they did!
translation: THEODORE: 大将军也是学院董事会的一员，[p/]而他对这个计划的喜爱与其他人没有分别！

original: THEODORE: I have nothing to say to you.
translation: THEODORE: 我和你没什么好说的。

original: THEODORE: I thought you were different.[p/] I listened to you and the prince's lies about societal reform.
translation: THEODORE: 我本以为你不一样。[p/]我听信了你和王子关于社会改革的谎言。

original: THEODORE: In the end,[p/] you were just like the rest of them...
translation: THEODORE: 归根结底，[p/]你与他们是一样的……

original: THEODORE: By the Scaled Lord,[p/] what have I done?
translation: THEODORE: 鳞甲领主啊，[p/]我到底做了什么？

original: THEODORE: I was even willing to sacrifice poor Wallace...
translation: THEODORE: 我甚至甘愿去牺牲可怜的华莱士……

original: THEODORE: Why did I ever listen to[p/]
translation: THEODORE: 为何我会听信[p/]

original: Theodore: Why did I do this?
translation: Theodore: 为何我会做出这种事？

original: JUDGE: ...It appears we have a full confession.
translation: JUDGE: ……看来已经全盘招供了。

original: JUDGE: The court sees no reason to prolong this any further.
translation: JUDGE: 法庭认为没有理由再继续拖延此案。

original: JUDGE: Bailiff,[p/] please escort the witness to a holding cell.
translation: JUDGE: 法警，[p/]请押送证人到拘留所。

original: WALLACE: Mr. Cuthbert![p/][s/] You...[p/][s/] You really did it!
translation: WALLACE: 卡斯伯特先生！[p/][s/]你……[p/][s/]你真的做到了！

original: CELESTE: It feels amazing, right?[p/] Like a big weight being lifted from your shoulders.
translation: CELESTE: 感觉如梦似幻对吧？[p/]一种如释重负的感觉。

original: WALLACE: It does,[p/] but Headmaster Redmond—
translation: WALLACE: 确实如此，[p/]但是雷德蒙校长——

original: WALLACE: What am I going to do now...?
translation: WALLACE: 我现在该怎么办呢……？

original: WALLACE: Headmaster Redmond was the only reason I could even [i]attend[/i] the Academy.
translation: WALLACE: 我能在学院<u>上学</u>都是因为雷德蒙校长。

original: WALLACE: If the school board replaces him with someone like Bellwether—
translation: WALLACE: 如果董事会用另一个贝尔维瑟那样的人取代他——

original: CELESTE: C-[p/][s/]Come on![p/][s/] Don’t think like that!
translation: CELESTE: 没、[p/][s/]没事的！[p/][s/]别那样想！

original: CELESTE: You've been acquitted![p/][s/] You still have your freedom!
translation: CELESTE: 你已经脱罪了！[p/][s/]你仍是自由之身啊！

original: I wanted to agree,[p/] but the study of [b]necromancy[/b] was outlawed.
translation: 我想要附和赞同，[p/]但研习[b]死灵术[/b]是违法的。

original: Without Redmond’s support,[p/] there weren’t many places he [i]could[/i] learn it.
translation: 没有了雷德蒙的支持，[p/]世上可没多少<u>能</u>供他研究的地方。

original: And then there was staff at the Imperial Academy...
translation: 还有王国学院的员工们……

original: CELESTE: H-[p/]Hey,[p/][s/] not you too!
translation: CELESTE: 嘿、[p/]嘿！[p/][s/]别你也这么一副样子啊！

original: TYRION: Sorry...[p/] But Valentina,[p/] Valerie,[p/] and Jan.[p/] They’re all going to lose their jobs.
translation: TYRION: 不好意思……[p/]但想想瓦伦蒂娜，[p/]瓦莱丽，[p/]还有简。[p/]他们都要丢掉工作了。

original: CELESTE: Come on![p/][s/] You found the truth [i]and[/i] you put a murderer behind bars!
translation: CELESTE: 别想这些啦！[p/][s/]你找到了真相，<u>还</u>把真凶送进了监狱！

original: CELESTE: You saved Wallace!
translation: CELESTE: 你救了华莱士！

original: Ruby: She's right.
translation: Ruby: 她说得对。

original: As we exited the courtroom,[p/] we were greeted by Ms. Tymora.
translation: 我们离开法庭时，[p/]泰摩拉女士向我们打招呼。

original: Ruby: At the end of the day,[p/] you saved Wallace from a wrongful conviction.
translation: Ruby: 今天，[p/]你将华莱士从冤罪中解救出来。

original: Ruby: You did what you set out to do.[p/] You should be proud of yourself for that.
translation: Ruby: 你完成了既定目标。[p/]你应当为此感到自豪。

original: TYRION: I just wish I could do more.
translation: TYRION: 我希望能做更多。

original: CELESTE: Nope![p/][s/] None of that!
translation: CELESTE: 别！[p/][s/]别再想那个了！

original: Celeste: I’m taking all of us to that restaurant we went to last time.
translation: Celeste: 我带大家去上次去的那间餐厅。

original: TYRION: Do you...[p/] remember how much that place cost?
translation: TYRION: 你难道……[p/]忘了上次我们花了多少钱吗？

original: CELESTE: Don’t worry.[p/] I have plenty of gold.
translation: CELESTE: 没事的没事的，[p/]我很有钱。

original: TYRION: ...Am I the only one on this team not making any money?
translation: TYRION: ……我是这里唯一没赚到钱的人吗？

original: Ruby: ...Why don't you meet us there, Celeste?
translation: Ruby: ……我们就在那汇合吧，塞莱斯特。

original: Ruby: I need to talk with Tyrion for a moment.
translation: Ruby: 我有些话想和提利昂聊聊。

original: Celeste: Alright.
translation: Celeste: 好。

original: Celeste: Let's go, Wallace!
translation: Celeste: 我们走吧，华莱士！

original: Wallace: U-[p/][s/]Um...[p/] Okay...
translation: Wallace: 唔、[p/][s/]嗯……[p/]好的……

original: Ruby: ...
translation: Ruby: ……

original: Ruby: ...You used that ability again, didn't you?
translation: Ruby: ……你又用了那股力量，对吧？

original: She didn't appear to be praising me...
translation: 听起来她并不是要夸奖我……

original: Tyrion: I-[p/]I did...[p/] I didn't really have a choice...
translation: Tyrion: 我、[p/]我是用了…….[p/]我别无选择……

original: Ruby: The Eye of Horus is a powerful tool, Tyrion.
translation: Ruby: 荷鲁斯之眼是个强大的工具，提利昂。

original: Ruby: But that's twice now that you've used that ability to get out of a tough spot.
translation: Ruby: 但你已经两次用那种力量来脱离困境了。

original: Ruby: You can't keep relying on it if you want to grow.
translation: Ruby: 一直依赖它的话，你也难以成长。

original: Ruby: One day,[p/] you'll find a witness that it [i]won't[/i] work on.
translation: Ruby: 总有一天，[p/]你会遇到一个对他[i]不管用[/i]的证人。
