original: Tyrion: It's worked for me this far, though...
translation: Tyrion: 可到目前为止都能生效……

original: Tyrion: B-[p/][s/]But I suppose you're right.
translation: Tyrion: 但、[p/][s/]但你说得没错。

original: Tyrion: I'll try to rely on it less next time...
translation: Tyrion: 我下次会尽力少依赖它的……

original: TYRION: And that marked the end of another case in my career as a defense attorney.
translation: TYRION: 这标志着我辩护律师生涯中另一个案件的结束。

original: TYRION: Another life saved,[p/] and another murderer brought to justice.
translation: TYRION: 又拯救了一条无辜的性命，[p/]又一名凶手被绳之以法。

original: TYRION: ...But I still couldn’t shake this feeling of uneasiness.
translation: TYRION: ……但我仍无法摆脱这种不安的感觉。

original: TYRION: Was it guilt for what would happen to the faculty staff?
translation: TYRION: 是因为想到了学院教职员工们的未来吗？

original: TYRION: ...Or was it something else?
translation: TYRION: ……还是说因为其他的事？

original: Valerie: I can't believe it...[p/] It was really Theodore the entire time?
translation: Valerie: 我现在都无法相信……[p/]西奥多真的是凶手吗？

original: Jan: Can we talk about something else?[p/] Thinking about all that is really bumming me out.
translation: Jan: 我们能说点别的不？[p/]一想到这些我就心烦意乱。

original: Aria: I hope I'm not interrupting.
translation: Aria: 希望我没有打扰到你们。

original: Valentina: Oh, great...[p/] What do [i]you[/i] want?
translation: Valentina: 哇，“好极了”……[p/][i]你[/i]又想干嘛？

original: Aria: I've always tried to act with more compassion than my fellow aristocrats,[p/] but I suppose I'm still blind to the privilege I was born with.
translation: Aria: 我一直致力于比同侪的贵族们以更富同情的方式行事，[p/]但我想我仍然对自己与生俱来的那种特权没有认识。

original: Aria: I am truly sorry if my words during the trial were insensitive to your circumstances.
translation: Aria: 如果我在审判中的言语没有照顾到你们的情况，容我在此致歉。

original: Aria: I've been speaking with the students here.[p/] There's quite a bit of outrage about your firing.
translation: Aria: 我也与在校的学生有交谈。[p/]你们被解雇的事情引起了不少的愤怒。

original: Valentina: Wait,[p/] really?
translation: Valentina: 等等，[p/]真的？

original: Aria: The idea of a machine doing your job doesn't seem to sit well with the student body.
translation: Aria: 让机器履行你们工作的想法似乎并未让学生们认可。

original: Aria: While not everyone was as sympathetic as I'd hoped,[p/] most everyone agrees that your leaving would be a tremendous loss.
translation: Aria: 虽然不是每个人都如我希望的那样有同理心，[p/]但几乎所有人都认同你们的离去是个重大的损失。

original: Aria: I've spoken with the head of the student council.[p/] We believe that we can convince the school board to keep you on staff.
translation: Aria: 我与学生会的主席也谈了一次话。[p/]我们相信能够说服学院董事会保留你们的职位。

original: Valerie: You can do that?!
translation: Valerie: 你真可以做得到吗？！

original: Aria: But is that what you want, Valentina?
translation: Aria: 但这确实是你想要的吗，瓦伦蒂娜？

original: Aria: I don't see the working conditions here improving without Redmond as headmaster.
translation: Aria: 校长不是雷德蒙的话，我想这里的工作条件也不会再改善了。

original: Valentina: Well...[p/] we've got to make a living somehow.
translation: Valentina: 但是……[p/]我们总得找路子谋生。

original: Aria: ...There's actually a merchant out in Aurinax who takes an interest in people like you and your sister.
translation: Aria: ……其实在欧奥耐克斯有个商人，他对你们姐妹这样的人很感兴趣。

original: Aria: He's recently purchased a condemned building in the city,[p/] and he's looking to turn it into a restaurant.
translation: Aria: 他最近在首都购置了一套废弃的建筑，[p/]打算将其改造为餐厅。

original: Aria: I remember how delicious your meals were when I was a student here.[p/] I'm certain he would hire you if I asked.
translation: Aria: 我还记得自己是学生的时候，你们做的餐点有多美味。[p/]只要我去问一下，相信他会雇佣你们。

original: Valentina: Really?!
translation: Valentina: 真的吗？！

original: Aria: Would you be interested in that?[p/] It's a bit of a gamble,[p/] but your employment wouldn't be left to the whims of the nobility.
translation: Aria: 你们有兴趣吗？[p/]这当然有点冒险，[p/]但你们的工作不再取决于贵族们的一时兴起。

original: Valentina: O-[p/][s/]Of course!
translation: Valentina: 当、[p/][s/]当然有！

original: Aria: Good.[p/] I'll contact him later today.[p/] You'll probably be hearing from him soon.
translation: Aria: 那好。[p/]我今天稍晚就联系他，[p/]你们很快就就会得到消息。

original: Valentina: Hm...
translation: Valentina: 嗯……

original: Valerie: She's not so bad for a noble.
translation: Valerie: 她好像不是那么坏的贵族。

original: Valentina: ...I don't know if I buy it.[p/] You've heard about what her dad's been doing, haven't you?
translation: Valentina: ……我还不知道是否该买帐。[p/]你也听说了她爸爸的作为，不是吗？

original: Valerie: Don't be so pessimistic.[p/] She seems nice.
translation: Valerie: 别这么悲观了。[p/]她看起来挺友好的。

original: Jan: I'm kind of with Valentina on this one.[p/] Something's always been up with the Steelwinds.
translation: Jan: 这个问题上我比较赞同瓦伦蒂娜。[p/]斯蒂尔文德家的人总有些不对劲。

original: Jan: Do you remember that scandal all those years ago?
translation: Jan: 你们还记得几年前就开始有的那些丑闻吗？

original: Valerie: No, actually.[p/] What happened?
translation: Valerie: 我不怎么记得。[p/]怎么了呢？

original: Jan: Right,[p/] you two were probably just kids when it all went down,[p/] but it was big news at the time.
translation: Jan: 对哦，[p/]那时候你们俩还只是娃娃。[p/]但当时可是大新闻啊。

original: Jan: That girl's mom went on a rampage and massacred a village full of farmers—[p/]children included.
translation: Jan: 那个女孩的妈妈突然暴走，屠杀了一村子的农民——[p/]也包括他们的孩子。

original: Valentina: Scaled Lord...
translation: Valentina: 鳞甲领主啊……

original: Jan: Lucio Steelwind's violent streak didn't start with these rebellions.
translation: Jan: 卢西奥·斯蒂尔文德的暴力行动并不是因为叛乱开启的。

original: Jan: I think they had a bad marriage or something.[p/] He couldn't wait to get rid of her.
translation: Jan: 我猜他们的婚姻并不美满，[p/]他迫不及待地要除掉妻子。

original: Jan: After what she did,[p/] he personally prosecuted her and demanded a death sentence.
translation: Jan: 在妻子做出那件事后，[p/]他亲自提起公诉并取得了死刑判决。

original: Jan: He even carried out the execution himself.
translation: Jan: 他甚至是亲自完成了行刑。

original: Valerie: He really is a monster, isn't he...?
translation: Valerie: 那他可真是个怪物，不是吗……？

original: Jan: Yeah,[p/] I'm not sure if I'd trust [i]anyone[/i] raised by a guy like that.
translation: Jan: 是啊，[p/]所以不确定该不该相信那个人养育的[i]孩子[/i]。

original: Valentina: See?[p/] There's always something up with the aristocrats.
translation: Valentina: 看吧？[p/]贵族身上总是没什么好事。

original: Valentina: As far as I'm concerned,[p/] I'm not getting my hopes up until I hear from this "merchant from Aurinax".
translation: Valentina: 就我而言，[p/]听到这个"欧奥耐克斯商人"的消息前我也没有任何希望。

original: Valentina: But hey,[p/] if I do get that restaurant,[p/] we'll need [i]someone[/i] to help us keep it clean.
translation: Valentina: 不过嘛，[p/]如果我真的得到那个餐厅，[p/]我们需要[i]一个人[/i]帮我们保持店面清洁。

original: Valentina: You interested, Jan?
translation: Valentina: 感兴趣吗，简？

original: Jan: Cleaning one small restaurant instead of an entire school?
translation: Jan: 打扫一间餐馆而不是整座学院？

original: Jan: I'm falling asleep just thinking about it.
translation: Jan: 想想我感觉都快睡着了。

original: Valentina: Okay...[p/] Just make sure you still do your job, okay?
translation: Valentina: 那好吧……[p/]只要你确定还有工作，对吧？

original: KNIGHT: Man...[p/] Steelwind's been keeping the old timer here for hours.
translation: KNIGHT: 兄弟啊……[p/]斯蒂尔文德好像已经审问那个老家伙几个小时了。

original: KNIGHT: What’s there to even ask at this point?
translation: KNIGHT: 都这种时候了还有什么可问的？

original: Orym: Turns out she doesn't trust his testimony.
translation: Orym: 因为归根究底，她不相信校长的证言。

original: Orym: Something about his memories not matching up with the crime scene.
translation: Orym: 他记忆中的部分内容与犯罪现场不符。

original: Knight: I mean he [i]is[/i] pretty old.
translation: Knight: 我意思是，他[i]真的[/i]很老了。

original: Orym: Yeah...[p/] Well,[p/] she found that damned symbol etched into his desk.
translation: Orym: 是啊……[p/]只是，[p/]她发现校长的桌子下刻着那个该死的记号。

original: ORYM: Or what did she call it?[p/] The "Purple Mark”?
translation: ORYM: 她管这东西叫什么来着？[p/]“紫色标记”？

original: KNIGHT: Oh,[p/] for the love of—[p/] Not [i]this[/i] again...
translation: KNIGHT: 哦，[p/]天呐——[p/]怎么又是[i]这个[/i]……

original: ORYM: Look.[p/] If the little lady wants to chase the boogeyman,[p/] just let her.
translation: ORYM: 听着，[p/]如果那位亲爱的小姐打算调查恶魔，[p/]那就让她去吧。

original: ORYM: At least this time,[p/] she’s doing it personally instead of dragging us into it.
translation: ORYM: 至少这次，[p/]她没把我们拖下水。

original: ERIS: Cast [b]Sleep[/b]...
translation: ERIS: 施展[b]睡眠术[/b]……

original: ORYM: H-[p/][s/]Hey!
translation: ORYM: 喂、[p/][s/]喂！

original: ORYM: What’s...[p/] up...[p/] with...?
translation: ORYM: 发生……[p/]什么……[p/]了……？

original: THEODORE: I...
translation: THEODORE: 我……

original: THEODORE: Wait...
translation: THEODORE: 等下……

original: THEODORE: Wait a minute!
translation: THEODORE: 等等！

original: THEODORE: I remember it now!
translation: THEODORE: 我记起来了！

original: THEODORE: But how—?!
translation: THEODORE: 但是怎么——？！

original: Eris: That was close.
translation: Eris: 好险。

original: Eris: My elation over meeting him almost made me forget.
translation: Eris: 见到他的喜悦差点都让我忘了这件事。

original: THEODORE: Eris...[p/][s/] What are you doing here?!
translation: THEODORE: 厄莉斯……[p/][s/]你在这儿干什么？！

original: THEODORE: W-[p/][s/]Why...?
translation: THEODORE: 为、[p/][s/]为什么……？

original: THEODORE: It was you![p/][s/] You put those ideas into my mind!
translation: THEODORE: 是你！[p/][s/]是你把这些想法灌输给我的！

original: THEODORE: [i]You’re[/i] the one who told me to murder Bellwether!
translation: THEODORE: [i]你[/i]才是那个让我杀害贝尔维瑟的人！

original: Eris: Oh...[p/] You people never fail to amuse me.
translation: Eris: 噢……[p/]你们这些人类可从未让我感到无聊啊。

original: Eris: I didn’t [p/][s/]"[i]make[/i]" you do anything.
translation: Eris: 我没有[p/][s/]“[i]让[/i]”你做任何事。

original: Eris: Everything you did that day—[p/]all the planning,[p/] all the preparation—[p/]that came from your [i]own[/i] mind.
translation: Eris: 你那天所有的行为、[p/]所有的计划、[p/]所有的准备，[p/]可都是你[i]自己[/i]想出来的。

original: Eris: And I have to say,[p/] I was quite entertained with the scheme you came up with.
translation: Eris: 说实话，[p/]你布的局给了我不少乐子。

original: Eris: You even broke into Lady Frega’s room!
translation: Eris: 你甚至闯进了弗雷加小姐的房间！

original: Eris: I never thought you were capable of such things, Young Theodore!
translation: Eris: 我根本没想到你能做到这个份上，小西奥多！

original: Eris: Hm...[p/] It’s such a shame, though.
translation: Eris: 嗯……[p/]不过还真是遗憾啊。

original: Eris: I wished I could have gotten Wallace to play the villain instead of you.
translation: Eris: 我本来是想让华莱士而不是你来当反派的。

original: Eris: Could you imagine if [i]he[/i] turned?
translation: Eris: 你能想象如果[i]他[/i]是幕后黑手的景象吗？

original: Eris: Armies of the undead,[p/] running rampant in the streets.[p/] It would have been spectacular.
translation: Eris: 不死人大军在大街上横冲直撞，[p/]那将会蔚为壮观。

original: Eris: But alas,[p/] even [i]I[/i] couldn't corrupt him.
translation: Eris: 唉，[p/]可惜即使是[i]我[/i]也无法腐化他呢。

original: Eris: He falters in every other situation,[p/] but when it comes to [b]necromancy[/b],[p/] his will is adamantine.
translation: Eris: 他在其他任何情况下都摇摆不定，[p/]但只要到了[b]死灵术[/b]的领域，[p/]他的意志就坚定不移了。

original: THEODORE: Answer me![p/][s/] Who are you?![p/][s/] [i]What[/i] are you?!
translation: THEODORE: 回答我的问题！[p/][s/]你到底是谁？！[p/][s/]你到底是什么[i]东西[/i]？！

original: Eris: Who am I...?
translation: Eris: [i]我[/i]是谁……？

original: Eris: [j]I’m the ruler of the Sixth Circle—[p/]the Lord of Shadows.[/j]
translation: Eris: [j]我是地狱第六环之主——[p/]暗影之主。[/j]

original: THEODORE: AHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!
translation: THEODORE: 噶啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！

original: Player: Bed
It was an extravagant bed.
translation: 一张奢华的床。

original: Miriam appeared to live pretty well here.
translation: 显然米莉亚姆在此过着锦衣玉食的生活。

original: Player: Dresser
It was a dresser.[p/] It probably contained Miriam's clothes.
translation: 是一个衣柜。[p/]大概装着米莉亚姆的衣物。

original: ...It would definitely be a bad idea to take a closer look with Miriam here.
translation: ……当着米莉亚姆的面仔细调查里面肯定是个坏主意。

original: Player: Table
It was a table for guests.
translation: 一张会客桌。

original: ...But it didn't look like it's seen much use until now.
translation: ……但看起来直到刚才都没怎么用过。

original: Player: Questions
TYRION: Ms. Frega.[p/] I was wondering if we could ask you some questions about—
translation: TYRION: 弗雷加女士，[p/]请问我可以问您一些问题吗——

original: MIRIAM: Excuse me?[p/] I don’t believe anyone has permitted you to speak.
translation: MIRIAM: 不好意思，[p/]还没有人允许你发言吧。

original: Oh,[p/] here we go...
translation: 噢，[p/]开始喽……

original: Celeste was still smiling,[p/] but I could faintly hear her grinding her teeth together.
translation: 塞莱斯特面上依旧保持微笑，[p/]但我隐约听到她咬牙切齿。

original: Celeste: ...S-[p/][s/]So,[p/] we heard about what happened to Professor Bellwether.
translation: Celeste: ……那、[p/][s/]那么，[p/]我们听说了贝尔维瑟教授的遭遇。

original: Celeste: I can’t believe it.
translation: Celeste: 真是难以置信。

original: MIRIAM: Yes...[p/] It’s quite tragic what happened to her.
translation: MIRIAM: 是的……[p/]她的遭遇十分不幸。

original: MIRIAM: She had always been a friend of House Frega...
translation: MIRIAM: 她向来是弗雷加一族的朋友……

original: She was obviously going to be more receptive to Celeste Steelwind.
translation: 她对塞莱斯特·斯蒂尔文德显然更加友好。

original: It might be better to let Celeste take the lead on the questioning.
translation: 或许让塞莱斯特主导询问更好。

original: Celeste: We heard that you saw her on the day of the murder.
translation: Celeste: 我们听说你在凶杀案发生当天看到了她。

original: Celeste: Could you tell us more about what happened?
translation: Celeste: 能否告诉我们当时的情况呢？

original: MIRIAM: Oh, you heard about that from your relative, did you?
translation: MIRIAM: 哦，你从你家亲戚那里听说的，是吗？

original: MIRIAM: If you don’t mind me asking,[p/] why are you so interested? [h="She’s not like Aria.| ...Is she?"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 你不介意的话，[p/]我能问问你为什么感兴趣吗？[h="她跟阿莉亚不一样|，是吗……？"/]

original: Celeste: O-[p/]Oh,[p/] you know.[p/] I’m just curious, is all.
translation: Celeste: 呃、[p/]哦，[p/]你懂的。[p/]我就是有点好奇，就是这样。

original: Celeste: You know how uneventful life can be sometimes...
translation: Celeste: 你知道有些时候就是太波澜不惊了……

original: Celeste: ...Being a noble and all.
translation: Celeste: ……作为一名贵族。

original: Alright,[p/] she really needed to tone it down.
translation: 行吧，[p/]她确实也需要缓和一下气氛。

original: MIRIAM: Oh,[p/] is that all?
translation: MIRIAM: 哦，[p/]就这么回事？

original: MIRIAM: I was worried you were going down the same path as that poor,[p/] confused Aria.
translation: MIRIAM: 我还担心你步上了那个又贫穷、[p/]又迷茫的阿莉亚的后尘。

original: MIRIAM: Well,[p/] I’m in the middle of a study break anyway.
translation: MIRIAM: 也行，[p/]本来我也正好研究到一半，打算休息一下。

original: MIRIAM: I suppose I have some time to spill some tea.
translation: MIRIAM: 我想有喝点茶的工夫。

original: MIRIAM: Speaking of...[p/] Construct,[p/] please prepare us some tea.
translation: MIRIAM: 说到这里……[p/]构造体，[p/]请为我们奉茶。

original: Miriam: Use that lotus tea we imported from the Eastern Kingdoms. [h="She might be useful.|I should win her favor." e="h"/]
translation: Miriam: 用从东方古国进口的莲茶。[h="如果能赢得她的好感，|她或许能为我所用。" e="h"/]

original: Construct: ACKNOWLEDGED.
translation: Construct: <size=1.5em>遵命。</size>

original: Celeste: “Lotus tea”...?
translation: Celeste: “莲茶”……？

original: Celeste: You...[p/][s/] have Lotus Juice?!
translation: Celeste: 你……[p/][s/]有莲之水？！

original: ...I could feel myself slowly losing control of this situation.
translation: ……我感到自己正慢慢失去对局面的控制。

original: Player: What did you see?
translation: Player: 你看到了什么？

original: Celeste: I heard that you were one of the last people who saw the professor.
translation: Celeste: 我有听说那天你是最后目击到教授的人之一。

original: Celeste: Where did this happen?
translation: Celeste: 那是什么时候？

original: MIRIAM: I was in the hallways when I saw her coming out of the headmaster’s office.
translation: MIRIAM: 我在走廊里，看到她从校长室出来。

original: MIRIAM: She appeared to be heading towards the library.
translation: Miriam: 她看起来要往图书馆的方向走。

original: Celeste: Do you remember what time this happened?
translation: Celeste: 你记得那是几点吗？

original: MIRIAM: Ah...[p/] I’m not really sure, honestly.
translation: MIRIAM: 啊……[p/]讲实话，我不太确定。

original: MIRIAM: It’s a little embarrassing,[p/] but I have a bad habit of getting too absorbed in my work.
translation: MIRIAM: 说来有点尴尬……[p/]但我有个坏习惯，容易沉浸在学习中。

original: MIRIAM: Sometimes entire [i]hours[/i] will pass without my notice.
translation: MIRIAM: 有时候，[i]好几个小时[/i]过去了我都注意不到。

original: Celeste: Do you have a rough idea at least?
translation: Celeste: 那大概的时间还有印象吗？

original: MIRIAM: I believe it was in the morning.
translation: MIRIAM: 我想应该是上午吧。

original: So it was [i]before[/i] her meeting with the headmaster?
translation: 所以那是在与校长会面发生[i]之前[/i]？

original: Celeste: Did anything seem off about her?
translation: Celeste: 她看起来有什么不对劲吗？

original: MIRIAM: ...No.[p/] It was a short encounter.
translation: MIRIAM: ……没有。[p/]我们就简单寒暄了一下。

original: MIRIAM: I merely greeted her,[p/] and she responded in kind. [h="Or at least...|that’s what [i]should[/i] have happened..." e="sa"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 我就是向她问了好，[p/]然后她和蔼地回应了。[h="或者说至少……|[i]本该是[/i]这样的……" e="sa"/]

original: That thought just now...[p/] What did it mean?
translation: 刚刚的想法……[p/]那是什么意思？

original: I slowly glanced at Celeste and caught her attention.
translation: 我慢慢看向塞莱斯特，以悄悄引起她的注意。

original: Using small motions,[p/] I shook my head.[p/] Miriam was holding something back.
translation: 我打出细微的手势，[p/]摇了摇头。[p/]米莉亚姆还隐瞒了什么。

original: Celeste: Were you and the professor [i]really[/i] on good terms?
translation: Celeste: 你和教授[i]确实[/i]关系亲密吗？

original: Celeste: I heard she was pretty mean towards the other students.
translation: Celeste: 我听说她对其他学生很刻薄。

original: MIRIAM: Towards the riff-raff, maybe,[p/] but not to students like us.
translation: MIRIAM: 对那些乌合之众来说，或许是吧。[p/]不过，对我这样的学生可不一样。

original: Miriam: She was my personal instructor during summer break.
translation: Miriam: 她在夏休的时候也担任我的私人导师。

original: Miriam: She fulfilled a similar role to both—[p/] ...to my sister when she studied here.
translation: Miriam: 她在与……[p/]与我还在校的姐姐来往时也担任了这个职务。

original: Miriam: She was a long-time friend of House Frega.
translation: Miriam: 她长久以来都是弗雷加一族的好友。

original: MIRIAM: That’s why we were planning on appointing her as the new headmaster.
translation: MIRIAM: 这就是为什么我们打算任命她为新一任校长。

original: Celeste: Wait...[p/][s/] What did you just say?!
translation: Celeste: 等等……[p/][s/]你刚刚说什么？！

original: Player: Replacing the Headmaster
translation: Player: 替换校长

original: Celeste: Did you just say that they were going to appoint [i]Bellwether[/i] as the new headmaster?!
translation: Celeste: 你刚刚是说他们要任命[i]贝尔维瑟[/i]为新校长？！

original: MIRIAM: Oh, I’m surprised you didn’t know.
translation: MIRIAM: 哦，你不知道这件事才让我惊讶呢。

original: MIRIAM: House Frega holds several seats on the academy’s board, along with the Grand General.
translation: MIRIAM: 弗雷加家族在校董事会有几个席位，大将军也列席其中。

original: MIRIAM: We were making plans to have her replace that lout: Redmond.
translation: MIRIAM: 我们正打算让她代替那个废物雷德蒙呢。

original: They were going to sack the headmaster?!
translation: 他们要开除校长？

original: Celeste: ...Did Headmaster Redmond know about this?
translation: Celeste: ……雷德蒙校长知道吗？

original: MIRIAM: Oh, of course not.[p/] This was part of a large-scale plan.
translation: MIRIAM: 哦，当然不了。[p/]这只是一个更大的计划的一部分。

original: MIRIAM: Along with Redmond,[p/] we were also going to replace all of the staff members with Arcane Constructs.
translation: MIRIAM: 连同雷德蒙在内，我们要用奥术构造体换掉全部的教职工。

original: MIRIAM: We had to keep everything under wraps,[p/] or else the help would have left before we were ready.
translation: MIRIAM: 一切都得严格保密，[p/]不然帮工们就要在我们准备好前就逃跑了。

original: Miriam: And where would [i]that[/i] leave us?
translation: Miriam: [i]那样的话[/i]，我们该如何自处？

original: But Jan supposedly overheard Bellwether talking about the Constructs.
translation: 但是简在不经意间听到了贝尔维瑟提起那些奥术构造体。

original: Did Bellwether prematurely reveal the plan to Theodore...?[p/] Or was Jan lying about how he found out?
translation: 贝尔维瑟提前向西奥多暴露了计划吗？[p/]还是简在他怎么发现这件事上说谎了？

original: MIRIAM: ...But alas.[p/] With Bellwether gone,[p/] we’ll have to delay our plans.
translation: MIRIAM: ……可惜呀。[p/]贝尔维瑟死后，我们只能推迟计划了。

original: Player: Frega's Rapier
translation: Player: 弗雷加的刺剑

original: Celeste: So...[p/] We heard that Aria took your rapier as evidence for the case.
translation: Celeste: 是这样的……[p/]我们听说阿莉亚把你的刺剑当作本案的证据拿走了。

original: MIRIAM: Can you believe her?![p/][s/] She [i]still[/i] won’t give it back to me!
translation: MIRIAM: 你敢信她吗？[p/][s/]她[i]还是[/i]不把它还给我！

original: MIRIAM: My father will have my head if I can’t get it back soon!
translation: MIRIAM: 如果我不能马上拿回剑，父亲会要了我的命！

original: Celeste: How did it even become a part of the investigation anyways?
translation: Celeste: 它到底怎么掺和到调查里的？

original: MIRIAM: I don’t know![p/][s/] Aria won’t tell me anything!
translation: MIRIAM: 我不知道！[p/][s/]阿莉亚什么都不告诉我！

original: MIRIAM: I swear if that [i]necromancer[/i] was the one who stole it,[p/] I’ll execute him myself.
translation: MIRIAM: 我发誓，如果是被那个[i]死灵法师[/i]偷走的，[p/]我会亲手处决他。

original: Celeste: ...So someone [i]did[/i] steal it from you?
translation: Celeste: ……所以，是有人从你这里[i]偷走[/i]了那把剑？

original: MIRIAM: Yes...[p/] From right out of my room...
translation: MIRIAM: 是的……[p/]就从我的房间里……

original: Celeste: When did this happen?
translation: Celeste: 那是什么时候？

original: MIRIAM: About a few weeks ago.
translation: MIRIAM: 大概几周前吧。

original: MIRIAM: I noticed when I came back from one of my classes.
translation: MIRIAM: 我有一次下课回来，发现了这事。

original: MIRIAM: Someone removed the rapier from its display case in my room.
translation: MIRIAM: 有人从我房间里的展示柜里把刺剑拿走了。

original: Celeste: ...How did they get into your room in the first place?
translation: Celeste: ……但说到底，小偷怎么进入你房间的？

original: Celeste: Do you think someone used magic to teleport past the door?
translation: Celeste: 你认为可能是有人用法术传送进来吗？

original: MIRIAM: Please.[p/] I’m a master of [b]conjuration[/b] magic.
translation: MIRIAM: 得了吧。[p/]我是[b]召唤术[/b]魔法的大师。

original: MIRIAM: If someone attempted that,[p/] my enchantments would have shunted them out.
translation: MIRIAM: 如果有人尝试这么做，[p/]只会因我的法术吃闭门羹。

original: That meant that the thief came through one of the doors or windows.
translation: 也就是说盗贼是从门或窗户进来的。

original: MIRIAM: I bet it was that necromancer.
translation: MIRIAM: 我敢打赌是那个[i]死灵法师[/i]干的。

original: Miriam: I’m sure a street child like him just [i]knows[/i] how to pick a lock.
translation: Miriam: 我确信，像他那样的街头混子恰好[i]知道[/i]怎么撬锁。

original: Player: Your Grades
translation: Player: 你的成绩

original: Celeste: I’ve heard that you’re one of the academy’s top students.
translation: Celeste: 听说你是学院的顶尖学生之一。

original: Celeste: ...Your grades must be amazing.
translation: Celeste: ……那你的成绩肯定很漂亮了。

original: MIRIAM: Of course![p/] As an inheritor of House Frega,[p/] my grades are impeccable! [h="It feels good|to have my greatness recognized." e="h"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 这是自然！[p/]作为弗雷加家族的继承人之一，[p/]我的成绩无可挑剔！[[h="我的卓越为人所识，|这感觉真是太好了。" e="h"/]

original: That was strange...[p/] I didn't see anything contradictory through the Eye this time.
translation: 奇怪了……[p/]我这次没有从荷鲁斯之眼看到任何矛盾的内容。

original: Was she just delusional about how good a student she was?
translation: 她是不是真相信了自己“优秀学生”的妄想？

original: I gestured to Celeste to continue pressing her.
translation: 我向塞莱斯特打手势，示意她继续追问。

original: Celeste: O-[p/]Oh...[p/] Uh...
translation: Celeste: 啊、[p/]哦……[p/]呜……

original: Celeste: What kind of magic do you study here?
translation: Celeste: 你在这里研究哪种法术？

original: MIRIAM: You must be joking.[p/] I study magic from the school of [b]conjuration[/b].
translation: MIRIAM: 你在开玩笑吧。[p/]我学习[b]召唤术[/b]学派的魔法。

original: MIRIAM: Just like[p/] most members of my house.
translation: MIRIAM: 就像——[p/]我家族的大多数人一样。

original: Celeste: The school of [b]conjuration[/b]...
translation: Celeste: [i]召唤术[/i]学派……

original: Celeste: That’s the type of magic that specializes in spatial manipulation, right?
translation: CSteel: 那是专精操纵空间的魔法，对吧？

original: MIRIAM: Yes.[p/] I consider myself quite the expert in that field.
translation: MIRIAM: 是的。[p/]我认为自己在那个领域算是颇有学识。

original: MIRIAM: Why,[p/] the Crown Prince himself has asked for my assistance in a research study. [h="It's nice to finally work|with someone of my caliber." e="h"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 王储殿下甚至亲自请求我协助一个研究项目。[h="能和我这样水平的人一起工作，|可真是不错。" e="h"/]

original: Again,[p/] I didn’t see any thoughts that contradicted what she was saying.
translation: 又一次，[p/]我没有看到与她言语相悖的想法。

original: If she was smart enough to get the Crown Prince’s attention,[p/] why would she be cheating?
translation: 如果她聪明到能被王储殿下注意，[p/]她为什么要作弊？

original: Player: Aria Steelwind
translation: Player: 阿莉亚·斯蒂尔文德

original: Celeste: You said something about “my wayward relative” before.
translation: Celeste: 你前面好像有提到“我的远房亲戚”这个字眼。

original: Celeste: Were you talking about Aria?
translation: Celeste: 你是在说阿莉亚吗？

original: MIRIAM: O-[p/][s/]Oh...[p/] I’m terribly sorry if I offended you.
translation: MIRIAM: 哦、[p/][s/]哦……[p/]如果我冒犯了你，我感到万分抱歉。

original: MIRIAM: But I’m sure it must pain you to see the way that she’s been acting lately.
translation: MIRIAM: 但我相信，她最近的行事风格一定让你颇感心痛。

original: Celeste: Y-[p/]Yes...[p/] It’s...[p/] been [i]extremely[/i] hard.
translation: Celeste: 是、[p/]是啊……[p/]那……[p/]确实[i]十分[/i]不好。

original: Hang in there, Celeste.
translation: 坚持住，塞莱斯特。

original: MIRIAM: Did you know that she even interrogated [i]me[/i] about the murder yesterday?
translation: MIRIAM: 你知道她昨天就谋杀案一事审问了[i]我[/i]吗？

original: MIRIAM: Can you believe it?[p/] A [i]Steelwind[/i] running around a crime scene like a common knight.
translation: MIRIAM: 你敢信吗？[p/][i]斯蒂尔文德家的人[/i]像个普通骑士一样在犯罪现场忙活。

original: MIRIAM: Why,[p/] if I tried something like that,[p/] my father would disown me.
translation: MIRIAM: 我要是这么干，[p/]我父亲绝对会和我断绝关系。

original: Miriam: She's so desperate to prove that she's nothing like her father.
translation: Miriam: 她急切地想证明自己与她父亲不一样。

original: Tyrion: ...Is that really what you believe?
translation: Tyrion: ……你真的这么认为？

original: Tyrion: Or are you just hiding the fact that you're here on your father's behalf?
translation: Tyrion: 或者你只是在隐藏自己代表父亲来此的事实？

original: Aria: I am [i]not[/i] working with my father! [h="I working against him|just as much as you are!" e="sa"/]
translation: Aria: 我[i]没有[/i]参加父亲的事务！[h="和你一样|我是在对抗他！" e="sa"/]

original: Aria: My apologies.[p/] I didn't mean to lose my temper like that.
translation: Aria: 抱歉。[p/]我不知道自己怎么了。

original: Is that why she became a prosecutor?[p/] Was it all to reject her bloodthirsty father?
translation: 那就是她成为检察官的原因吗？[p/]只是为了反对她那嗜血的父亲？

original: MIRIAM: Honestly,[p/] she probably thinks she can do anything just because of her betrothed. [h="She's so full of herself.|Aster deserves better." e="a"/]
translation: MIRIAM: 说真的，[p/]因为她未婚夫在，她大概觉得自己能为所欲为。[h="她太自满了。|阿斯特值得更好的。" e="a"/]

original: Miriam: But if the Grand General keeps drowning these villages in blood,[p/] I imagine even [i]that[/i] will be in jeopardy. [h="And when that happens,|I'll steal him back." e="hs" /]
translation: Miriam: 但如果大将军一直这么让村庄变成血海，p/]我想就连[i]那位大人[/i]的立场也将岌岌可危。[h="到了那个时候，|我就把他夺回来。" e="hs" /]

original: Celeste: ...!
translation: Celeste: ……！

original: Celeste's eyes perked up.[p/] I'd be lying if I said mine didn't, too.
translation: 塞莱斯特两眼登时一亮，[p/]如果说我没有同样的反应那就是撒谎了。

original: I was also curious about who this “Aster” was.
translation: 我对那位“阿斯特”的身份非常好奇。

original: But I shook my head when she looked at me.
translation: 但塞莱斯特看向我时我摇了摇头。

original: We couldn't risk blowing our cover for some gossip about the prosecutor.
translation: 我们不能因为检察官的几条绯闻就搞砸自己的伪装。

original: Player: Arcane Construct
translation: Player: 奥术构造体

original: Celeste: You have an Arcane Construct in your room.
translation: Celeste: 你在自己房间里安放了一台奥术构造体。

original: Celeste: I thought they were only in the library and the locker room.
translation: Celeste: 我还以为它们只在图书馆和储物间有。

original: MIRIAM: [i]This[/i] Construct was a gift from House von Sanctus.
translation: MIRIAM: [i]这个[/i]奥术构造体是来自冯·桑克图斯家族的礼物。

original: MIRIAM: I have to say,[p/] they’re quite convenient to have around.
translation: MIRIAM: 不得不说，[p/]有它们在手边真是太方便了。

original: Celeste: They look really cool.[p/] Maybe I should get one.
translation: Celeste: 看起来真棒。[p/]可能我也该弄一台。

original: MIRIAM: You should.
translation: MIRIAM: 你是应该这么做。

original: Miriam: A Construct would be far more useful than this attendant of yours.
translation: Miriam: 奥术构造体会比你现在这个随侍更有用。

original: Celeste: ...Yeah, maybe.
translation: Celeste: ……是啊，可能吧。

original: MIRIAM: Unfortunately,[p/] there are still some issues with their intelligence.
translation: MIRIAM: 只是可惜，[p/]它们的智能还有些问题。

original: Celeste: Their “intelligence”?
translation: Celeste: 它们的“智能”？

original: MIRIAM: It happens when you give them complex commands.
translation: MIRIAM: 你向它们下达复杂指令时就会出问题。

original: MIRIAM: Hm...[p/] It might be easier to show you.
translation: MIRIAM: 嗯……[p/]向你展示一下可能更直观些。

original: Miriam turned to the Construct and began beckoning it over.
translation: 米莉亚姆转向构造体，招呼它过来。

original: MIRIAM: Construct,[p/] please retrieve my textbooks and bring them here.
translation: MIRIAM: 奥术构造体。[p/]请取来我的课本。

original: MIRIAM: Then,[p/] cast [b]Steelwind Strike[/b] at this location.
translation: MIRIAM: 然后，[p/]在此处吟唱[b]斯蒂尔文德剑刃风暴[/b]。

original: MIRIAM: After that,[p/] retrieve some plates and set them out at this table.
translation: MIRIAM: 这之后，[p/]取来一些盘子，然后把它们摆到这张桌子上。

original: Celeste: W-[p/][s/]What?!
translation: Celeste: 什、[p/][s/]什么？！

original: The Construct stood up and retrieved Miriam’s textbooks from one of the shelves in the room.
translation: 奥术构造体起身，从房间内的一个书架上取来了米莉亚姆的课本。

original: It brought them to the table they were sitting at,[p/] just like she'd ordered.
translation: 它将其放在我们面前的桌上，[p/]正如她刚刚命令的一样。

original: But then it suddenly stopped.
translation: 但之后它突然就停下了。

original: Celeste: Wait...[p/] What happened?
translation: Celeste: 等等……[p/]发生了什么事？

original: MIRIAM: The Construct obviously can’t cast [b]Steelwind Strike[/b],[p/] so my second command was impossible to carry out.
translation: MIRIAM: 奥术构造体当然不能吟唱[b]斯蒂尔文德剑刃风暴[/b]。[p/]所以我的第二个指令是不可能完成的。

original: MIRIAM: But did you notice something else?
translation: MIRIAM: 但是你注意到别的什么的了吗？

original: Celeste: ...It ignored your third command, too.
translation: Celeste: ……它也略去了你的第三条指令。

original: MIRIAM: Exactly.[p/] My third command [i]was[/i] possible to carry out.
translation: MIRIAM: 正是如此。[p/]我的第三条指令[i]明明是[/i]可能执行的。

original: MIRIAM: When the Construct gets to that task,[p/] it will deem the [i]entire[/i] series impossible to complete.
translation: MIRIAM: 当奥术构造体开始执行无法完成的任务时，[p/]它会认定[i]整套[/i]命令都无法执行。

original: Miriam: A Runestone?[p/] I have one as well,[p/] but mine is the latest model.
translation: Miriam: 符石？[p/]我也有一个，[p/]但我的是最新款。

original: Celeste: Ugh...
translation: Celeste: 呃……

original: Tyrion: You have a newer model?![p/][s/] Can I see it?!
translation: Tyrion: 你有更新的款式？！[p/][s/]能让我看看吗？！

original: Miriam: What?![p/][s/] No!
translation: Miriam: 啊？！[p/][s/]不行！

original: Miriam: Your attendant doesn't appear to actually do much.
translation: Miriam: 你的随侍看起来并没有干什么活。

original: Miriam: How [i]do[/i] you put up with him?
translation: Miriam: 你[i]到底[/i]是怎么忍受他的？

original: Celeste: O-[p/]Oh...[p/] You know how it is...
translation: Celeste: 呃、[p/]哦，[p/]你知道的……

original: I couldn't help but appreciate how angry she was getting on my behalf.
translation: 看到她为我生气，我不由得感到欣慰。

original: Miriam: I wasn't aware another Steelwind had enrolled at the academy.
translation: Miriam: 我并不知道另一个斯蒂尔文德家的人也在学院就读。

original: Miriam: Which branch family were you from again?
translation: Miriam: 你是哪个分家出身的来着？

original: Celeste: I-[p/][s/]It's one of the far-off branches.
translation: Celeste: 那、[p/][s/]那是个相当遥远的分支。

original: Celeste: We're not that well-known.
translation: Celeste: 我们并没那么出名。

original: Miriam: I...[p/] see.
translation: Miriam: 我……[p/]明白了。

original: Player: Aria|SteelOrd
Miriam: Honestly,[p/] I don't know what Aria is thinking...
translation: Miriam: 老实说，[p/]我不知道阿莉亚在想什么……

original: Miriam: At this rate,[p/] it won't matter [i]which[/i] House she belongs to.
translation: Miriam: 照这样下去，[p/]不管她出身[i]什么[/i]家族都没用。

original: Miriam: She'll be ruined...
translation: Miriam: 她会完蛋的……

original: Celeste: Are you...[p/] actually concerned about her?
translation: Celeste: 你是在……[p/]担心她？

original: Miriam: W-[p/][s/]What?![p/][s/] Of course, not!
translation: Miriam: 什、[p/][s/]什么？！[p/][s/]当然没有了！

original: Celeste: By the way,[p/] do you happen to know Eris Illmater?
translation: Celeste: 顺带一提，[p/]你是否认识厄莉斯·伊尔马特？

original: Miriam: O-[p/]Oh...
translation: Miriam: 啊、[p/]哦……

original: Miriam: I would stay away from her if I were you.
translation: Miriam: 如果我是你的话，我会离她远远的。

original: Miriam: I've heard some unsavory things have happened to people who cross her.
translation: Miriam: 我听说和她扯上关系的人都出了些难以启齿的事。

original: Miriam: It's no wonder that she's joined forces with that necromancer...
translation: Miriam: 也难怪她和那个死灵法师走的那么近……

original: Player: Catherine|Catherine Autopsy|BellRep
Miriam: It's such a shame what happened to the professor...
translation: Miriam: 教授的事真是太遗憾了……

original: Miriam: She truly was the best and most vigilant among the faculty.
translation: Miriam: 她毫无疑问是教员中最出色、最警觉的那个。

original: She was certainly [i]something[/i]...
translation: 她确实有[i]实力[/i]……

original: Miriam: I can't believe it took so long for that necromancer to be detained!
translation: Miriam: 真不敢相信拘留那个死灵法师要用这么久！

original: Miriam: All it took was a [i]literal[/i] murder!
translation: Miriam: 竟然要等到[i]真的[/i]杀了人才把他捉拿归案！

original: Tyrion: ...The trial isn't over yet.[p/] He's innocent until proven guilty.
translation: Tyrion: ……审理还未结束。[p/]他在被证明有罪之前都是无辜的。

original: Miriam: Oh,[p/] of course,[p/] [i]you[/i] would say that.
translation: Miriam: 哦，[p/][i]你[/i]自然会这么想。

original: Miriam: You trash can't [i]help[/i] but sympathize with each other.
translation: Miriam: 你们这些垃圾就是[i]忍不住[/i]同情彼此。

original: Celeste: Do [i]not[/i] talk to him like that.
translation: Celeste: [i]不要[/i]这样说他。

original: Miriam: W-[p/][s/]Wha—?! [h="Why do I suddenly feel|so terrified of her?" e="f" /]
translation: Miriam: 什、[p/][s/]什——？！ [h="为何我突然……|对她感到恐惧？" e="f" /]

original: Celeste: S-[p/]Sorry...[p/] Just...[p/] don't,[p/] okay?
translation: Celeste: 抱、[p/]抱歉……[p/]只是……[p/]不要这样，[p/]好吗？

original: Miriam: O-[p/]Of course...
translation: Miriam: 当、[p/]当然可以……

original: Miriam: Ugh...[p/] With the professor gone,[p/] the headmaster is just going to bring more of those street urchins into the academy.
translation: Miriam: 唔呃……[p/]教授不在了的话，[p/]校长又要让那些流浪儿童入学了。

original: Celeste: ...Is that really so bad, though?
translation: Celeste: ……不过，这有那么糟糕吗？

original: Celeste: Every mage should have the right to develop their powers.
translation: Celeste: 每个法师都有权利发展自己的力量嘛。

original: Miriam: ...Don't tell me that Aria got to you.
translation: Miriam: ……别跟我说是阿莉亚教你这一套的。

original: Miriam: Mages were chosen by the Scaled Lord through divine right.
translation: Miriam: 法师是由鳞甲领主通过圣权选出来的。

original: Celeste: Oh, here we go...
translation: Celeste: 噢，开始了……

original: Miriam: Magic is something that should [i]only[/i] be held by the nobility.
translation: Miriam: 魔法这种东西就[i]只[/i]应该被贵族所拥有。

original: Miriam: These [i]bastard[/i] children have no right to call themselves mages!
translation: Miriam: 那些[i]野种[/i]们没权自称法师！

original: Celeste: R-[p/]Right...
translation: Celeste: 好、[p/]好吧……

original: ...Maybe it was a mistake to put Celeste in this situation.
translation: ……或许让塞莱斯特陷入这个处境是个错误。

original: Player: Miriam|Four
Celeste: The Fregas primarily control Wyverngarde's finances, right?
translation: Celeste: 弗雷加家主要掌控维文加德的经济对吗？

original: Miriam: But of course!
translation: Miriam: 那是当然！

original: Miriam: The Fregas own every banking house in the kingdom.
translation: Miriam: 弗雷加家掌控着王国里的每一家银行。

original: Miriam: One could even say that we alone are responsible for Wyverngarde's prosperity.
translation: Miriam: 甚至可以说维文加德能经济繁荣，都是我们一家的功劳。

original: ...How about sharing that "prosperity" with the commonfolk?
translation: ……那为什么不与平民分享那份“繁荣”呢？

original: Player: Blood|Blood2|Rapier|Rapier2
Miriam: Ugh...[p/] I really hope Aria returns my rapier soon.
translation: Miriam: 呃啊……[p/]真希望阿莉亚能早点把我的剑还给我。

original: Celeste: It must be pretty important to you.
translation: Celeste: 那对你来说肯定重要非凡。

original: Miriam: It is an ancient family heirloom,[p/] wielded by Beatrice the first:[p/] one of the first heroes of Wyverngarde.
translation: Miriam: 那是我家从上古时期代代相传的传家宝，[p/]曾是维文加德几位开过英雄之一——比亚特丽丝一世的佩剑。

original: Miriam: ... [h="I wonder...|Is she okay...?" e="sf" /]
translation: Miriam: …… [h="我又想起来……|她还好吗……？" e="sf" /]

original: I mean...[p/] If she was one of the heroes of Wyverngarde,[p/] she was probably long dead by now.
translation: 我得说……[p/]如果她真的是维文加德的开国英雄，[p/]她肯定早就逝去了。

original: Player: Construct|Logic|LockerCon
Celeste: What do you think about this, Miriam?
translation: Celeste:米莉亚姆，你对这个有什么看法？

original: Miriam: O-[p/][s/]Oh...[p/] Um...
translation: Miriam: 啊、[p/][s/]哦……[p/]嗯……

original: Miriam: ...I’m terribly sorry.
translation: Miriam: ……万分抱歉。

original: Miriam: But I don’t have much to say about that.
translation: Miriam: 但我对这个一无所知。

original: I followed Steelwind’s directions and found Miriam Frega’s dorm room.
translation: 我跟随斯蒂尔文德的指示，找到了米莉亚姆·弗雷加的宿舍。

original: The door leading inside seemed a lot more ornately decorated than the other rooms.
translation: 房门对比起其他宿舍可谓是富丽堂皇。

original: I went to knock on the door,[p/] not realizing that it was only partially closed.
translation: 我上前敲了敲门，[p/]才发现门只是虚掩着。

original: As my fist came into contact with the wood,[p/] I accidentally pushed it open.
translation: 就在我的指节敲上木制的门板时，[p/]它一下子就被我推开了。

original: Miriam: ...!
translation: Miriam: ……！

original: As the door swung open,[p/] I made eye contact with the girl inside.
translation: 房门扇动之际，[p/]我与房里的女孩子目光相接。

original: She seemed to be studying at a desk,[p/] but she was now staring at me, stunned.
translation: 她看起来在书桌前学习，[p/]但现在正震惊地盯着我。

original: I slowly saw her expression shift from a puzzled look to a furious and violent scowl.
translation: 我看到她眉间的神情从困惑渐渐变得愤怒而暴躁。

original: Miriam: Excuse me?![p/][s/] How [i]dare[/i] you barge into my room! [h="These insects!|They have no respect!" e="a"/]
translation: Miriam: 啊？！[p/][s/]你竟[i]胆敢[/i]闯进我的房间！ [h="这些臭虫！|毫无礼教！" e="a"/]

original: TYRION: S-[p/][s/]Sorry![p/] I was trying to knock,[p/] but—
translation: TYRION: 对、[p/][s/]对不起！[p/]我本想敲门，[p/]但是——

original: Miriam: Construct![p/][s/] Remove these hoodlums from my room!
translation: Miriam: 奥术构造体！[p/][s/]把这些流氓从我的房间里赶出去！

original: From the corner of the room,[p/] an Arcane Construct stood up and began charging towards me at a terrifying speed.
translation: 房间一角，[p/]一尊奥术构造体站起，以骇人的速度突然向我冲来。

original: Before I even knew what was happening,[p/] it raised its fist to strike me.
translation: 在我认知到发生的事情前，[p/]它已举起拳头向我击来。

original: CELESTE: ...!
translation: CELESTE: ……！

original: Flustered,[p/] I fell back and raised my arms to shield myself.
translation: 仓皇之下，[p/]我向后倒去，试图举起双臂保护自己。

original: I closed my eyes,[p/] bracing for the impending impact.
translation: 我双眼紧闭，[p/]为即将到来的冲击做好准备。

original: ...But instead,[p/] I heard the clang of steel striking stone.
translation: 但这并没有发生。[p/]我听到呛啷一声，像是钢铁撞击石头的声音。

original: Confused,[p/] I opened my eyes to see Celeste standing between the Construct and me.
translation: 我满腹疑惑地睁开双眼，[p/]看到塞莱斯特站在我和构造体中间。

original: Her sword was drawn,[p/] and it was locked with the Construct’s fist.
translation: 她拔剑在手，[p/]架住了构造体的铁拳。

original: Despite the Construct's imposing size and strength,[p/] Celeste was slowly pushing it back.
translation: 尽管构造体身形庞大，力量竟然，[p/]塞莱斯特却正慢慢将它推回去。

original: Upon taking a closer look at Celeste,[p/] the girl narrowed her eyes.
translation: 仔细打量了塞莱斯特后，[p/]那个女孩眯起双眼。

original: Miriam: ...Construct.[p/] Stand down.
translation: Miriam: ……奥术构造体，[p/]退下。

original: Miriam: I’m terribly sorry for that.[p/] I wasn’t aware that this man was your servant.
translation: Miriam: 我真是十分抱歉。[p/]我不知道这个男人是你的随侍。

original: Celeste's hand was firmly clenched around the hilt of her sword,[p/] but she put it away without another word.
translation: 塞莱斯特的手紧紧地握着剑柄，[p/]一言不发地收了剑。

original: Miriam: I haven’t noticed you around campus.[p/] Are you a new student? [h="If the academy allowed her to bring her retainer,|she [i]must[/i] be important." e="h"/]
translation: Miriam:  我在学校还没见过你，[p/]你是新生吗？ [h="如果学院准予她携带自己的侍从，|她[i]肯定[/i] 是个重要人物。" e="h"/]

original: CELESTE: ...What are you talking about?
translation: CELESTE: ……你说什么呢？！

original: I saw an opportunity.
translation: 我嗅到一丝机会。

original: TYRION: Y-[p/][s/]Yes.[p/] My...[p/] master just enrolled here recently.
translation: TYRION: 没、[p/][s/]没错，[p/]我的……[p/]主人刚入学没多久。

original: Celeste squinted at me,[p/] confused.[p/] I just tilted my head towards Miriam.
translation: 塞莱斯特用余光看着我，[p/]神情困惑。[p/]我只是将头转向米莉亚姆来向她示意。

original: CELESTE: Y-[p/][s/]Yes![p/] I just...[p/][s/] started here!
translation: CELESTE: 对、[p/][s/]没错！[p/]我……[p/][s/]刚入学！

original: CELESTE: I take it [i]you’re[/i] Miriam Frega?
translation: CELESTE: 我想[i]你就是[/i]米莉亚姆·弗雷加了吧？

original: MIRIAM: Yes.[p/] It seems that my reputation precedes me.
translation: MIRIAM: 正是。[p/]看来我的名声传播很广。

original: MIRIAM: It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance, Lady...
translation: MIRIAM: 很高兴能认识您，您是……

original: CELESTE: I’m Celeste.[p/] Celeste M-
translation: CELESTE: 我是塞莱斯特。[p/]塞莱斯特·麦——

original: She caught herself,[p/] pausing for what was a very awkward moment.
translation: 她突然反应过来，[p/]卡在一个很尴尬的地方。

original: CELESTE: MSsssteel...[p/][s/]wind![p/][s/] I’m Celeste Steelwind!
translation: CELESTE: 麦、斯蒂尔……[p/][s/]文德！[p/][s/]我是塞莱斯特·斯蒂尔文德！

original: Was she serious?[p/][s/] There was no way Miriam was going to believe—
translation: 她认真的吗？[p/][s/]米莉亚姆才没可能相信——

original: MIRIAM: S-[p/][s/]Steelwind?!
translation: MIRIAM: 斯、[p/][s/]斯蒂尔文德？！

original: MIRIAM: Um...[p/][s/] It’s a pleasure to meet another member of such an esteemed house! [h="She must be from a distant branch family...|Father may have a use for her..."/]
translation: MIRIAM: 呃……[p/][s/]很荣幸能认识另一位来自崇高家族的成员！[h="她一定来自分家……|或许对父亲有用……"/]

original: Wait...[p/][s/] She was actually buying this?!
translation: 慢着……[p/][s/]她真信了这套说法吗？！

original: Celeste: I...[p/] just moved in,[p/] and I thought that I should introduce myself.
translation: Celeste: 我……[p/]才刚刚转过来，[p/]我想该好好介绍下自己。

original: Celeste: Seeing as you’re a top student in the field of [b]conjugation[b/].
translation: Celeste: 听说您是学院里[b]召化术[b/]领域最顶尖的学生。

original: TYRION: [b]Conjuration[/b].
translation: TYRION: [b]召唤术[/b]。

original: Celeste: Yes.
translation: Celeste: 没错。

original: ...Well,[p/] there was no backing out now.
translation: ……好吧，[p/]现在没有退路了。

original: TYRION: Lady...[p/] Steelwind.[p/] I’m afraid we must leave now if we want to make our next engagement.
translation: TYRION: 斯蒂尔文德……[p/]小姐。[p/]下一场会面的时间快到了，我们恐怕该走了。

original: Celeste: O-[p/]Oh,[p/][s/] right!
translation: Celeste: 啊、[p/]噢，[p/][s/]是啊！

original: Celeste: Let’s go...[p/] servant.
translation: Celeste: 我们走吧……[p/]仆从。

original: MIRIAM: Oh?[p/] Leaving already?
translation: MIRIAM: 哦？[p/]这么快就要走了吗？

original: MIRIAM: It was a pleasure talking to you.
translation: MIRIAM: 我们的对话真的沁人心脾，十分愉悦。

original: Celeste: Y-[p/][s/]Yeah![p/][s/] Sure!
translation: Celeste: 是、[p/][s/]是的！[p/][s/]确实如此！

original: Celeste: See you around.
translation: Celeste: 再会。

original: I made my way back to the foyer with Celeste.
translation: 我与塞莱斯特一同走回前厅。

original: With all the time we’d spent,[p/] we only had a brief amount of time before night fell.
translation: 我们已经消耗了不少工夫，[p/]只剩一点点时间就要入夜了。

original: But luckily,[p/] we'd found a lot during our investigation.
translation: 幸运的是，[p/]我们在调查中发现了很多事实。

original: CELESTE: Are you sure you didn’t want to talk to her more?
translation: CELESTE: 你确定不需要再和她多聊聊了吗？

original: CELESTE: We were getting a lot out of her.
translation: CELESTE: 我们从她身上得知了不少情报。

original: TYRION: We already got a lot of useful information out of her.
translation: TYRION: 我们已经从她身上知道不少有用的信息了。

original: TYRION: The more time we spend with her,[p/] the more likely she is to see through our ruse and warn the prosecution.
translation: TYRION: 呆得越久，[p/]她识破我们诡计的可能就越大，会惊动检方的。

original: CELESTE: R-[p/][s/]Right...
translation: CELESTE: 好、[p/]好吧……

original: TYRION: So...[p/] Why “Steelwind”?
translation: TYRION: 所以说……[p/]为什么选“斯蒂尔文德”？

original: CELESTE: I don’t know![p/][s/] I panicked!
translation: CELESTE: 我也不知道！[p/][s/]我当时很慌！

original: CELESTE: I don't remember any of the other houses' names..
translation: CELESTE: 我想不起任何其他贵族的姓氏了……

original: TYRION: Pierce would've had a lower profile.
translation: TYRION: 皮尔斯的知名度应该没那么高。

original: CELESTE: I’m not using that creep’s name!
translation: CELESTE: 我才不会用那个恶心的家伙的名字！

original: TYRION: ...Hopefully,[p/] Steelwind doesn’t mind us “borrowing” her name.
translation: TYRION: ……希望斯蒂尔文德不会介意我们“借用”她的名号。

original: CELESTE: And we got her statement on what she saw that day.
translation: CELESTE: 总之我们拿到了她的目击证言。

original: TYRION: There's also what she said about her rapier...
translation: TYRION: 还有她佩剑的事情……

original: CELESTE: I bet she was lying when she said it was stolen...
translation: CELESTE: 我赌她说剑被偷是在撒谎……

original: CELESTE: She was probably trying to establish an alibi.
translation: CELESTE: 她大概率是想给自己找个不在场证明。

original: TYRION: I’m...[p/] not so sure.
translation: TYRION: 我……[p/]不是很确定。

original: CELESTE: Why do you say that?
translation: CELESTE: 为什么？

original: TYRION: Doesn’t it feel...[p/] too obvious?
translation: TYRION: 你不觉得这有点……[p/]太刻意了吗？

original: TYRION: If she was lying about the rapier being stolen,[p/] that would imply that she planned all of this in advance.
translation: TYRION: 如果说她在剑被偷这件事上撒谎，[p/]也就意味着她提前准备了这一切。

original: TYRION: But if she had to choose a murder weapon,[p/] why would she choose something that [i]literally[/i] has her family's name on it?
translation: TYRION: 不过如果她必须选一个凶器，[p/]为什么要选一件出自弗雷加家的武器呢？

original: TYRION: I’d understand if the murder was a spur-of-the-moment decision and somehow occurred in her dorm room.
translation: TYRION: 如果这场凶杀是临时起意，而且还发生在她的宿舍里，那是可以理解的。

original: Tyrion: In a situation like that,[p/] she might've just used something nearby.
translation: Tyrion: 那种情况下，[p/]她可能只得使用手边的东西。

original: TYRION: But if this was a premeditated murder committed by Miriam,[p/] that rapier would be the [i]last[/i] weapon she would choose.
translation: TYRION: 但假设这是一场由米莉亚姆精心策划的谋杀，[p/]那刺剑会是她[i]最不可能[/i]选的作案工具。

original: CELESTE: Right...[p/] I guess that makes sense.
translation: CELESTE: 对哦……[p/]确实有道理。

original: TYRION: There’s also the “evidence” of academic dishonesty.
translation: TYRION: 同时还有关于学术舞弊的“证据”。

original: TYRION: It doesn’t match up with what we heard from Miriam.
translation: TYRION: 与我们从米莉亚姆那得到的情报不符。

original: CELESTE: You mean all that stuff about working with the Crown Prince?
translation: CELESTE: 你是说她与王储殿下合作研究的那件事？

original: CELESTE: She was probably just making things up to look good in front of me.
translation: CELESTE: 她也可能只是为了装模作样编出来的。

original: TYRION: I have...[p/] an insight when it comes to things like this.
translation: TYRION: 我……[p/]在这方面有种独特的洞察力。

original: TYRION: Under certain circumstances,[p/] I can usually tell when someone is lying.
translation: TYRION: 在某些情形下，[p/]我能分辨一个人是否在说谎。

original: TYRION: I'd be able to see through a lie as grandiose as that.
translation: TYRION: 这类冠冕堂皇的谎言我是能看穿的。

original: People could subconsciously shield themselves from the Eye of Horus,[p/] even if they didn't know about it.
translation: 就算不知道荷鲁斯之眼的存在，[p/]人们也能潜意识地保护自己。

original: But when they did that,[p/] I wouldn't be able to see [i]any[/i] thoughts from them.
translation: 当他们真的那样做时，[p/]我无法看到他们的[i]任何[/i]想法。

original: I saw that she was lying about her encounter with Bellwether.[p/] I would’ve seen dissonant thoughts if she were lying about her grades, too.
translation: 我已经看到了她在与贝尔维瑟相遇的事情上有所隐瞒，[p/]如果她在成绩的问题上说谎，我肯定会发现。

original: CELESTE: Well,[p/] I guess your insight has never failed us before,[p/] but what does this mean?
translation: CELESTE: 好啊，[p/]我想你的直觉也从未让我们失望。[p/]但那意味着什么呢？

original: TYRION: ...I don’t know.
translation: TYRION: ……我还不知道。

original: TYRION: Even with everything we’ve found,[p/] I’m still not sure who the real culprit is...
translation: TYRION: 尽管我们已经搜集了这么多信息，[p/]但我还是不确定真凶是谁……

original: TYRION: At the very least,[p/] I think we should still try to pull Miriam onto the stand.
translation: TYRION: 至少，[p/]我还是觉得应该试着让米莉亚姆出庭作证。

original: TYRION: If she testifies in court,[p/] I might be able to find something I can use.
translation: TYRION: 要是她能在法庭上作证，[p/]我也许能找到一些蛛丝马迹。

original: But that was a big “maybe”.[p/] She was the daughter of the Duke of Finance.
translation: 但那只是个疑问重重的“可能”。[p/]他是那位财政公爵的女儿。

original: If I didn't play my cards right,[p/] that move could spook the judge enough to make him end the trial then and there.
translation: 只要我一着不慎，[p/]法官很可能就会受到影响，从而当场终止庭审并进行判决。

original: Celeste: Wait, do we have time to kill?
translation: Celeste: 话说，我们还有点时间放松下吧？

original: Celeste: ...Do you want to head back to the library?[p/] You could continue your research.
translation: Celeste: ……你有没有想回图书馆一趟？[p/]你可以继续自己的研究嘛。

original: She was fidgeting with her hands.[p/] Her feet were already shuffling toward the library doors.
translation: 她两手不安分地摆弄着，[p/]双脚已经挪向图书馆的方向。

original: Tyrion: ...You just want to read [i]Dagger at Daggerfall[/i], don't you?
translation: Tyrion: ……你就是想继续读[i]《惊魂匕首雨》[/i]，是吧。

original: Celeste: It's [i]Death at Daggerfall[/i],[p/] and it's a great series!
translation: Celeste: 是[i]《血溅匕首雨》[/i]，[p/]伟大的系列著作！

original: Tyrion: Every time I try to pick one of those books up,[p/] I figure out who the killer is within the first few chapters.
translation: Tyrion: 每次我翻开其中一本，[p/]读完前几章就发现犯人是谁了。

original: Celeste: Yeah?[p/] Well, I'm a normal human being, okay?[p/] I'm not some murder-solving prodigy.
translation: Celeste: 是哦？[p/]好啦，我只是一名凡人，行吧？[p/]我又不是什么破案天才。

original: Celeste: Why don't you go read one of those [i]Wraithbound[/i] books?
translation: Celeste: 你干嘛不去读[i]《缚灵者》[/i]丛书呢？

original: Celeste: Maybe you'll find the unpublished sequel there, too.
translation: Celeste: 你或许能在那里找到还没出版的续作。

original: Tyrion: Celeste,[p/] that series has been finished for centuries.
translation: Tyrion: 塞莱斯特啊，[p/]这个系列几个世纪前就写完了。

original: Wallace: The nobility paid Corrin Bloomveil to write stories about evil necromancers![p/][s/] He's a sellout!
translation: Wallace: 贵族花大钱让科林·花帷去写那些邪恶死灵法师的故事！[p/][s/]他就靠这个赚得盆满钵满！

original: Wallace: Liches are magically impossible,[p/] but people still just eat that nonsense up!
translation: Wallace: 巫妖在法术上明明是不可能的，[p/]但人们就是吃这套无稽之谈！

original: Wallace: That man single-handedly threw the study of [b]necromancy[/b] back into the Stone Age!
translation: Wallace: 那家伙简直是一手把[b]死灵术[/b]的研究水平扔回了石器时代！

original: Celeste: What's wrong?
translation: Celeste: 怎么了？

original: Tyrion: I can't stop thinking about what Wallace said about Corrin Bloomviel.
translation: Tyrion: 我忍不住想起华莱士对科林·花帷的评论。

original: Celeste: Look,[p/] I get that you really like that series,[p/] but they're just books, Tyrion.
translation: Celeste: 看吧，[p/]我明白你确实很热爱那部作品，[p/]但那也只是小说啊，提利昂。

original: Tyrion: They're more than that to me.[p/] Those books inspired me to do what I'm doing now.
translation: Tyrion: 对我来说意义更为重大。[p/]那辑丛书激励我投身现在的事业。

original: Celeste: Wait...[p/] The story about the magic light swords inspired you to become a defense attorney?
translation: Celeste: 不会吧……[p/]关于魔法和光剑的故事却激励你成为辩护律师？

original: Tyrion: A long time ago,[p/] I experienced firsthand how corrupt Wyverngarde was.[p/] I started assuming that the nobles would always win.
translation: Tyrion: 很久以前，[p/]我亲眼目睹维文加德王国有多么腐坏。[p/]我开始认为贵族永远赢得一切。

original: Tyrion: But those books made me want to believe in a world where good could triumph over evil against all odds.
translation: Tyrion: 但那册书让我相信有一个善良战胜邪恶，越过一切阻碍的世界。

original: Tyrion: And if I'd never had that,[p/] I don't know if I'd be here today.
translation: Tyrion: 如果没有那种体会，[p/]我不知道今天自己是否还会在这里。

original: Celeste: I get that,[p/] but Wallace really cares a lot about [b]necromancy[/b] too.
translation: Celeste:  我懂你了，[p/]但华莱士真的也很在乎[b]死灵术[/b]。

original: Celeste: We've been [i]feeling[/i] the stigma against it for this entire case.
translation: Celeste: 在这个案件中，我们一直能[i]感受到[/i]对它的污名化。

original: Celeste: Is it really so hard to believe that those books contributed to how bad things are for him?
translation: Celeste: 那些书对他来说造成多糟糕的影响，真的那么难以置信吗？

original: Celeste: You've said it yourself.[p/] It's one of the most popular books out there.
translation: Celeste: 你自己也说了，p/]那是最受欢迎的书籍之一。

original: Celeste: Do you even know what kind of person Corrin Bloomviel was?
translation: Celeste: 你其实都不知道科林·花帷是什么样的人，对吧？

original: Tyrion: ...Not really.
translation: Tyrion: ……确实不知道。

original: Celeste: So he [i]could[/i] have been paid off by the nobility to write those books.
translation: Celeste: 那么他[i]有可能[/i]是受贵族雇佣创作的。

original: Tyrion: No...[p/] Someone who did that could never write something so beautiful.
translation: Tyrion: 不可能……[p/]那种人不可能创作出那样优美的故事。

original: Tyrion: I'll grant you that it's likely he played into harmful stereotypes about necromancers,[p/] but I'm sure it was just an unfortunate mistake.
translation: Tyrion: 我赞同他可能是将死灵法师陷入有害的刻板印象，[p/]但我确信那只是个不幸的过失。

original: Tyrion: I'm sure there are historical records that will note his many good deeds and contributions to society.
translation: Tyrion: 我确信史书会记载他曾为社会作出的贡献。

original: Tyrion: Maybe if I show Wallace that,[p/] he'll understand that he wasn't all that bad.
translation: Tyrion: 或许我向华莱士出示这些记录，[p/]他就会明白科林不是那么坏的人。

original: Celeste: Sure, sure...
translation: Celeste: 是、是哦……

original: I looked over to her.[p/] She was already shuffling towards the entrance of the library.
translation: 我向她望去。[p/]她已经偷偷向图书馆入口的方向挪过去了。

original: Tyrion: Alright, let's just go.
translation: Tyrion: 行吧，我们出发。

original: Celeste: Woohoo!
translation: Celeste: 哇哦！

original: She barely acknowledged me.[p/] She flung open the doors to the library and ran inside.
translation: 她几乎没理会我，[p/]猛地推开图书馆大门，冲了进去。

original: By the time I entered the library,[p/] she was already sitting at a table,[p/] her eyes glued to the unpublished manuscript.
translation: 待我走进图书馆时，[p/]她已经坐在桌边，[p/]视线黏在没出版的手稿上。

original: Tyrion: Alright,[p/] where to start...?
translation: Tyrion: 好了，[p/]从哪里开始呢？

original: Tyrion: Ah, here we go.[p/] Corrin Bloomviel's autobiography.
translation: Tyrion: 啊，找到了。[p/]科林·花帷的传记。

original: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] That hour flew by.[p/] I still couldn't finish—
translation: Celeste: 呃……[p/]时间过得太快了。[p/]我都没来得及——

original: Celeste: Oh my god...[p/] How many books did you get?
translation: Celeste: 天啊……[p/]你这是读了多少本书啊？

original: Tyrion: HE WAS A STEELWIND, CELESTE!
translation: Tyrion: <size=1.5em>他是斯蒂尔文德家的，塞莱斯特！</size>

original: Celeste: I—[p/][s/] What?
translation: Celeste: 我——[p/][s/]真的假的？

original: Tyrion: He wasn't just paid by the nobility![p/][s/] He was [i]of[/i] the nobility!
translation: Tyrion: 他不只是受雇于贵族！[p/][s/]他就是[i]贵族[/i]！

original: Celeste: ...Was that in the historical records?
translation: Celeste: ……那是史书里记载的？

original: Tyrion: No![p/][s/] It's all one giant conspiracy!
translation: Tyrion: 不是！[p/][s/]这一切都是个巨大的阴谋！

original: Tyrion: I found his old submissions to writing competitions that he'd made under his original name.
translation: Tyrion: 我找到了他以原名参加比赛时提交的作品。

original: Tyrion: The prose he used back then matches his style too closely![p/][s/] It's uncanny when you compare them!
translation: Tyrion: 他那种平铺直叙的风格与科林太吻合了！[p/][s/]将两者放在一起对比，简直不可思议！

original: Tyrion: Some of these submissions even contained story elements that he later used and polished in [i]Wraithbound[/i]!
translation: Tyrion: 其中一些作品的段落甚至在打磨之后又出现在[i]《缚灵者》[/i]系列中！

original: Celeste: How did you even—?
translation: Celeste: 你到底是怎么——？

original: Tyrion: His real name was Lorenzo Steelwind,[p/][s/] born in the year 208!
translation: Tyrion: 他的本名是洛伦佐·斯蒂尔文德，[p/][s/]生于208年！

original: Tyrion: He deserted the army and was disowned by his family,[p/] but they paid him off, Celeste!
translation: Tyrion: 他逃离了军队，被逐出家门，[p/]但斯蒂尔文德家仍向他支付报酬啊，塞莱斯特！

original: Tyrion: They saw that the masses liked his writing!
translation: Tyrion: 他们发现了大众喜爱他的作品！

original: Tyrion: They corrupted him![p/][s/] They used his artistry as a weapon to turn the public against the necromancers!
translation: Tyrion: 所以他们也腐化了他！[p/][s/]他们将科林文艺水平的作为武器，使民众厌恶死灵法师！

original: Tyrion: And he just [i]went[/i] with it![p/] They dangled his inheritance in front of him like a carrot on a stick!
translation: Tyrion: 而他[i]顺从[/i]了！[p/]就如同把胡萝卜绑在木棍上伸到驴子眼前那样，他们将继承权悬在他眼前引诱他！

original: Celeste: Tyrion,[p/] what in the actual hell?[p/] We've only been here for an hour.
translation: Celeste: 提利昂，[p/]这都哪跟哪啊？[p/]我们不过在这里待了一个小时。

original: Tyrion: I know...[p/] If I just had more time,[p/] I could find enough evidence to prove this once and for all.
translation: Tyrion: 我知道……[p/]如果时间更充裕一点，[p/]我能找到足够的证据来一劳永逸地证明这一点。

original: Tyrion: I'm sure if I can take a few more hours to—
translation: Tyrion: 我确定，只要再花上几个小时——

original: Celeste: What?![p/][s/] Tyrion, no!
translation: Celeste: 什么呀？！[p/][s/]不行，提利昂！

original: Celeste: Wallace's trial is tomorrow morning!
translation: Celeste: 华莱士的庭审明天一早就开始了！

original: Tyrion: S-[p/][s/]Scaled Lord,[p/][s/] how could I forget?!
translation: Tyrion: 鳞、[p/][s/]鳞主在上，[p/][s/]我怎能把这个忘记了？！

original: Celeste: It's fine.[p/][s/] Let's just—
translation: Celeste: 没关系的。[p/][s/]我们这就——

original: Tyrion: Wallace will want to hear about what I found!
translation: Tyrion: 华莱士会想要听到我的发现！

original: Celeste: Ugh...[p/] Okay,[p/] whatever.[p/] Let's just go home.
translation: Celeste: 呃……[p/]好啦。[p/]我们回家吧。

original: Tyrion: Naught could remain concealed, Celeste!
translation: Tyrion: 凡欲隐匿，终必昭彰啊，塞莱斯特！

original: Celeste: Sure, Tyrion.[p/] You did great.[p/] Good job.
translation: Celeste: ……没错，提利昂。[p/]你做得很棒。[p/]好孩子。

original: Tyrion: Naught could remain concealed...
translation: Tyrion: 凡欲隐匿，终必昭彰……

original: Wallace: What?!
translation: Wallace: 真的吗？！

original: Tyrion: I know![p/] I wouldn't believe it if I hadn't seen all the pieces there myself!
translation: Tyrion: 我已经知道了！[p/]如果不是亲眼见到那些材料，我根本不会相信的！

original: Wallace: That makes so much sense...[p/] The Steelwinds had always seen the necromancers as a threat to their power...
translation: Wallace: 这就说的通了……[p/]斯蒂尔文德一族向来将死灵法师视作对他们权力的威胁……

original: Celeste: Guys?
translation: Celeste: 伙计们？

original: Wallace: But to think that Bloomviel was originally a part of their family...
translation: Wallace: 但一想到花帷一开始就是他们家族的一员……

original: Tyrion: I know, right?![p/] It's cruelly insane when you think about it!
translation: Tyrion: 我明白这种感觉！[p/]稍微想想这个观点都觉得太疯狂了！

original: Celeste: Guys![p/][s/] Focus!
translation: Celeste: 伙计们！[p/][s/]注意！

original: Celeste: Wallace is on trial for murder right now!
translation: Celeste: 华莱士现在要接受谋杀案的审判了！

original: Wallace: ...
translation: Wallace: ……

original: Wallace: Oh, yeah...
translation: Wallace: 哦，是哦……

original: Tyrion: S-[p/][s/]Sorry,[p/] I don't know what came over me.
translation: Tyrion: 抱、[p/][s/]抱歉哦，[p/]真不知道自己着了什么魔。

original: Tyrion: After I acquit you,[p/] do you want to talk more about what I found?
translation: Tyrion: 让你脱罪之后，[p/]你想再一起深入聊聊我的发现吗？

original: Wallace: Yes.
translation: Wallace: 当然。

original: Celeste: Alright,[p/] don't lose that confidence, I guess.
translation: Celeste: 行吧，[p/]别忘了这股子自信就好，我想。

original: Door
There was a steel door that led into the cell.
translation: 一扇通往牢房的铁门。

original: A magical mechanism covered by a steel box was placed over the lock.
translation: 门锁外面盖着被一个钢盒保护着的魔法装置。

original: They probably noticed that Celeste broke the lock last time she was here.
translation: 他们大概是注意到塞莱斯特上次在里面破坏了门锁。

original: Torch
Lit torches were hanging on the cell walls.[p/] It seemed a bit irresponsible to light a fire in here.
translation: 点燃的火把挂在牢房的墙上。[p/]在这里点火看起来有点不负责任。

original: But prisoner safety was probably the last thing on the Inquisition’s mind.
translation: 但囚犯们的安全显然是裁判所最不关心的事情。

original: Window
The cell had a barred window.[p/] The bars were rusted.
translation: 牢房里有一扇带有铁栏杆的窗户。[p/]栏杆已经生锈了。

original: If a prisoner tried to escape,[p/] there would be a three-story drop to freedom.
translation: 如果囚犯想逃跑的话，[p/]从此通向自由的道路得有三层楼那么高。

original: Back
Player: Alibi
WALLACE: I-[p/][s/]I don’t understand...
translation: WALLACE: 我、[p/][s/]我搞不明白……

original: WALLACE: I was with you in the library the entire time...
translation: WALLACE: 我一直都和你们待在图书馆……

original: WALLACE: But why do they still think I’m the murderer? [h="It makes no sense...|unless." e="s" /]
translation: WALLACE: 为什么他们觉得我是凶手？ [h="这说不通啊……|除非……" e="s" /]

original: WALLACE: Y-[p/][s/]You told the Inquisition, right?!
translation: WALLACE: 你、[p/][s/]你和裁判所的人说了对不对？！

original: WALLACE: Did you tell them that I was with you?! [h="Was I betrayed?!|Did they frame me?!" e="sfa" /]
translation: WALLACE: 你跟他们说了我和你在一起对吧？！ [h="我被背叛了吗？！|是他们诬陷了我吗？！" e="sfa" /]

original: He backed away from us,[p/] a look of suspicion on his face.
translation: 他向后方退去，[p/]满脸怀疑。

original: TYRION: W-[p/]We did,[p/] but they found traces of [b]necromancy[/b] on the body.
translation: TYRION: 我、[p/]我们是有说，[p/]但他们在尸体上发现了[b]死灵术[/b]的痕迹。

original: TYRION: They believe that Bellwether was murdered with a [b]necromancy[/b] spell.
translation: TYRION: 他们认为贝尔维瑟是被[b]死灵术[/b]杀害的。

original: He seemed to get even more tense,[p/] something I didn't think was possible.
translation: 他似乎变得更加紧张，[p/]即使我不认为那种说法有可能实施。

original: Eris had mentioned that his studies were something he liked to keep to himself.[p/] I would need to be delicate.
translation: 厄莉斯曾提到，他喜欢把自己的学习内容藏在自己心里。[p/]我得小心处理。

original: Player: Necromancy
TYRION: Wallace...[p/] We heard about the type of magic that you’re studying.
translation: TYRION: 华莱士……[p/]关于你正在学习的法术类型，我们打听了点情报。

original: WALLACE: ...!
translation: WALLACE: ……！

original: CELESTE: D-[p/][s/]Don’t worry![p/] The headmaster explained it to us already.
translation: CELESTE: 别、[p/][s/]别担心！[p/]校长已经向我们解释清楚了。

original: Celeste: You just want to use [b]necromancy[/b] to become a doctor, right?
translation: Celeste: 你学习[b]死灵术[/b]是为了当医生，对吧？

original: Tyrion: I think what you're doing is really respectable.
translation: Tyrion: 我认为你的做法相当值得尊敬。

original: Tyrion: It's nice to see a dark school of magic being used as a force for good.
translation: Tyrion: 黑暗的法术被用在好的方面，总是令人欣慰的。

original: Wallace: What?![p/][s/] No!
translation: Wallace: 你说什么？！[p/][s/]不是这样的！

original: Wallace: You've got it all backwards! [h="It's because of [i]Wraithbound[/i]!|Those stupid books!" e="a" /]
translation: Wallace: 你们根本就是搞反了！ [h="都是因为[i]《缚灵者》[/i]！|那些愚蠢的书！" e="a" /]

original: For the first time,[p/] I saw some genuine rage from him.
translation: 我第一次从他身上看到发自内心的愤怒。

original: Wallace: Real [b]necromancy[/b] has [i]always[/i] been about healing!
translation: Wallace: 真正的[b]死灵术[/b][i]从来[/i]就是为治愈而存在的！

original: Wallace: But because of garbage like [i]Wraithbound[/i],[p/] the public keeps calling for [b]necromancy[/b] to be outlawed!
translation: Wallace: 但就是因为[i]《缚灵者》[/i]那种垃圾，[p/]人们才把[b]死灵术[/b]称之为禁忌！

original: Tyrion: I-[p/][s/]I think calling it "garbage" may be a bit much...
translation: Tyrion: 我、[p/][s/]我觉得把那套书叫做“垃圾”是不是过分了……

original: Wallace: The nobility paid Corrin Bloomveil to write stories about evil necromancers![p/][s/] He was such a sellout!
translation: Wallace: 贵族花大钱让科林·花帷去写那些邪恶死灵法师的故事！[p/][s/]他就靠这个赚得盆满钵满！

original: Wallace: Liches are magically impossible,[p/] but people still just believe that nonsense!
translation: Wallace: 巫妖在法术上明明是不可能的，[p/]但人们就是吃这套无稽之谈！

original: I had to temper myself.[p/] He was clearly passionate about this,[p/] but I'll admit it stung to hear him talk about my favorite book like that.
translation: 我得控制自己的情绪。[p/]他显然对此热情洋溢，[p/]但我不得不承认，听到他那样谈论自己最喜爱的书籍，让我很是受伤。

original: Celeste: ...Maybe we should talk about something else.
translation: Celeste: ……或者我们该谈谈别的。

original: Player: Spell Compendium
translation: Player: 法术汇编

original: TYRION: ...I understand that you have reservations about talking about your magic.
translation: TYRION: ……我能理解你在这方面有所顾虑。

original: TYRION: But in order to build a case for you,[p/] we'll need to PRESENT your [b]Spell Compendium[/b] to the courts.
translation: TYRION: 但为了分析调查你涉及的案件，[p/]我需要向法庭<size=1.5em>出示</size>你的[b]法术汇编[/b]。

original: WALLACE: I-[p/]I...[p/] don’t have one.
translation: WALLACE: 我、[p/]我……其实没有那种东西。

original: TYRION: Eris already told us about that.[p/] That's why she gave us a blank one for you to attune to.
translation: TYRION: 厄莉斯已经告诉我们俩。[p/]所以她交给我们一个空白的汇编来跟你绑定。

original: WALLACE: ...D-[p/]Do I have to?
translation: WALLACE: ……这、[p/]这是必须的吗？

original: TYRION: It would be extremely difficult to defend you without your Compendium.[p/] It's a core piece of evidence.
translation: TYRION: 没有你的法术汇编会使得辩护极其艰难。[p/]这是核心证据。

original: WALLACE: ...
translation: WALLACE: ……

original: WALLACE: O-[p/]Okay...[p/] I’ll attune to it.
translation: WALLACE: 好、[p/]好的……[p/]我会绑定的。

original: I understood why he was studying this type of magic.
translation: 我已经知道了他为何要学习这一系的法术。

original: ...But the spells in his [b]Compendium[/b] sounded fairly gruesome.
translation: ……但他[b]法术汇编[/b]里的法术看起来真的很恐怖。

original: It was a little terrifying to know that spells like this even existed.
translation: 仅仅知道这样的法术存在于世都令人心惊。

original: WALLACE: Sorry...[p/] A long time ago,[p/] I showed my [i]Compendium[/i] to someone.
translation: WALLACE: 对不起……[p/]很久以前，[p/]我曾将自己的[i]法术汇编[/i]向某人展示。

original: WALLACE: After she saw my [b]necromancy[/b] spells,[p/] she told everyone in the academy.
translation: WALLACE: 她看到我的[b]死灵术[/b]咒语后，[p/]就向学院的每个人说了出去。

original: WALLACE: That’s when Professor Bellwether started coming after me.
translation: WALLACE: 也正是那时开始，贝尔维瑟教授开始针对我。

original: TYRION: ...That must have been difficult for you.
translation: Tyrion: ……你一定很难受。

original: Wallace: After that,[p/] I didn't really talk to anyone.
translation: Wallace: 在那之后，[p/]我不再和任何人说话。

original: Tyrion: What about Eris?
translation: Tyrion: 那厄莉斯是？

original: Wallace: Yeah,[p/] I guess Eris was there too?
translation: Wallace: 是啊，[p/]那时候厄莉斯也在吧？

original: It seemed like it was a difficult time for him.[p/] No wonder he had so much trouble remembering.
translation: 看起来对他而言那是一段非常艰难的时光。[p/]难怪他这么不愿回忆。

original: ...Something similar happened to me after I left my hometown.
translation: ……这与我离开故乡后的经历也很相似。

original: Player: Wallace and Eris
translation: Player: 华莱士和厄莉斯

original: CELESTE: How did you and Eris become friends anyway? [h="Who [i]is[/i] she?|There's something off about her..." e="f"/]
translation: CELESTE: 那你怎么和厄莉斯成为朋友的呢？ [h="她[i]到底[/i]是什么人？|她肯定有些问题……" e="f"/]

original: There was [i]another[/i] hint of fear from her...
translation: 她[i]又一次[/i]流露出恐惧的征兆……

original: WALLACE: O-[p/]Oh...[p/] Sometimes the other students would steal the id number off my locker and switch it with another student's.
translation: WALLACE: 哦、[p/]噢……[p/]有的时候其他学生会偷走我的储物柜名牌，然后跟其他人调换。

original: WALLACE: They thought it was funny whenever that student got angry with me...
translation: WALLACE: 他们以看另一个学生对我生气取乐……

original: WALLACE: Eris had a bit of a reputation around our school.
translation: WALLACE: 厄莉斯在我们学院小有名气。

original: WALLACE: Everyone was scared of her,[p/] even the students from the nobility.
translation: WALLACE: 每个人都害怕她，[p/]即使是贵族学生也一样。

original: TYRION: Probably due to some baseless rumors.
translation: TYRION: 或许是因为一些无根据的流言。

original: WALLACE: One day,[p/] someone switched my id number with hers.
translation: WALLACE: 有一天，[p/]某人把我的名牌与她的调换了。

original: WALLACE: I was so scared when she came up to me.[p/] I couldn’t even say anything.
translation: WALLACE: 她向我走来时我害怕极了，[p/]一个字都说不出来。

original: WALLACE: But she didn’t get angry like the others.
translation: WALLACE: 但她没有像其他人一样发脾气。

original: WALLACE: She just apologized and gave me back my nameplate.
translation: WALLACE: 她只是道了个歉，然后把我的名牌还了过来。

original: WALLACE: After that,[p/] she started talking to me whenever she saw me.
translation: WALLACE: 在那之后，[p/]她每次看到我都会与我说几句话。

original: TYRION: So...[p/] I have to ask...
translation: TYRION: 所以……[p/]我必须得问一下……

original: TYRION: If it’s caused you so much trouble,[p/] why are you still studying [b]necromancy[/b]?
translation: TYRION: 如果因此引起这么多麻烦，[p/]那你为什么还在继续学习[b]死灵术[/b]呢？

original: WALLACE: I want to become a doctor.
translation: WALLACE: 我想要当一名医生。

original: TYRION: The headmaster told us the same thing,[p/] but why are you learning spells that can steal people’s life force and raise the undead?
translation: TYRION: 校长也跟我们说了同样的内容，[p/]但你又为什么要学习那些窃取人的生命力，召唤僵尸的法术呢？

original: WALLACE: Life and death are two sides of the same coin.
translation: WALLACE: 生与死是同一枚硬币的两面。

original: WALLACE: That’s the key principle behind [b]necromancy[/b].
translation: WALLACE: 这是[b]死灵术[/b]背后的核心原理。

original: WALLACE: The first undead was actually a failed attempt to resurrect a human using magic.
translation: WALLACE: 第一个僵尸实际上是尝试使用法术复活人类的失败品。

original: WALLACE: Right now,[p/] [b]necromancy[/b] can only heal injuries and wounds,[p/] but it can’t do anything for diseases or deformities.
translation: WALLACE: 目前，[p/][b]死灵术[/b]只能愈疗受伤与创口。[p/]但对疾病或天生畸形束手无策。

original: WALLACE: If I could just keep studying,[p/] I [i]know[/i] I can develop [b]necromancy[/b] beyond that.
translation: WALLACE: 如果我继续深入学习，[p/]我[i]知道[/i]自己能让[b]死灵术[/b]发展到克服这一难关。

original: WALLACE: I might even be able to create spells that can cure terminal diseases.
translation: WALLACE: 我或许能甚至创造能够治愈绝症的法术。

original: Player: Catherine Bellwether
translation: Player: 凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟

original: TYRION: I think I can already guess,[p/] but how was your relationship with Catherine Bellwether?
translation: TYRION: 我虽然能猜得到，[p/]你和凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟的关系怎么样？

original: WALLACE: After word got out about my spells,[p/] Professor Bellwether would always find reasons to punish me.
translation: WALLACE: 我学习死灵术的消息传播出去后，[p/]贝尔维瑟教授总是找理由惩罚我。

original: WALLACE: She’d start yelling at me for even the smallest mistakes.
translation: WALLACE: 我犯一点点小错她就会大声斥责。

original: Wallace: It was pretty obvious she had it out for the students who didn't come from the noble families.
translation: Wallace: 她非常明显地针对那些不是贵族出身的学生。

original: CELESTE: That’s terrible...
translation: CELESTE: 这太糟糕了……

original: WALLACE: I’d wake up each day,[p/] scared that she’d notice me in the hallways.
translation: WALLACE: 我每天起床的时候，[p/]都怕今天她在走廊注意到我。

original: WALLACE: I knew how to avoid her and stay out of her way,[p/] but sometimes,[p/] she’d get bored and come looking for me.
translation: WALLACE: 所以我学会了躲着她走，[p/]但有的时候，[p/]她觉得无聊的时候就会来主动找我麻烦。

original: WALLACE: I can’t believe that after everything that she did,[p/] she’s just gone.
translation: WALLACE: 但我还是不敢相信在这一切之后，[p/]她就这么死去了。

original: TYRION: I'm sure you have mixed emotions about what happened.
translation: TYRION: 相信你听到消息时心情很复杂。

original: WALLACE: I honestly don’t know [i]how[/i] I feel about it...
translation: WALLACE: 老实说我不知道应该有[i]什么样的[/i]感受……

original: WALLACE: To be honest,[p/] I always wished she would just disappear.
translation: WALLACE: 说实话，[p/]我也一直希望她能干脆消失不见。

original: WALLACE: But now that it’s finally happened,[p/] I just feel even [i]more[/i] scared. [h="It feels like she’s going to|come back as a ghost to haunt me." e="fsa" /]
translation: WALLACE: 但真的发生以后，[p/]我却感觉[i]更加[/i]害怕了。 [h="感觉她会……|从坟墓里爬出来继续纠缠我。" e="fsa" /]

original: Wallace: What's this?[p/] Is it some kind of artificery?
translation: Wallace: 这是什么呢？[p/]某种奥术能源装置？

original: Tyrion: It’s an Attorney’s Runestone.[p/] It proves that I’m a certified attorney.
translation: Tyrion: 这是个律师符石。[p/]它证明我持证律师的身份。

original: Tyrion: It’s fitted with artificery.[p/][s/] I can use it to take pictures of evidence and crime scenes!
translation: Tyrion: 这个里面适配了奥术能源，[p/][s/]我就能用它拍下证据和案发现场的照片！

original: Wallace: Oh...[p/] I've seen some of the richer students using things like this.
translation: Wallace: 哦……[p/]我见过一些富有的学生用这种东西。

original: Celeste: I'm sorry about him.[p/] He shows that thing to everyone.
translation: Celeste: 我为他向你道歉。[p/]他对每个人都炫耀那东西。

original: Tyrion: ...I just think it's neat.
translation: Tyrion: ……我只是觉得这个挺好的。

original: Wallace: I know I shouldn't be asking this, but...
translation: Wallace: 我知道不该问，但是……

original: Tyrion: What is it?
translation: TYRION: 怎么了？

original: Wallace: Why are you helping me?
translation: Wallace: 你为什么要帮我呢？

original: Wallace: I...[p/] don't have enough gold to pay you.
translation: Wallace: 我……[p/]没有足够支付酬劳的钱。

original: Tyrion: It's because we know that you're innocent.
translation: Tyrion: 因为我们知道你是无辜的。

original: Wallace: ...Is that seriously the only reason?
translation: Wallace: ……真的只因为这个吗？

original: Tyrion: I became a defense attorney to help mages who are persecuted by the nobility.
translation: Tyrion: 我是为了帮助被贵族迫害的法师们才成为辩护律师的。

original: Tyrion: I know how much our society mistreats the commonfolk.
translation: Tyrion: 我知道社会对待平民有多不公平。

original: Tyrion: I want to alleviate that,[p/] even if it's just a little.
translation: Tyrion: 我想要改善这个处境，[p/]即使只有一点点。

original: Wallace: ...Okay.
translation: Wallace: ……好吧。

original: He still looked like he didn't fully believe me.
translation: 他看起来仍然没有完全相信我。

original: Wallace: I wish I could be like you, Celeste...
translation: Wallace: 塞莱斯特，我很希望能像你那样……

original: Celeste: What?
translation: Celeste: 啊？！

original: Wallace: You look so reliable.
translation: Wallace: 你看起来很可靠。

original: Wallace: I wish I could even be half as confident as you are.
translation: Wallace: 我希望自己至少能有你一半自信。

original: Celeste: Don't worry.[p/] I'm sure you'll get there one day.
translation: Celeste: 别担心。[p/]我相信你总有一天会做到的。

original: Wallace: ...I don't know about that.
translation: Wallace: ……这我可不敢说。

original: Tyrion: You seem to be good friends with Eris,[p/] despite your reputation.
translation: Tyrion: 虽然你在他人心中名声不太好，[p/]但似乎与厄莉斯是好友。

original: Wallace: Yeah...[p/] I have no idea why she spends time with me.
translation: Wallace: 是啊……[p/]我也搞不懂为什么她愿意和我待在一起。

original: Tyrion: S-[p/]Sorry...[p/] I wasn't trying to imply-
translation: Tyrion: 抱、[p/]抱歉……[p/]我不是要暗示——

original: Wallace: No.[p/] I get it.
translation: Wallace: 没事。[p/]我明白你的意思。

original: Tyrion: But it sounds like everyone at the academy is scared of her, too.
translation: Tyrion: 但听起来学院的其他人也很害怕她。

original: Tyrion: Maybe she understands your situation better than anyone.
translation: Tyrion: 或许她比其他任何人都理解你的处境。

original: Wallace: Hm...[p/] Maybe...
translation: Wallace: 嗯……[p/]可能吧……

original: Player: Catherine|Catherine Autopsy
Wallace: I still can't believe the professor is actually dead...
translation: Wallace: 我还是不敢相信教授真的死了……

original: Tyrion: Yeah...[p/] We just saw her this morning.
translation: Tyrion: 是的……[p/]我们早上还见到她了。

original: Wallace: ...It just doesn't feel real.
translation: Wallace: ……还是没有真实感。

original: Player: Valentina|Valerie|Discover
Tyrion: Do you know the twins who work in the Academy Kitchen?
translation: Tyrion: 你知道在学院厨房工作的那对双胞胎吗？

original: Wallace: Not personally.[p/] I only ever saw them when I went to get food in the cafeteria.
translation: Wallace: 不太熟悉。[p/]我只在餐厅取餐的时候见看到过她们。

original: Wallace: ...But I could tell that they were both scared of me, too.
translation: Wallace: ……但我知道她们同样都很怕我。

original: Wallace: They always did their best to avoid talking to me.
translation: Wallace: 她们总是千方百计地避免与我说话。

original: Wallace: Sometimes they'd give me extra food...
translation: Wallace: 有的时候会给我打给我剩饭剩菜……

original: Tyrion: You seem to have a good relationship with the headmaster.
translation: Tyrion: 你和校长看起来关系不错。

original: Tyrion: He said that you were one of his star students.
translation: Tyrion: 他说你是他的几个优秀学生之一。

original: Wallace: ...Really?[p/] He said that?
translation: Wallace: ……真的吗？[p/]他是这么说的？

original: Wallace: The only reason why I'm even allowed to attend the Academy is because of him.
translation: Wallace: 多亏了他，我才能被允许在学院学习。

original: Celeste: What do you mean?
translation: CELESTE: 这是什么意思？

original: Wallace: He's running a scholarship program for mages born outside of the noble houses.
translation: Wallace: 他运营着一个专为非贵族法师设立的奖学金项目。

original: Wallace: Usually,[p/] only nobles can afford to attend the Imperial Academy,[p/] but he's allowed mages born through the commonfolk to enroll there for free.
translation: Wallace: 通常只有贵族才上得起帝国学院，[p/]但他允许平民出身的法师免费入学。

original: Player: Wallace|WallComp
Tyrion: I've met a lot of mages in my time,[p/] but I've never met a necromancer before.
translation: Tyrion: 我也遇到过很多法师了，[p/]但之前还从来没见过死灵法师。

original: Celeste: Yeah...[p/] And you're not exactly what I was expecting.
translation: Celeste: 是的……[p/]而且你也不是我们以为的那种法师。

original: Wallace: Sorry for disappointing you...
translation: Wallace: 不好意思让你失望了……

original: Celeste: T-[p/][s/]That’s not what I meant.
translation: Celeste: 我、[p/][s/]我不是这个意思。

original: Tyrion: What can you tell me about this, Wallace?
translation: Tyrion: 关于这个你有什么想法吗，华莱士？

original: Wallace: Sorry...[p/] I can't tell you much about that.
translation: Wallace: 抱歉……[p/]我没什么能告诉你的。

original: I looked around the dungeon,[p/] but I didn't see Wallace in any of the cells.
translation: 我在地牢里四处张望，[p/]但华莱士不在其中任何一间。

original: Celeste: The Inquisition is probably still questioning him.
translation: Celeste: 应该是裁判所还在盘问他吧。

original: Celeste: We should come back later.
translation: Celeste: 我们应该晚点再来。

original: As we arrived at the Ratholme Dungeons,[p/] I spotted Wallace locked in one of the nearby cells.
translation: 我们抵达瑞思霍姆地牢时，[p/]我在近处的一间牢房发现了华莱士。

original: ...He was lying on the floor,[p/] muttering to himself.
translation: ……他正躺在地上，[p/]喃喃自语。

original: WALLACE: It’s over...[p/] My life is over...
translation: WALLACE: 完蛋了……[p/]我的人生完蛋了……

original: TYRION: Um...[p/] Wallace?
translation: TYRION: 呃……[p/]华莱士？

original: WALLACE: Eep![p/][s/] Who are you?![p/][s/] What do you want?!
translation: WALLACE: 噫！[p/][s/]你是谁？！[p/][s/]你想干什么？！

original: CELESTE: Wallace.[p/] It’s us.
translation: CELESTE: 华莱士。[p/]是我们啊。

original: WALLACE: O-[p/]Oh...[p/] right...
translation: WALLACE: 噢、[p/]噢……[p/]对……

original: CELESTE: How are you doing?
translation: CELESTE: 你感觉怎么样？

original: Apparently,[p/] not well.
translation: 显然，[p/]不怎么样。

original: WALLACE: Please tell me you’re going to get me out of here!
translation: WALLACE: 请告诉我你们会带我离开这里！

original: WALLACE: I-[p/][s/]I keep telling them that I didn't do it,[p/] but they won't listen!
translation: WALLACE: 我、[p/][s/]我一直告诉他们这不是我干的，[p/]但他们根本不听！

original: TYRION: I'm sorry, Wallace, but...[p/] they found traces of [b]necromancy[/b] magic on the body.
translation: TYRION: 很抱歉，华莱士，但是……[p/]他们在尸体上发现了[b]死灵术[/b]的魔法痕迹。

original: TYRION: They’re convinced that you did this,[p/] and they're going to push your case to trial.
translation: TYRION: 他们认定是你所为，[p/]而且想将你这个案件提交庭审。

original: WALLACE: W-[p/][s/]What?! [h="No!|Are they going to execute me?!" e="sf" /]
translation: WALLACE: 你、[p/][s/]你说什么？！ [h="不！|他们要处刑我吗？！" e="sf" /]

original: WALLACE: T-[p/]This—[p/][s/] This can’t be happening! [h="Are the walls moving?!|Are they closing in?!" e="sf" /]
translation: WALLACE: 这、[p/]这个——[p/][s/]这决不能发生！ [h="墙壁是在移动吗？！|它们是在向我压过来吗？！" e="sf" /]

original: WALLACE: ... [h="I can’t...|I can’t breathe!" e="fs"/]
translation: WALLACE: …… [h="我不能……|我不能呼吸了！" e="fs"/]

original: TYRION: P-[p/][s/]Please calm down!
translation: TYRION: 请、[p/][s/]请冷静一下！

original: Tyrion: Wallace, we know that you’re innocent.
translation: Tyrion: 华莱士，我们知道你是无辜的。

original: Wallace: But those [i]knights[/i] think I did this...[p/] Are they going to kill me?
translation: Wallace: 但那些[i]骑士[/i]认为是我干的……[p/]他们要杀了我吗？

original: TYRION: I've spent my entire life learning how to deal with situations like this.
translation: TYRION: 我一生致力于研究如何处理这种情况。

original: Tyrion: If you let me represent you in court,[p/] I can prove that you're innocent.
translation: Tyrion: 如果你让我在法庭上为你辩护，[p/]我能保证你取得无罪判决。

original: WALLACE: O-[p/]Oh, right...[p/] You said that you were a lawyer...
translation: WALLACE: 噢、[p/]没错……[p/]你说过你是律师……

original: WALLACE: ...B-[p/][s/]But,[p/] I don’t really have any money to pay you with.
translation: WALLACE: ……但、[p/][s/]但是，[p/]我真的没钱付给你。

original: TYRION: Don’t worry about that.
translation: TYRION: 不要担心这个。

original: TYRION: For now,[p/] let’s just focus on getting you acquitted.
translation: TYRION: 现在，[p/]我们还是专注于让你无罪释放。

original: WALLACE: W-[p/][s/]What...? [h="Do they seriously|want to help me...?" e="hf"/]
translation: WALLACE: 真、[p/][s/]真的吗……？ [h="他们是真的|想要帮助我吗……？" e="hf"/]

original: WALLACE: ... [h="No...|They must want something from me..." e="hf"/]
